name: Team VPP, me (1)
subject: Re: King Trump??
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
Was this a mistake?
| Friend, we sent you this time-sensitive poll to gauge public support for the **No Kings Act** , and we’re still waiting for your response.

We’re confused... **Do you support Trump effectively becoming a King, or _was this a mistake?_**

We need 12,242 more responses for conclusive data — please, correct the record immediately: **[Do you support the “No Kings Act” bill to limit Donald Trump’s power as President? »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/no_kings_act_poll/?source=VPP_20250201_EMPOLL_E4_T0_NS_RS&t=6&akid=18738%2E878179%2EtcSFVn)** | [YES, TRUMP CANNOT BE A KING! »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/no_kings_act_poll/?source=VPP_20250201_EMPOLL_E4_T0_NS_RS&t=7&akid=18738%2E878179%2EtcSFVn)
---
[NO, TRUMP SHOULD HAVE FULL IMMUNITY »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/no_kings_act_poll/?source=VPP_20250201_EMPOLL_E4_T0_NS_RS&t=8&akid=18738%2E878179%2EtcSFVn)
[UNSURE »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/no_kings_act_poll/?source=VPP_20250201_EMPOLL_E4_T0_NS_RS&t=9&akid=18738%2E878179%2EtcSFVn)
Thank you SO much for your long awaited response,

_— The Voter Protection Project_

**_(Forwarded Message Below)_**
FROM: Your Response Requested (via VPP)
TO: <dpwillis67@gmail.com>
SUBJECT: 🚫 No King Trump!
**❗ BREAKING NEWS ❗**
**"No Kings Act": Chuck Schumer says he will introduce a bill to try and reverse the Supreme Court’s immunity decision.**
---
**[Friend, do you support the “No Kings Act” bill to limit Donald Trump’s power as President? »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/no_kings_act_poll/?source=VPP_20250201_EMPOLL_E4_T0_NS_RS&t=10&akid=18738%2E878179%2EtcSFVn)**
[](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/no_kings_act_poll/?source=VPP_20250201_EMPOLL_E4_T0_NS_RS&t=11&akid=18738%2E878179%2EtcSFVn)
[YES, TRUMP CANNOT BE A KING! »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/no_kings_act_poll/?source=VPP_20250201_EMPOLL_E4_T0_NS_RS&t=12&akid=18738%2E878179%2EtcSFVn)
---
[NO, TRUMP SHOULD HAVE FULL IMMUNITY »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/no_kings_act_poll/?source=VPP_20250201_EMPOLL_E4_T0_NS_RS&t=13&akid=18738%2E878179%2EtcSFVn)
[UNSURE »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/no_kings_act_poll/?source=VPP_20250201_EMPOLL_E4_T0_NS_RS&t=14&akid=18738%2E878179%2EtcSFVn)
*** 10,000 RESPONSES NEEDED BY MIDNIGHT ***
* * *
Look, every day more and more Democrats call on Congress to pass the **No Kings Act** and __REVERSE__ the Supreme Court’s immunity decision...

But unless we - the PEOPLE - mount MAJOR pressure on Congress to take action, we’ll _lose our chance_ to put a check on Trump’s power.

**_That’s why we NEED to know where you stand:_**

**[Do you support the “No Kings Act” bill to limit Donald Trump’s power as President? »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/no_kings_act_poll/?source=VPP_20250201_EMPOLL_E4_T0_NS_RS&t=15&akid=18738%2E878179%2EtcSFVn)**
[YES, TRUMP CANNOT BE A KING! »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/no_kings_act_poll/?source=VPP_20250201_EMPOLL_E4_T0_NS_RS&t=16&akid=18738%2E878179%2EtcSFVn)
---
[NO, TRUMP SHOULD HAVE FULL IMMUNITY »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/no_kings_act_poll/?source=VPP_20250201_EMPOLL_E4_T0_NS_RS&t=17&akid=18738%2E878179%2EtcSFVn)
[UNSURE »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/no_kings_act_poll/?source=VPP_20250201_EMPOLL_E4_T0_NS_RS&t=18&akid=18738%2E878179%2EtcSFVn)
Thank you for your response,
_The Voter Protection Project_

(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=18738%2E878179%2EtcSFVn). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=18738%2E878179%2EtcSFVn).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=18738%2E878179%2EtcSFVn) to request fewer emails. name: Stop MAGA Extremism
subject: "F -k it, Release 'em all"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Weil for Congress _
body:
| |
---
Axios reported that Donald Trump’s stated rationale for pardoning felons and violent criminals who attacked cops was simply, “F-k it.” | [View in browser](https://yqlzye.clicks.mlsend.com/td/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEwODE2MzUsXCJsXCI6MTQ1MTgwOTEwNjQ3NTEwODI0LFwiclwiOjE0NTE4MDk5NTgwMDI3MDA3Nn0iLCJzIjoiZTg0MTIyZGFkMjE1NzExNSJ9)
| |
---
| [ ](https://yqlzye.clicks.mlsend.com/td/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEwODE2MzUsXCJsXCI6MTQ1MTgwOTEwNjU0ODUwODU3LFwiclwiOjE0NTE4MDk5NTgwMDI3MDA3Nn0iLCJzIjoiYzI0ZmQ1NDhlYzhmNTFlMSJ9)
---
|
---
Friends,

By now, you have probably heard about Donald Trump’s unforgivable act of treachery—one of his first acts as President after being sworn in was to grant unconditional pardons to January 6 Capitol riot offenders, including defendants who have been prosecuted but haven’t yet had their cases heard before a jury.

Axios reported that Donald Trump’s stated rationale for granting a sweeping pardon for the felons, traitors, white supremacists, and violent criminals who attacked cops and erected a gallows to hang the sitting Vice President from was simply: “ _F-k it._ ”****

|
---
| [ ](https://yqlzye.clicks.mlsend.com/td/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEwODE2MzUsXCJsXCI6MTQ1MTgwOTEwNjU5MDQ1MTYyLFwiclwiOjE0NTE4MDk5NTgwMDI3MDA3Nn0iLCJzIjoiYjljMGZmYTc0YjU5ZTNlMSJ9)
---
|
---
MAGA’s calculus is simple: if you are with us, you are a Patriot, and you have Donald Trump’s blessing to perpetrate unspeakable acts of violence and destruction.

And if you stand up against MAGA...then you are the “enemy within” that Trump and his loyalist psychos publicly fantasize about purging and punishing.

As an educator, I have devoted myself to shaping the character of America’s future leaders. **_And I’ll be damned if I sit back and accept what Trump is doing to our country without a fight._**

That’s why I am running for Congress in this special election: America is watching. Our kids are watching, looking to see what we do _right now_. _We cannot fail them_ ; we must stand up and fight back together.****

|
---
**[Can I count on you to fight back with everything we’ve got against Trump’s direct assault on American freedom and justice? If you can, please contribute $10, $25, or more now to help us deliver a shock to MAGA in April:](https://yqlzye.clicks.mlsend.com/td/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEwODE2MzUsXCJsXCI6MTQ1MTgwOTEwNjYzMjM5NDY3LFwiclwiOjE0NTE4MDk5NTgwMDI3MDA3Nn0iLCJzIjoiOGMyMzMxZTFmYjI5ZTVhZCJ9)**
|

subject: Time to start fighting - tell Congress to IMPEACH Trump NOW!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cedar Key Progress and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
| | | **ILLEGAL funding freezes. ILLEGAL inspector general firings. The remedy: IMPEACHMENT.**
**[Tell Congress: IMPEACH TRUMP.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm3-P_29rHT94NlI03rleYOZNpsG5uCaOhXrJSspoqFN7x5JM0r6nzQ-2vuJATkBVeoGo1a6gzIGaWnavBRqAbg6uAtQ4JqTvMyXk1fVW-h1uH1Be4OCHg1h1rM8zL6uSbZkGKTjhEc1vtTnFalrCvWyOo5c2rYyWIq3_SvcY6hg6aGnLWT0mjgTZRrPBtHO6-jggy2mik0BVT0Fs6n5PmVB1JDsOQKi00EegXD6-oELTPlkpWFUB6RQ8TP3YI8uUdDflrqCFJTUqpmCOzhIpMF09xKnX6EzYGSTqgWGi7VkXBOCamBN5kjiLNcRp0SILTQigN1UiAAzMAMNdMhBNPdsyrfX9S0WXEsSpFnMxxuYR_KpLwCCt9YTECvZgeWXHNN0/4do/wdNgdkzjQB2YFy0_NTCD6g/h0/h001.GVqVo1DXFSg-pNKk5NbjoXhCBcPpC9PAt9nTKhQpPrk)**
* * *
Twice impeached convicted felon and rapist Donald Trump has already committed numerous impeachable crimes since returning to the White House.
He unlawfully fired inspectors general that stand in the way of his future illegal actions.
He unlawfully froze funds that Congress has ordered the executive branch to spend on Medicaid, Meals on Wheels, and other vital programs.
**We're not just saying it's a Constitutional crisis - we are demanding ACTION. The Supreme Court may have decided that Donald Trump is immune from the law - but he is NOT immune from impeachment.**
******[Tell Congress: Impeach Trump NOW!](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm3-P_29rHT94NlI03rleYOZNpsG5uCaOhXrJSspoqFN7x5JM0r6nzQ-2vuJATkBVeoH9TK5n0QBNR7quwWFAKIPgsvLFLpd-DsqK5EaiAxgI9GJoEFiyCWBQ-RJN4hJTfXKKGmlB1sVB0EgZcobdBLtHLEy1bhULGyNVqaLRAXL9RxdXBqCyoOwBpHHCosVSpIaDAQWdLVu99P9_nbty1p13PurvA6buIUkSuWAZgaBrf6Mc4LFPoR3rI8a0HiDXTwdGAjrn1U9b19a89tdp_TWefrymhjt1gMDbhE8l_NkU7Ywmg-4OFOqDfKAyR-gCwHzlI7y9_zyspDVG9Z6gbnaMBcEG5xB_ymh9Y8rXJpvQJU9Sgvj-Hb4lLbzJ1umk6V0/4do/wdNgdkzjQB2YFy0_NTCD6g/h1/h001.55WW_t2FerX1PZXeDuvBrkl6vrfwWAd5ien1TbAzccs)** | [IMPEACH HIM ALREADY](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm3-P_29rHT94NlI03rleYOZNpsG5uCaOhXrJSspoqFN7x5JM0r6nzQ-2vuJATkBVeoGi386ZQfNTG7Db8KwY4uDuCeJMj0-Bm_W4iEAiosi-apKu6ujzSoxNmn-VbJQU_Ze-g-dfpxzJOBkwpx6rLfyj_KKLV7L3mx3QhWm72HtXyTIWrr4NtJw_FfCcjjvh9F8aJAkERBF2kUtAQ3XIb77n8BoayEYqKHAw5vXoA9GE--qoU9khhzQeaTzqjUqCy7t-9LeQZKQs85LCaxVMwx7Bjq_24M8oaP5XaEmvhat_D7SzBJOaMEzdK9nZmeig7enzNM34f7Ctb6MQ72Wv9ZiGH3ZCvzLGRDj5_xYOFjyWbdcoLfnTX9uGzGWQ1oTuwcA/4do/wdNgdkzjQB2YFy0_NTCD6g/h2/h001.fBepRyRBw_nKIGPGf0yOIguMPV4y84KB1Qzk0anh0Ro)

Republicans spent all of Joe Biden’s presidency spamming Congress with ludicrous articles of impeachment.

But now, even Republicans are openly admitting that Trump’s actions are flagrantly illegal - we cannot wait any longer to begin the long road to impeachment.

First, we will send thousands of letters to Congress demanding articles of impeachment.

Then, we will go ALL IN to elect Democrats, take back the House, and IMPEACH TRUMP AGAIN.

**It’s time to take action: let’s demand that Congress IMPEACH Donald Trump today!**

******[Our country’s future is at stake! Add your name and tell Congress to impeach Trump NOW!](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm3-P_29rHT94NlI03rleYOZNpsG5uCaOhXrJSspoqFN7x5JM0r6nzQ-2vuJATkBVeoEoUwi-yu8SprgV6yVni0kGhNEuE0n4C-LJiNoFLbRWZG37ktqQf8R7yTx2TXqvWGRPqI-T4esJ7h5nxN3e9JCQGexGW5ZTjtUBJ42hE7iNJQQ0YOj88jWu0XzZOV6AycDTenQH9oBwyaJsJMbnf1czTSS0aUFbslBAqDjewEEG19Q5FtoKvcghf8yUJotDtckwht8mix9wgxc3p0KxgBGJ4-uEHwD3y5uXuD_3C7b4Li5rptQqCoXYSkd6H8nlwJg2Yi3kziz4PCbagAZMn8QhNZx1uT3HbiuzJJruaQeyK0lBAGpgPvALIAY79A2v-fE/4do/wdNgdkzjQB2YFy0_NTCD6g/h3/h001.xQaTCodnXo6Jg7Rqtnasv6tSf9YyU4Wf_76fPBYcCyU)**

**[](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm3-P_29rHT94NlI03rleYOZNpsG5uCaOhXrJSspoqFN7x5JM0r6nzQ-2vuJATkBVeoFtVLy--BDmPR9xyYnuRi9CreBErBmjHqo7R7UfAhBCg6lFWcAfXVYKfYy-y-SsyuB1uvdPEbG-Q523pxDMZlP7I9iB_NG0AlBcotOQiQnVPVnGp1raBC2lpARp71U5jaXLzoin133n-2x_lOmwQg20QYgHvC7yHwvYApo7etRbEnfmu-xbaNW3iYiDIB7CAGdryOxC2-3rwXUt7TSn7cGw9MMqqhaww4c8TtHX0WRFEolbHL0snU7KndWR6ZCpOA8UK8Ch8G83ebpte8pI0ZPA6F84kkPN4pq5zxWOxmT-MzkJa_XiTQcb6BPGRIRH1Xw/4do/wdNgdkzjQB2YFy0_NTCD6g/h4/h001.iVp77dH9XaaajpWDQLH32jk2rfMA9V9HRehG7panmoI)**While a successful impeachment may seem unlikely, the effort itself will demonstrate that the Democrats are fighting for justice and integrity in our government.

It will energize the base and help the party regain control of Congress in the upcoming midterms.

**Now is the time to make our voices heard!**

**[Sign ON and urge your representatives to take a stand and IMPEACH felon Trump. Let them know that we demand accountability and that we will support them in this fight.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm3-P_29rHT94NlI03rleYOZNpsG5uCaOhXrJSspoqFN7x5JM0r6nzQ-2vuJATkBVeoFf46dvkVxtDClP9tGPR3PnznvqcSftP92rZLnbuq2sm4vevAZPODTN-plbdFaTQTdFl3zSq7oaOzqTC4NUMs1ojIUDetjYbNRleD-NXEWkyvjZacvZsGWAmMRzzzvYJ9qunWMEeBy2PTpcCOZTtLWVT8zeZv3qiEsf6gRlMFgDFI0E5AVKytZ7aMPe1GXUfmyholgsvHGpxnVwOWhNmVMnK95gvlRZYVBaXPuYjijWQGPcSmkIXIz_kl0FwrBaf0txuGODx3M_VYL3TiT1INrZF9U2KLrnu4NiTAEw2_h63MUtWbOfNdHIb_FzNPccDqY/4do/wdNgdkzjQB2YFy0_NTCD6g/h5/h001.Z0MaDpX_zdTm5ShKKpbbI1mK-gtEf86pRTwM58zdRCY)**

clean_body: | | | ILLEGAL funding freezes. ILLEGAL inspector general firings. The remedy: IMPEACHMENT. Twice impeached convicted felon and rapist Donald Trump has already committed numerous impeachable crimes since returning to the White House. He unlawfully fired inspectors general that stand in the way of his future illegal actions. He unlawfully froze funds that Congress has ordered the executive branch to spend on Medicaid, Meals on Wheels, and other vital programs. We're not just saying it's a Constitutional crisis - we are demanding ACTION. The Supreme Court may have decided that Donald Trump is immune from the law - but he is NOT immune from impeachment. ** | Republicans spent all of Joe Biden’s presidency spamming Congress with ludicrous articles of impeachment. But now, even Republicans are openly admitting that Trump’s actions are flagrantly illegal - we cannot wait any longer to begin the long road to impeachment. First, we will send thousands of letters to Congress demanding articles of impeachment. Then, we will go ALL IN to elect Democrats, take back the House, and IMPEACH TRUMP AGAIN. It’s time to take action: let’s demand that Congress IMPEACH Donald Trump today! **** a successful impeachment may seem unlikely, the effort itself will demonstrate that the Democrats are fighting for justice and integrity in our government. It will energize the base and help the party regain control of Congress in the upcoming midterms. Now is the time to make our voices heard! Thanks for your support. -Cedar Key Progress Cedar Key Progress support Democrats in competitive Southern districts who are building a diverse, inclusive, and just future. Much of my writing has been dedicated to exposing the [failures](https://substack.com/redirect/29a99520-8622-40df-bc3a-2f328d9c766c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) of institutional "[journalism](https://substack.com/redirect/9127a4ab-5d07-40ae-bc36-23e3a8502dc7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)" and its [complicity](https://substack.com/redirect/0eec3737-e45a-4055-b893-54f0408c24f5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) in the rise of the right wing. That pattern is as disturbing as it has been longstanding, and has prompted many readers to write back asking for recommendations about constructive alternatives.
Everyone reading this newsletter--or, for that matter, others on Substack--is supporting one part of the solution: cultivating an independent media ecosystem outside the gatekeeping powers of professional editors beholden to the corporate political parties and their patrons on Wall Street.
In order to offer a more specific set of further recommendations, I wanted to highlight a series of voices whose work has informed my understanding of the dystopian era to which others are finally waking up.

### **A renaissance voice in the crosshairs of the neoliberal right wing**
As someone whose passions encompass [law](https://substack.com/redirect/fcf4ea9a-26b8-4a5f-8130-c61c290abe7a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), [politics](https://substack.com/redirect/9a82ea36-b428-451e-a29d-46ddd0e9a438?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), [history](https://substack.com/redirect/18695197-f492-427e-958b-f280d1ed59fb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), [academia](https://substack.com/redirect/e5d3284f-f90f-4430-8cd9-e99f7172833e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), [culture](https://substack.com/redirect/53dcdb4c-797d-4ce5-8be6-ed6e8f2684ad?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), [music](https://substack.com/redirect/580571e7-edf3-4352-aa02-7b9347c3f529?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), [dance](https://substack.com/redirect/ca7864c0-6edf-4c4f-8cd5-6fdc5223e07b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), [sports](https://substack.com/redirect/1203f6cc-c398-4525-9129-a22e34713672?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), independent journalism, and [counterculture](https://substack.com/redirect/c270dbb6-8743-458d-a5b8-7cc9d8298d0e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), I tend to find people who confine themselves to silos somewhat uninspiring. Conversely, figures who manage to cultivate multiple skillsets tend to be more compelling to me.
Leonardo da Vinci may have been among the historical figures who inspired the term "renaissance man," but he was far from the last--and some of the most compelling renaissance voices are those of women.

[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..QqE3fF3g7Lknp4Cx0eHxqtU61ueK-45Mx5M-1bW1WdM?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=156201038)
[Dr. Rupa Marya](https://substack.com/@rupamarya) is a quintessential example of a renaissance woman. A doctor, [medical professor](https://substack.com/redirect/a6ee6864-a100-46a0-a214-d77bde1f8da6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), author, commercially successful [musician](https://substack.com/redirect/ad7a5b3c-0379-4199-8707-8e12dd51982a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), and activist, she has consistently championed causes over the course of her career that others often overlook. Today, she is facing [a coordinated campaign to silence her](https://substack.com/redirect/9429daac-c8e2-4f20-a731-ddfd6d851663?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/fc5bd98f-738c-4878-93f9-18e973ac46b5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
One of Dr. Marya's stated concerns relates to the public health implications of environmental racism, visible even in parts of the country that pretend to have overcome racism. San Francisco--where she teaches medicine at the University of California-San Francisco, and where I endured [what Black journalists described as a "civic lynching"](https://substack.com/redirect/e94cfff0-0e09-4e53-b7ac-4a560ca1d245?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) when running for office to challenge a corrupt oligarch largely responsible for the continuing corporate co-optation of the Democratic Party--offers a perfect example.
San Francisco is renowned as a Mecca for LGBTQ communities and individuals often ostracized in other places. It also happens to host one of our country's most revealing examples of environmental racism.
The city's last Black neighborhood has been poisoned by the U.S. Navy since the Second World War, when the [Hunters Point shipyard](https://substack.com/redirect/906dfd93-43d1-4210-b5df-9b6ca76d28d6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) was used to clean ships used in nuclear bomb tests in the South Pacific. Beyond the [quarter million](https://substack.com/redirect/f6fb9cbd-9ddf-412a-a84f-c88fb44c3246?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) Japanese people killed when Washington deployed weapons of mass destruction in an [unnecessary and calculated](https://substack.com/redirect/bbcb4707-ac76-4957-9677-7394a59e4d54?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) show of force, and the [residents of South Pacific islands](https://substack.com/redirect/041483b2-e5ff-4e46-8be5-5ad1c1c521e3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) poisoned by American nuclear tests in their backyards, tens of thousands of Americans--the vast majority of them Black--have been subjected to radiation poisoning by our own military.
Dr. Marya has not only worked to expose this sordid and continuing history (in the midst of America's supposedly most progressive city), but also [reframed](https://substack.com/redirect/665c3904-22d5-4af3-9f65-e5e14b47e088?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) it as a concern for health professionals. After all, radiation poisoning dramatically increases the risks of any number of other ailments, from [cancers](https://substack.com/redirect/6f189848-2d49-482c-89e7-935e3ff5dcf5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) of various kinds to [organ failure](https://substack.com/redirect/1201b5a8-dd75-4d20-8777-b112e1dd22fa?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and ultimately, untimely death.
Beyond Hunters Point and the environmental racism with which San Francisco should be synonymous, Dr. Marya has also written about other overlooked dimensions of public health. Her latest book, [Inflamed: Deep Medicine and the Anatomy of Injustice](https://substack.com/redirect/fb503f2c-270e-41b6-8c49-00864b1316c1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), co-authored with Raj Patel, examines a wide variety of social and environmental factors that drive public health.
Exploring the [COVID-19 epidemic](https://substack.com/redirect/b5a08ec7-68bc-47f5-9303-61848e0c2c3b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and how it [disproportionately impacted](https://substack.com/redirect/d7fa1d73-b40b-4e08-9169-4d8d833703f9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) low-income communities, Dr. Marya & Patel [wrote](https://substack.com/redirect/fb503f2c-270e-41b6-8c49-00864b1316c1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) that:
> Not all patients were equal....Black, Indigenous, and people of colour (BIPOC) were over-represented, their bodies subject to inflammation of all kinds, long before the SARS-CoV-2 virus ever settled into their lungs. Not only lack of access to health care, but systemic social and economic disenfranchisement rendered their bodies most susceptible to Covid when it hit.
As Rupa explained in [an interview](https://substack.com/redirect/71347c75-dd5c-44de-aab7-98717aa80804?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) with Amy Goodman from Democracy Now!:
> If we understand disease with this new kind of diagnosis, the treatment options become radically different. The deep medicine we prescribe to address the inflammation of people and planet has been prescribed by others before us.
Citing examples of caregivers such as "[Huda Sha'arawi](https://substack.com/redirect/cc079e3f-9f1b-447a-8757-f97284aaadb1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and [B.R. Ambedkar](https://substack.com/redirect/d293a5f1-6eaf-477b-9c58-6ed2ef9d591b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and [Harriet Tubman](https://substack.com/redirect/1c5ac496-e924-4ea2-9d26-ad6dc4fd96b3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)," Rupa said that "We need a world rebuilt with care at its heart," and went on to observe how "Indigenous communities defend the greatest range of biodiversity on the planet and, as a result, host the most diverse microbiota inside their bodies. These microbes confer protection against inflammatory disease."
Most recently, Dr. Marya [observed](https://substack.com/redirect/ed9336e7-0a93-4819-89b1-e2f8783ff3a9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) the ongoing genocide in Gaza, and [stood in solidarity](https://substack.com/redirect/d0357a15-9410-4278-836b-a404941f3468?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) with human rights principles treasured across the world despite remaining in exile within the United States and in areas subjected to the whims of Washington.
She has [written](https://substack.com/redirect/ed9336e7-0a93-4819-89b1-e2f8783ff3a9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and spoken out about the plight of medical professionals targeted by the Israeli "Defense" Forces, while sharing her "analysis as a scholar who assesses how power dynamics around oppression impact health outcomes for oppressed people."
For this, she has not only been falsely accused of anti-semitism, but also [targeted](https://substack.com/redirect/c0bf6b3f-6cba-4ec9-bbf2-54c0cb88caa4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)--by the public university where she works as tenured faculty--for potential termination. It sickens me, but also reminds me how [ad hominem attacks on prescient voices](https://substack.com/redirect/0e3e8378-bb02-48fa-8ccd-1bb95c543468?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) can offer an indication of their insight. We are [far from the first](https://substack.com/redirect/5435efe8-afa1-4423-94b5-7c27300f103e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) Americans of color to be publicly condemned for speaking the truth.
While the casual racism and bigotry that pervade San Francisco ended my career as a public advocate, there remains [a chance to save Dr. Marya's](https://substack.com/redirect/80b64476-6ef4-491e-b47f-90a7732185cd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) that I implore you to support.
We need to cultivate every voice dedicated to justice that we can find--which includes defending noteworthy advocates against counterattacks from a self-interested establishment.
### **A voice of reason in a city of madness**
Washington, DC is a cesspit. Having worked there for ten years, organizing grassroots resistance in the evenings while leading a series of non-profit advocacy organizations during the day, my stomach turns when I consider the international and intergenerational horrors that city has birthed.
From 2010-2015, I led a national organization known at the time as the Bill of Rights Defense Committee (BORDC). I continue to serve on the board of directors of an organization formed by the merger of BORDC and an allied organization (known at the time as Defending Dissent) formed in the 1950s to defend Americans from the McCarthy witch hunt. The organization formed by that merger is [Defending Rights and Dissent](https://substack.com/redirect/d55e6dea-0cd5-4364-9797-a8094d4feef4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) (DRAD).
DRAD operates with a small staff punching well above their weight, including [policy director Chip Gibbons](https://substack.com/redirect/941c1357-f9c3-4c49-a681-bbe71dc25866?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). I remember meeting Chip when he had recently graduated from law school, and recall feeling impressed at the time with his grasp of history and political nuance. In the time since then, he has grown to become a vital asset not only to DRAD, but also the movement to restore civil liberties in the U.S.
Chip has appeared on _Democracy Now!_ , most recently to discuss a pair of Trump's nominees and the Senate hearings examining their appointments before forthcoming votes on whether or not to confirm them.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/2e248561-edce-4e28-8c89-850e093ad54c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Discussing proposed FBI Director Kash Patel, Chip [insightfully explained](https://substack.com/redirect/41a02423-4d6b-41c8-87d5-23332ab71bd8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) that the FBI is a political police force with a long history of suppressing constitutional rights, and that Patel is poised to make those historical problems only worse.
In a further discussion about the Senate examination of proposed Director of National Intelligence Tulsi Gabbard, Chip [observed](https://substack.com/redirect/65ccee99-6408-49ea-99e6-320095847abf?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) that Sen. Michael Bennett (D-CO) got it wrong when condemning her for supporting [Edward Snowden](https://substack.com/redirect/115dab1b-f9a2-4a48-bc9d-671711dfa723?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), the heroic whistleblower [inspired by Daniel Ellsberg](https://substack.com/redirect/246e6733-f985-4166-9b75-ea86a15db4e3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to expose the [crimes of the surveillance state](https://substack.com/redirect/eadf09ed-f0f5-47a9-8e40-9e8d39d1b47c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
### **What does corruption look like?**
As I casually suggested to someone just yesterday, the new administration's most promising aspect is that it is unbeholden to the corruption that preceded it. Its [exposure of long suppressed CIA's records about political assassinations](https://substack.com/redirect/c3e8926a-1bfa-4a70-8801-16b958b283f1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), for instance, suggests a willingness to burn down some of Washington's most secretive (and criminal) government organizations.
Of course, the new administration is instead beholden to [its own brand of corruption](https://substack.com/redirect/07091f1b-0bf9-4420-b2db-a0143dbed7cf?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), which I can't pretend is any better than the one it aims to displace. But, especially as [ideological lines are being redrawn around us](https://substack.com/redirect/9726d518-ec86-49cc-b139-e0a283114ed5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), it behooves us all to surround ourselves with accurate sources of insight.
There are none I could recommend more highly than [Dr. Rupa Marya](https://substack.com/redirect/c0bf6b3f-6cba-4ec9-bbf2-54c0cb88caa4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and [Chip Gibbons](https://substack.com/redirect/7d548788-bf47-4083-ae9c-11d600750d03?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). Each of them write on Substack, so I'd encourage you to subscribe.

I'm indebted to a series of writers whose work has informed and inspired mine | | | Feb 2| | | ∙| | Preview ---|---|--- | | | | | | | | | | | | Much of my writing has been dedicated to exposing the of institutional "" and its in the rise of the right wing. That pattern is as disturbing as it has been longstanding, and has prompted many readers to write back asking for recommendations about constructive alternatives. Everyone reading this newsletter--or, for that matter, others on Substack--is supporting one part of the solution: cultivating an independent media ecosystem outside the gatekeeping powers of professional editors beholden to the corporate political parties and their patrons on Wall Street. In order to offer a more specific set of further recommendations, I wanted to highlight a series of voices whose work has informed my understanding of the dystopian era to which others are finally waking up. Thanks for reading Chronicles of a Dying Empire! You can help inform & inspire your friends by sharing this post. A renaissance voice in the crosshairs of the neoliberal right wing As someone whose passions encompass , , , , , , , , independent journalism, and , I tend to find people who confine themselves to silos somewhat uninspiring. Conversely, figures who manage to cultivate multiple skillsets tend to be more compelling to me. Leonardo da Vinci may have been among the historical figures who inspired the term "renaissance man," but he was far from the last--and some of the most compelling renaissance voices are those of women. Chronicles of a Dying Empire is a publication supported by readers, rather than advertisers. To receive new posts,sign up for a free subscription! To support my work and allow me to expand it, please consider becoming a paid subscriber. is a quintessential example of a renaissance woman. A doctor, , author, commercially successful , and activist, she has consistently championed causes over the course of her career that others often overlook. Today, she is facing . | | ---|---|--- One of Dr. Marya's stated concerns relates to the public health implications of environmental racism, visible even in parts of the country that pretend to have overcome racism. San Francisco--where she teaches medicine at the University of California-San Francisco, and where I endured when running for office to challenge a corrupt oligarch largely responsible for the continuing corporate co-optation of the Democratic Party--offers a perfect example. San Francisco is renowned as a Mecca for LGBTQ communities and individuals often ostracized in other places. It also happens to host one of our country's most revealing examples of environmental racism. The city's last Black neighborhood has been poisoned by the U.S. Navy since the Second World War, when the was used to clean ships used in nuclear bomb tests in the South Pacific. Beyond the Japanese people killed when Washington deployed weapons of mass destruction in an show of force, and the poisoned by American nuclear tests in their backyards, tens of thousands of Americans--the vast majority of them Black--have been subjected to radiation poisoning by our own military. Dr. Marya has not only worked to expose this sordid and continuing history (in the midst of America's supposedly most progressive city), but also it as a concern for health professionals. After all, radiation poisoning dramatically increases the risks of any number of other ailments, from of various kinds to and ultimately, untimely death. Beyond Hunters Point and the environmental racism with which San Francisco should be synonymous, Dr. Marya has also written about other overlooked dimensions of public health. Her latest book, , co-authored with Raj Patel, examines a wide variety of social and environmental factors that drive public health. Exploring the and how it low-income communities, Dr. Marya & Patel that: Not all patients were equal....Black, Indigenous, and people of colour (BIPOC) were over-represented, their bodies subject to inflammation of all kinds, long before the SARS-CoV-2 virus ever settled into their lungs. Not only lack of access to health care, but systemic social and economic disenfranchisement rendered their bodies most susceptible to Covid when it hit. As Rupa explained in with Amy Goodman from Democracy Now!: If we understand disease with this new kind of diagnosis, the treatment options become radically different. The deep medicine we prescribe to address the inflammation of people and planet has been prescribed by others before us. Citing examples of caregivers such as " and and ," Rupa said that "We need a world rebuilt with care at its heart," and went on to observe how "Indigenous communities defend the greatest range of biodiversity on the planet and, as a result, host the most diverse microbiota inside their bodies. These microbes confer protection against inflammatory disease." Most recently, Dr. Marya the ongoing genocide in Gaza, and with human rights principles treasured across the world despite remaining in exile within the United States and in areas subjected to the whims of Washington. She has and spoken out about the plight of medical professionals targeted by the Israeli "Defense" Forces, while sharing her "analysis as a scholar who assesses how power dynamics around oppression impact health outcomes for oppressed people." For this, she has not only been falsely accused of anti-semitism, but also the public university where she works as tenured faculty--for potential termination. It sickens me, but also reminds me how can offer an indication of their insight. We are Americans of color to be publicly condemned for speaking the truth. While the casual racism and bigotry that pervade San Francisco ended my career as a public advocate, there remains that I implore you to support. We need to cultivate every voice dedicated to justice that we can find--which includes defending noteworthy advocates against counterattacks from a self-interested establishment. A voice of reason in a city of madness Washington, DC is a cesspit. Having worked there for ten years, organizing grassroots resistance in the evenings while leading a series of non-profit advocacy organizations during the day, my stomach turns when I consider the international and intergenerational horrors that city has birthed. From 2010-2015, I led a national organization known at the time as the Bill of Rights Defense Committee (BORDC). I continue to serve on the board of directors of an organization formed by the merger of BORDC and an allied organization (known at the time as Defending Dissent) formed in the 1950s to defend Americans from the McCarthy witch hunt. The organization formed by that merger is (DRAD). DRAD operates with a small staff punching well above their weight, including . I remember meeting Chip when he had recently graduated from law school, and recall feeling impressed at the time with his grasp of history and political nuance. In the time since then, he has grown to become a vital asset not only to DRAD, but also the movement to restore civil liberties in the U.S. Chip has appeared on Democracy Now! , most recently to discuss a pair of Trump's nominees and the Senate hearings examining their appointments before forthcoming votes on whether or not to confirm them. | | ---|---|--- Discussing proposed FBI Director Kash Patel, Chip that the FBI is a political police force with a long history of suppressing constitutional rights, and that Patel is poised to make those historical problems only worse. In a further discussion about the Senate examination of proposed Director of National Intelligence Tulsi Gabbard, Chip that Sen. Michael Bennett (D-CO) got it wrong when condemning her for supporting , the heroic whistleblower to expose the . What does corruption look like? As I casually suggested to someone just yesterday, the new administration's most promising aspect is that it is unbeholden to the corruption that preceded it. Its , for instance, suggests a willingness to burn down some of Washington's most secretive (and criminal) government organizations. Of course, the new administration is instead beholden to , which I can't pretend is any better than the one it aims to displace. But, especially as , it behooves us all to surround ourselves with accurate sources of insight. There are none I could recommend more highly than and . Each of them write on Substack, so I'd encourage you to subscribe. Paid subscribers can gain access to a further section listing a handful of other contemporary authors whose work continues to inform my views of history and contemporary politics... Continue reading this post for free in the Substack app | | | | | | | (C) 2025 Shahid Buttar South Lake Tahoe, CA 96150 ? ?

name: The Federalist Wire

| 2025 Lincoln Day Dinner on March 22 at the Rogue Valley Country Club!
---
| |
---
| |
---
Dear Republican Friends and Supporters,

Thank you to our long-time members for supporting our events, candidate meet & greets and meetings as well as your donations of time and money. We would also like to thank all our new supporters and welcome them warmly to the party.

This email is to announce our up-coming, exciting 2025 Lincoln Day Dinner on March 22 at the Rogue Valley Country Club! Dinner tickets are $120 each, a table for 10 is $1200. This year we're also pleased to offer Sponsorship Opportunities. Please see more information on the attached flyer. After 5pm attire is suggested. If you are interested in attending please send your contact information to [LDD@jcor.gop](mailto:LDD@jcor.gop) . More information on purchasing tickets will be coming soon.

This is the first time we have sent the “Save the Date” in an electronic format and we're excited for the opportunity to reach more people. Please join us for this popular annual event and mingle and celebrate with your fellow conservatives. Also, please share this information with your friends and family.

Warm Wishes,
JCRP Chair, Joyce Michelangelo

name: Rob Bonta
subject: UPDATE: Judge blocks Trump’s funding freeze
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ROB BONTA FOR CALIFORNIA ATTORNEY GENERAL 2026 FPPC ID #145642
body:
A federal judge in Rhode Island issued a temporary restraining order (TRO) blocking President Trump’s freeze on federal funding.
# [](https://act.robbonta.com/go/3?refcode=em20250201&t=1&akid=1617%2E1088799%2Ey5vA8F)
You're receiving this message because you have supported Democrats in the past. **Rob Bonta is fighting for justice and progress for all as California's Attorney General.** If you want to stop receiving emails from us, [click here](https://act.robbonta.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=2&akid=1617%2E1088799%2Ey5vA8F).
---
I have an important update for you on my lawsuit against the Trump administration.
**A federal judge in Rhode Island issued a temporary restraining order (TRO) blocking President Trump’s freeze on federal funding.**
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-20250201?refcode=em20250201-1617&refcode2=1617_1088799_y5vA8F&akid=1617%2E1088799%2Ey5vA8F)
The Trump Administration acted unconstitutionally by trying to freeze trillions in critical federal funding for Americans for essential health, food, housing, disaster relief, public safety, education, and childcare services — but we’ve stopped him.
The Trump administration may not “pause, freeze, impede, block, cancel, or terminate” taxpayer money already allocated by Congress for the 22 states involved in this lawsuit, including California.
**This is a big win, but the fight isn’t over.** This case will go on and may potentially reach the U.S. Supreme Court, where one-third of justices were appointed by Trump during his first term.
**[We can’t let our guard down. I’m going to continue working on this lawsuit and doing everything in my power to stop Trump’s unlawful power grab. Will you pitch in $5 or more to keep our campaign fueled along the way?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-20250201?refcode=em20250201-1617&amount=5&refcode2=1617_1088799_y5vA8F&akid=1617%2E1088799%2Ey5vA8F)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-20250201?refcode=em20250201-1617&amount=5&refcode2=1617_1088799_y5vA8F&akid=1617%2E1088799%2Ey5vA8F)**
In solidarity,
Rob
* * *

name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: President Trump cannot pardon me in this case
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
body:
This final case is my path to vindication.
| [](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=09be263b1bbe426b99a56435724ae168&_e=fjrBSqIjOKvkv7rDb7AP1LEOvYPyBPTowiJ_2_pp9AYeo5as1wzldBfF8Fi9PC5v_t9SJ_Tc_2oIi6dR-tUIIMPdDsshlmyx7BvBIqptn_saPHD88EeYWddv8TSpFBceZMDNFG41R7-EpwSxmV0hVPAv7bcKR6dY9V5MvEaiUAwDvq2_RvgVlphYoTPTHnhNXqfVNYRVFicsZRZUUNA18jV6g9SO9W4Hw8Jb0UpsT-yquqz9HLYwlMTlf9EKhpcPWDDgs8zIkHVqC6qbtEN19wZS9wig3oNEnz7tMCkPhQSQpOE6updMtTIAeUDp1SZww889xwZzRAXsC3UC3pmDIhIaoFAWliZvCc8ISih_IUeyRmB1ugPNXfN8cDKqoRhD)
---
Fellow Patriot,
---
Please know this letter I’ve written you comes entirely from the heart...
---
I always knew the price I could one day pay for defending President Trump from one of the most vile witch hunts in American history. And like I’ve always said, it’s a fight I’d wage over and over again.
---
But even now, after President Trump resoundingly won back the White House and DEFEATED the Democrat Swap, __there are still Deep State holdouts hellbent on**JAILING** me for the rest of my life. __
---
**I face an outstanding _INDICTMENT_ in Arizona at the hands of the Left’s cronies and accomplices that is scheduled to go to trial. **
---
But I’ll tell you what: While this case means the Left is _still_ seeking to utterly ruin me, it also means I’m just _one final step_ away from VINDICATION!
---

name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: President Trump cannot pardon me in this case
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
body:
The President can only pardon in federal cases.

The President can only pardon in federal cases.
| [](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zu8nb84fl93fltv2u3eg6rp8aecnh8huq93ej768_rp22sh2s8i6epj0s5ie8pj0cdh2bs)
---
**_MEMO FROM RUDY W. GIULIANI_**
---
ATTN: Friend,
---
Some have wondered if a Presidential Pardon could save me in the Arizona witch hunt where Democrats are trying to put me in prison for the rest of my life.
---
_**Unfortunately, because the charges are at the _state_ level, President Trump cannot grant a federal pardon to save me.**_
---
After a brutal loss last November, Democrats are seeking revenge, and they’ve turned me into their political punching bag.
---
_If they can’t take down President Trump, then they’ll gladly settle for his former attorney – yours truly!_
---
**And now they believe they’ve finally got me backed into a corner in this pardon-proof Arizona criminal case.**
---
But what the Left doesn’t understand is that I’m not defenseless and all on my own. _I’ve got countless patriots just like you, Friend, standing right by my side._
---
Thanks to your support, I was able to SAVE my home! Thanks to your support, Fani Willis has been REMOVED from the witch hunt against me and President Trump in Georgia.
---
_**And with your support right now, I will be able to prevail in the FINAL case against me where the Democrats wrongly think I have no chance at survival!**_
---
[**So please, if you can, and truly only if you can, make a contribution to my Legal Defense Trust – the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund – so that I can win the FINAL BATTLE in this “pardon-proof” case against me.**](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2ze72cs4oh3aelpgc54oqddugdmun2bjbvlu58lgo_rp22sh2s8i6epj0s5ie8pj0cdh2bs)

name: Charlie Kirk
subject: My BIG plan
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Turning Point PAC, Inc
body:
Coming off the HUGE victories last November, I am ready to shift things into the next gear.

|
---
| | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z6iltdt35eijq3fnkjlmsqab41no76fel2l1u90o_rp22sh2s8i6epj0s5ie2o34cjh2bs)
Friend,

Coming off the HUGE victories last November, I am ready to shift things into the next gear. I have BIG plans for Turning Point PAC.

I want to personally invite you to be a part of it.

First, let’s recap what we achieved in 2024:
* Hispanic voters swung heavily toward Republicans and President Trump
* The youth vote (18-29) swung MAJORLY to President Trump.
* Republicans swept the White House, Senate, and Congress!

Our ballot chasers were on the ground, turning out voters. These were low-propensity voters, and we cracked the code to get them out to the polls.
[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zfsvo2bhodqr7gfsj5dp9qb4uucreflqcla1oj48_rp22sh2s8i6epj0s5ie2o34cjh2bs)
Here is my big plan:

**I want to fund ballot chasers on the ground, even in off-year elections. Our ground game is the best. I am confident we can continue to win key elections for years to come, not just presidential elections.**

To expand our ballot-chasing operations, I am looking to raise $78,000 before the end of the month. As a thank you for your support, my team will send you a Turning Point exclusive “47” hat for contributing $25 or more.

[Can you donate $25, $50, $100, $250, $500, or ANY amount you can generously afford today? Click here or the links below to donate.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z5g6eu7o8v1vn61f8uimh5a8gc4cs9j82dnliej0_rp22sh2s8i6epj0s5ie2o34cjh2bs)
[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zntllqvj08v3gnp4tcb35lg7eu69rj8pe215smo0_rp22sh2s8i6epj0s5ie2o34cjh2bs)
[Donate $25](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z341p8hca7ki99ugr8m49bt0oeaaliof3bluegqg_rp22sh2s8i6epj0s5ie2o34cjh2bs)

[Donate $50](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zmv8ke70prmqgbuoq2777sv3uo8kgcdh39p3euog_rp22sh2s8i6epj0s5ie2o34cjh2bs)

[Donate $100](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zp2r23n9d33nhu3mcoos5o2rpmiqmkpae66ne96g_rp22sh2s8i6epj0s5ie2o34cjh2bs)

[Donate $250](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zdi2ua2gdsb0ar091v9v28636ilifg19sis86n5g_rp22sh2s8i6epj0s5ie2o34cjh2bs)

[Donate $500](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zbaork57kol1i7r7sne3vkm27kd2nase3gemirq8_rp22sh2s8i6epj0s5ie2o34cjh2bs)

[Donate $1,000](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z8l7t5jaomgg75cfep4e7to7hhgmgvl39bff69t0_rp22sh2s8i6epj0s5ie2o34cjh2bs)

[Donate Any Amount](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zb2473576ip8cvuspipuq18eois46e4fpni2udb8_rp22sh2s8i6epj0s5ie2o34cjh2bs)
We have a proven concept.

We have momentum on our side.

Now, I am humbly asking for your support to expand our ballot-chasing operations this year. As a special thank you, I’ll send you one of our new “47” hats.

Thank you for everything,

Charlie Kirk
Turning Point PAC

Non-Contribution Account (For TTPAC, Inc.’s Expenditures Other Than Direct Contributions to Federal Committees)

As permitted by law, TTPAC, Inc. maintains a non-contribution account for the purpose of influencing federal, state, and local elections. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, address, occupation, and employer of individuals whose contribution exceeds $200 in an election cycle. For contributions from federal committees, corporations, and labor unions - regardless of contribution amount - federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the committee’s name and address. State and local law may require us to collect and report additional information.

Contributions to this account may be used to influence federal elections by making independent expenditures in support of or in opposition to federal candidates. Additionally, in state and local jurisdictions that permit non-individual type (e.g., corporate) contributions directly to candidates and/or committees, contributions to this account may be used for both independent expenditures and direct contributions to candidates and/or committees, as permitted by state and local law.

Individuals, federal committees, corporations, and labor unions may contribute to TTPAC, Inc.’s non-contribution account without limit. Contributions by national banks, foreign nationals (without lawful permanent resident status), and other foreign entities (e.g., foreign corporations) are prohibited. Contributions to TTPAC, Inc.’s non-contribution account are not tax deductible for federal income tax purposes. Paid for by Turning Point PAC, Inc. (www.tppac.com) and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

body:
Ensure our new majority knows YOUR priorities.

Friend,

We have two NEW Republican Senators!

**[In Ohio, Lieutenant Governor Jon Husted was appointed to fill Vice President JD Vance's seat and in Florida, state Attorney General Ashley Moody was appointed to replace Secretary of State Marco Rubio.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zft29lklu697vo78arevbodf66jjh30ds56d7n8g_rp22sh2s8i6epj0s5ie2o32cth2bs)**

With these two additions, our _NEW_ Senate majority is officially set until 2026!

name: John Pierce
subject: BREAKING: Pardoned J6 Patriots Are Being Held in Prison Right Now
body:
Patriot, the D.C. Swamp is holding 15 J6 prisoners in the horrifying D.C. jail and hiding J6 prisoner, Green Beret Jeremy Brown, even though President Trump pardoned them.

[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zvnsjp30gi90e1c90ue3h75dbaugsongsqq0qtj8_rp22sh2s8i6epj0s5ie2o31c5h2bs)

[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zb59ba76g47opcolfm0atv5cgckjahba2431jje0_rp22sh2s8i6epj0s5ie2o31c5h2bs) Dear Patriot,

**[Your crucial gift of a critically important $25, $50, $100 or more immediately will help us get justice for J6 prisoners!](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z3622po4gclca2jpcjas6k3jvdg0d7krprvtv7go_rp22sh2s8i6epj0s5ie2o31c5h2bs)**

It's absolutely crucial you read this urgent email. Here's why:

* The infamous D.C. gulag has refused to release 15 J6 prisoners
* J6 prisoner, Green Beret veteran Jeremy Brown, has been shipped to at least two different prisons. _And no one knows where he is_

**You and I know President Trump has pardoned these patriots. But the D.C. Swamp is fighting him tooth and nail!**

[ DONATE NOW ](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z4lvr7arne1bbpn14cjc46lld9inapl6p86fd6ng_rp22sh2s8i6epj0s5ie2o31c5h2bs)
If you're like me, you breathed a big sigh of relief when President Trump was sworn in.

And you rejoiced when he pardoned 1,500 J6 patriots!

**Because you and I know that even though the J6 prisoners are innocent, they 've been:**

* Hunted by Joe Biden's FBI
* Crushed by Joe Biden's DOJ
* Tortured by vicious jail guards
* and torn from their families for years.

J6 patriots have been abused, insulted, blocked from seeing their lawyers, clergy, and family ... blocked from getting urgently needed medical care ... and much, much worse.

Many conservative Americans thought once J6 patriots were pardoned, their long nightmare would end.

But it hasn't.

**Right now, 15 J6 prisoners are being held illegally in the evil D.C. jail. And Green Beret Jeremy Brown, who 's as brave as soldiers come, has disappeared somewhere in the US Prison system.**

[ DONATE NOW ](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z830l0096ruo9km3hghmuns5m33pbjeaf44vu8e0_rp22sh2s8i6epj0s5ie2o31c5h2bs)
But there's something you can do about it.

I'm John Pierce, founder of National Constitutional Law Union.

Right now, NCLU represents 50 clients who peacefully protested at the United States Capitol on January 6, 2021.

**I 'm proud to say President Trump has endorsed our legal fight for January 6 patriots. Because he knows we're beating Joe Biden's Department of Justice and FBI in case after case:**

We fought like devil dogs for our client, Kenneth Joseph Thomas, and WE WON!

Another January 6 client of ours, Dominic Pezzola, was found NOT GUILTY of committing seditious conspiracy.

**In fact, we 've defeated dozens of charges against our 50 January 6 clients so far!**

And while I can't tell you the details, I can tell you NCLU is working behind the scenes right now to free the 15 from the DC Gulag and get Jeremy Brown home.

[ DONATE NOW ](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zmadca7eurr9hq0uo5809vekbpcd47dgvuhmlp0g_rp22sh2s8i6epj0s5ie2o31c5h2bs)
While we're excited about our hard won victories, and President Trump's pardon of J6 prisoners, we know the D.C Swamp has only just begun to fight against President Trump and our J6 clients.

**You and I are up against what investigative reporter Lara Logan calls "the worst people in the world." And the stakes couldn't be higher.**

What's more, my law firm has an enormous number of new cases coming in.

We need more lawyers, paralegals, investigators and more to take our fight for J6 patriots to the next level.

And frankly, we're stretched to the absolute breaking point.

There's too much critical work to do, and not enough lawyers, paralegal, secretaries, and more to do it.

As you can imagine, our crucial legal work is very expensive and time consuming.

**[Patriot , please help NCLU fight for all J6 patriots with your crucial gift of $25, $50, $100 or more right now.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z17vlljd91bsdnvr91mjl2h6c3re73tuqmpqo020_rp22sh2s8i6epj0s5ie2o31c5h2bs)**

Don't miss out on helping these patriots get freed from prison!

Thank you!

In Vigilance,

John M. Pierce
Chairman and Founder
National Constitutional Law Union

**P.S. Patriot, the D.C. Swamp is holding 15 J6 prisoners in the horrifying D.C. jail and hiding J6 prisoner, Green Beret Jeremy Brown, even though President Trump pardoned them.** President Trump endorses NCLU because we beat Joe Biden's DOJ in court ... and because we FIGHT. And we must fight for J6 patriots now harder than ever.

**[Please help NCLU defend these innocent Americans with your critically important gift of at least a vital $25, $50, $100 or more IMMEDIATELY.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zsk4dk4s41fgpp5m8ftsfkt6t3eo0ov51i4rmgio_rp22sh2s8i6epj0s5ie2o31c5h2bs)** Thank you!

DONATIONS TO THE NCLU ARE NOT TAX-DEDUCTIBLE
THE NCLU IS A NON-PROFIT SOCIAL WELFARE ORGANIZATION THAT IS IN THE PROCESS OF APPLYING FOR 501(C)(4) TAX-EXEMPT STATUS. IT IS ANTICIPATED THAT A SUBSTANTIAL AMOUNT OF FUNDS RAISED BY THE NCLU WILL BE PAID TO A LAW FIRM OWNED AND/OR CONTROLLED BY THE FOUNDER, CHAIRMAN OF THE BOARD AND CEO OF THE NCLU FOR LEGAL SERVICES AND COSTS INCURRED BY CLIENTS OF THE FIRM IN CONNECTION WITH LITIGATIONS WITHIN THE FULL MISSION STATEMENT AS DETERMINED IN THE SOLE DISCRETION OF THE NCLU BOARD OF DIRECTORS AND AS APPROVED FOR PAYMENT BY THOSE CLIENTS.

What's more, my law firm has an enormous number of new cases coming in. We need more lawyers, paralegals, investigators and more to take our fight for J6 patriots to the next level. And frankly, we're stretched to the absolute breaking point. There's too much critical work to do, and not enough lawyers, paralegal, secretaries, and more to do it. As you can imagine, our crucial legal work is very expensive and time consuming. Don't miss out on helping these patriots get freed from prison! Thank you! In Vigilance, John M. Pierce Chairman and Founder National Constitutional Law Union P.S. Patriot, the D.C. Swamp is holding 15 J6 prisoners in the horrifying D.C. jail and hiding J6 prisoner, Green Beret Jeremy Brown, even though President Trump pardoned them. President Trump endorses NCLU because we beat Joe Biden's DOJ in court ... and because we FIGHT. And we must fight for J6 patriots now harder than ever. Thank you! DONATIONS TO THE NCLU ARE NOT TAX-DEDUCTIBLE THE NCLU IS A NON-PROFIT SOCIAL WELFARE ORGANIZATION THAT IS IN THE PROCESS OF APPLYING FOR 501(C)(4) TAX-EXEMPT STATUS. IT IS ANTICIPATED THAT A SUBSTANTIAL AMOUNT OF FUNDS RAISED BY THE NCLU WILL BE PAID TO A LAW FIRM OWNED AND/OR CONTROLLED BY THE FOUNDER, CHAIRMAN OF THE BOARD AND CEO OF THE NCLU FOR LEGAL SERVICES AND COSTS INCURRED BY CLIENTS OF THE FIRM IN CONNECTION WITH LITIGATIONS WITHIN THE FULL MISSION STATEMENT AS DETERMINED IN THE SOLE DISCRETION OF THE NCLU BOARD OF DIRECTORS AND AS APPROVED FOR PAYMENT BY THOSE CLIENTS. ICYMI News PO Box 1188 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

name: Tom Cotton
subject: It’s as simple as this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
here’s what I need from you

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zuuf3c6lqsdq41fgamkae1g4rj3u0bovphr5jsn8_rp22sh2s8i6epj0s5ie2o33c3h2bs)

It's as simple as this, friend.

Senate Democrats are blocking President Trump's nominees because they want four more years of Joe Biden's terrible policies.

They're spreading smears in hearings, lies in the liberal media, and slowing down the process in the Senate.

**[I've had _ENOUGH,_ friend. My message to these liberals is simple: We can do this the easy way, or the hard way -- and it looks like it's going to be the hard way.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zrpiblf3ro92ak8j32v1ubsp24upvnv3510m2do8_rp22sh2s8i6epj0s5ie2o33c3h2bs)**

Senate Democrats don't respect the will of the people, and they certainly don't want President Trump to have his team in place.

name: Charlie Kirk
subject: My BIG plan
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Turning Point PAC, Inc
body:
Coming off the HUGE victories last November, I am ready to shift things into the next gear.

|
---
| | [](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zhj31rb3kmo6e3n3hggvn1olr9ouimhk7fi6mdjg_rp22sh2s8i6epj0s5ie2p72cdh2bs)
Friend,

Coming off the HUGE victories last November, I am ready to shift things into the next gear. I have BIG plans for Turning Point PAC.

I want to personally invite you to be a part of it.

First, let’s recap what we achieved in 2024:
* Hispanic voters swung heavily toward Republicans and President Trump
* The youth vote (18-29) swung MAJORLY to President Trump.
* Republicans swept the White House, Senate, and Congress!

Our ballot chasers were on the ground, turning out voters. These were low-propensity voters, and we cracked the code to get them out to the polls.
[](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zhk4tgg2f77llru5pgre1t4bibs4meqlers4m7j0_rp22sh2s8i6epj0s5ie2p72cdh2bs)
Here is my big plan:

**I want to fund ballot chasers on the ground, even in off-year elections. Our ground game is the best. I am confident we can continue to win key elections for years to come, not just presidential elections.**

To expand our ballot-chasing operations, I am looking to raise $78,000 before the end of the month. As a thank you for your support, my team will send you a Turning Point exclusive “47” hat for contributing $25 or more.

[Can you donate $25, $50, $100, $250, $500, or ANY amount you can generously afford today? Click here or the links below to donate.](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z08ocpat8avtii3dfr18flk4ljaeb811bfakukdg_rp22sh2s8i6epj0s5ie2p72cdh2bs)
[](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z3pmd1e3l70m6c4c1vbsftbna3ri0ombuvos2v8g_rp22sh2s8i6epj0s5ie2p72cdh2bs)
[Donate $25](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zj55q2bodv57envq7uskn0u7mqhn9rgkmanjn1r0_rp22sh2s8i6epj0s5ie2p72cdh2bs)

[Donate $50](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zleooqdve8mf866l5tqinkp9to48s1594dviq3dg_rp22sh2s8i6epj0s5ie2p72cdh2bs)

[Donate $100](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zj0hnjo6h7nck4r5vl9ga5cbsfo8cau1kff5q22g_rp22sh2s8i6epj0s5ie2p72cdh2bs)

[Donate $250](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2za9q6pn2o6baqisj9hde7tlnam6p46se1o87kbeo_rp22sh2s8i6epj0s5ie2p72cdh2bs)

[Donate $500](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z41dhbr93lbgcilc9jfnu1mpaju9a47qo0je7vk8_rp22sh2s8i6epj0s5ie2p72cdh2bs)

[Donate $1,000](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z53daukj8e57g9a4qhlm8q23j2tqqau8pnkqbtpg_rp22sh2s8i6epj0s5ie2p72cdh2bs)

[Donate Any Amount](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zfsm8dmd8g0arg9ckk49blir2j5064hs9glglqp8_rp22sh2s8i6epj0s5ie2p72cdh2bs)
We have a proven concept.

We have momentum on our side.

Now, I am humbly asking for your support to expand our ballot-chasing operations this year. As a special thank you, I’ll send you one of our new “47” hats.

Thank you for everything,

Charlie Kirk
Turning Point PAC

Non-Contribution Account (For TTPAC, Inc.’s Expenditures Other Than Direct Contributions to Federal Committees)

As permitted by law, TTPAC, Inc. maintains a non-contribution account for the purpose of influencing federal, state, and local elections. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, address, occupation, and employer of individuals whose contribution exceeds $200 in an election cycle. For contributions from federal committees, corporations, and labor unions - regardless of contribution amount - federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the committee’s name and address. State and local law may require us to collect and report additional information.

Contributions to this account may be used to influence federal elections by making independent expenditures in support of or in opposition to federal candidates. Additionally, in state and local jurisdictions that permit non-individual type (e.g., corporate) contributions directly to candidates and/or committees, contributions to this account may be used for both independent expenditures and direct contributions to candidates and/or committees, as permitted by state and local law.

Individuals, federal committees, corporations, and labor unions may contribute to TTPAC, Inc.’s non-contribution account without limit. Contributions by national banks, foreign nationals (without lawful permanent resident status), and other foreign entities (e.g., foreign corporations) are prohibited. Contributions to TTPAC, Inc.’s non-contribution account are not tax deductible for federal income tax purposes. Paid for by Turning Point PAC, Inc. name: Charlie Kirk
subject: My BIG plan
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Turning Point PAC, Inc
body:
Coming off the HUGE victories last November, I am ready to shift things into the next gear.

|
---
| | [](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zbt5hq5h94j6obnevfi8klcarssm4r0a7g9phk3o_rp22sh2s8i6epj0s5ie6pr2c5h2bs)
Friend,

Coming off the HUGE victories last November, I am ready to shift things into the next gear. I have BIG plans for Turning Point PAC.

I want to personally invite you to be a part of it.

First, let’s recap what we achieved in 2024:
* Hispanic voters swung heavily toward Republicans and President Trump
* The youth vote (18-29) swung MAJORLY to President Trump.
* Republicans swept the White House, Senate, and Congress!

Our ballot chasers were on the ground, turning out voters. These were low-propensity voters, and we cracked the code to get them out to the polls.
[](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2z1f1gbsg1f3efq40js1tjlecit0o48ts7iurvogo_rp22sh2s8i6epj0s5ie6pr2c5h2bs)
Here is my big plan:

**I want to fund ballot chasers on the ground, even in off-year elections. Our ground game is the best. I am confident we can continue to win key elections for years to come, not just presidential elections.**

To expand our ballot-chasing operations, I am looking to raise $78,000 before the end of the month. As a thank you for your support, my team will send you a Turning Point exclusive “47” hat for contributing $25 or more.

[Can you donate $25, $50, $100, $250, $500, or ANY amount you can generously afford today? Click here or the links below to donate.](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zoinhenq2f077265a4bgdid3ce20287c3ockej0o_rp22sh2s8i6epj0s5ie6pr2c5h2bs)

[Donate $1,000](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2z7uga2cpcchfsjin38u8gu02ivjpnuq8p8huilrg_rp22sh2s8i6epj0s5ie6pr2c5h2bs)

We have a proven concept.

We have momentum on our side.

Now, I am humbly asking for your support to expand our ballot-chasing operations this year. As a special thank you, I’ll send you one of our new “47” hats.

Charlie Kirk

name: Priority GOP Communication [From House GOP]
subject: America’s Golden Age IN JEOPARDY.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
We really wish we had better news to deliver...

| |
---
| | | **America 's Golden Age IN JEOPARDY.**

We really wish we had better news to deliver, Friend...

As of 12:01 AM we fell about 9% SHORT of our first budgetary goal of 2025. **And now we 're bracing ourselves because the Radical Democrats will pounce and exploit our failure for everything it's worth. **

_It 's the worst possible scenario at the worst possible time. _

Our ENTIRE House Majority is on the line and the Democrats are ready to dismantle it the first chance they get.

In the past few weeks they have already:

**1)** Unleashed a 10 MILLION DOLLAR smear campaign against Republicans

**2)** Made a list of our 29 MOST VULNERABLE Conservatives to knock off

**3)** And created a 50 MILLION DOLLAR slush fund to 'Trump-proof' an entire state

Now we've come up short... And left ourselves vulnerable and defenseless - so we have no choice but to ask every Patriot to pitch in and help us out:
| | [PITCH IN NOW](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zqm1sg6s5oc2l3d186fllbuufpj5a3av4npi60k0_rp22sh2s8i6epj0s5ieeor6cph2bs "PITCH IN NOW")
---

**We wouldn 't be coming to you if we didn't have to - you know that. **But we're desperately asking you to help us catch up before today is over.

_**[So please- if there ever was a time to show your unwavering support for our mission, it's now.](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zakkqm0mnblfo95nvv7hctl3s6akrek26uf852bo_rp22sh2s8i6epj0s5ieeor6cph2bs "So please – if there ever was a time to show your unwavering support for our mission, it’s now.")**_
| [PITCH IN NOW](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zoqnpkje0a4glg8667baevsoj9t2nrj4005tli10_rp22sh2s8i6epj0s5ieeor6cph2bs "PITCH IN NOW")
---

Thank you,

House GOP

---
| |
* * *
---
| [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zntpssoo9t6j0dgep8qgsrf07e8vtkal026e2s48_rp22sh2s8i6epj0s5ieeor6cph2bs "Majority Leader Survey")
---

_A personal note from Majority Leader Steve Scalise:_

I'm humbled to announce that I am your new House Majority Leader. My first order of business is checking in with our best supporters, so I just launched my new** MAJORITY LEADER SURVEY** for that specific reason.

_**[I'd be honored to get your unfiltered thoughts, feedback, and opinions using this secure link.](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zk8b8309s93503qm3a0ue9at64n9rko8r46164qg_rp22sh2s8i6epj0s5ieeor6cph2bs "I’d be honored to get your unfiltered thoughts, feedback, and opinions using this secure link.")**_
---
| | | [RESPOND NOW ->](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zmqcp1epu13rac9vk7ji4e7h3f76vana1v36rig8_rp22sh2s8i6epj0s5ieeor6cph2bs "RESPOND NOW →")
---
Thank you,

Steve Scalise
_House Majority Leader_

name: APL
subject: The Dems are standing on my doormat.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ANNA PAULINA LUNA FOR CONGRESS
body:
Democrats are crossing names off their HIT LIST!

| | | | **MESSAGE FROM ANNA PAULINA LUNA:**
---
_**The Dem establishment is standing on my doormat.**_
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z6ktpja41nsngklj1f95a08id21gvuftbsqtrn50_rp22sh2s8i6epj0s5ieeor6cph2bs)

Patriot, this is Anna Paulina Luna, and let me tell you something—they hate what we stand for.

Conservative veterans like myself and Pete Hegseth are under **VICIOUS** attack because we refuse to bow to their woke, America-**LAST** agenda.
Since Pete Hegseth’s brutal nomination process, I’ve become #1 on the radical left’s target list and I need some serious supporters.

In my short time in Congress, I’ve shaken up the swamp—fighting to **CRUSH** the corruption destroying our nation.

As a proud Air Force veteran and daughter of a single mom, I’ve earned my stripes through service and grit—not by playing D.C.’s dirty games.

That’s why the Radical Left sees me as one of their biggest threats—and if I’m going to keep fighting, I’ll need your help.
**I’ll be frank, I’m just $11,349 away from reaching my end of month goal.**
Could I ask for your helping hand today with a small donation to ensure we can **HOLD** the majority?
[If everyone reading this chipped-in, we can get this done. I’m counting on you.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z8d2ik9pl4nub7q7883focddlbk7kcv08jbefme0_rp22sh2s8i6epj0s5ieeor6cph2bs)

[PLEASE STAND WITH ME](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zumqbat59eebo91cdvc6hr86u5uk1k4d4mf1md50_rp22sh2s8i6epj0s5ieeor6cph2bs)

Thank you & God Bless,
Anna Paulina Luna
|

name: Charlie Kirk, TPUSA
subject: I want to send you a “47” hat
body:
What an honor to welcome President DONALD TRUMP as the keynote speaker at Turning Point’s AMERICAFEST, the biggest and boldest celebration of our country and our freedoms!

| | | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zl8qu3un15ptjg9p968op82hs61c4a7na23og5vg_rp22sh2s8i6epj0s5ieeor6cph2bs)
---
Fellow American, What an honor to welcome President DONALD TRUMP as the keynote speaker at Turning Point's AMERICAFEST, the biggest and boldest celebration of our country and our freedoms! Fellow American, thanks to YOU, thousands of young people have been inspired by the President's message of FREEDOM, PATRIOTISM, and AMERICAN GREATNESS... **... and the Turning Point Generation -- as I call these high school and college students -- are leading MASSIVE GENERATIONAL CHANGE among young people.**
---
[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zqb60fe38nnm4e8j3549fgvojire9udfbe2jun7g_rp22sh2s8i6epj0s5ieeor6cph2bs)
---

| | | _**We 're not quite sure how to break the news to you...

Here goes nothing: **_

**[Friend, we missed our shot at saving our America First values from the woke ideology of the Left. We were THOUSANDS of dollars short of our crucial January goal.](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zctvcjjue22v22ckkg37uoa96uq1uj0qvubqap38_rp22sh2s8i6epj0s5ie1pb2cth2bs "Friend, we missed our shot at saving our America First values from the woke ideology of the Left. We were THOUSANDS of dollars short of our crucial January goal.") **By missing this first major goal, we're in big trouble.

**But we 're reaching out to you today with a glimmer of hope.**

Luckily, we were able to secure an extension on our deadline to try and make up for our shortcomings. _But we don 't have too much time to recover._ We MUST act fast if we have any chance of getting back from this.

body:
We really wish we had better news to deliver...

| |
---
| | | **America 's Golden Age IN JEOPARDY.**

We really wish we had better news to deliver, Friend...

As of 12:01 AM we fell about 9% SHORT of our first budgetary goal of 2025. **And now we 're bracing ourselves because the Radical Democrats will pounce and exploit our failure for everything it's worth. **

_It 's the worst possible scenario at the worst possible time. _

Our ENTIRE House Majority is on the line and the Democrats are ready to dismantle it the first chance they get.

In the past few weeks they have already:

**1)** Unleashed a 10 MILLION DOLLAR smear campaign against Republicans

**2)** Made a list of our 29 MOST VULNERABLE Conservatives to knock off

**3)** And created a 50 MILLION DOLLAR slush fund to 'Trump-proof' an entire state

Now we've come up short... And left ourselves vulnerable and defenseless - so we have no choice but to ask every Patriot to pitch in and help us out:
| | [PITCH IN NOW](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zjs2s01i4quefv78633rdggjivmo3pip10pgraqg_rp22sh2s8i6epj0slg68oj4chh2bs "PITCH IN NOW")
---

**We wouldn 't be coming to you if we didn't have to - you know that. **But we're desperately asking you to help us catch up before today is over.

_**[So please- if there ever was a time to show your unwavering support for our mission, it's now.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zdr5j73holp057qlk7uij68gttvilddq5epve5eo_rp22sh2s8i6epj0slg68oj4chh2bs "So please – if there ever was a time to show your unwavering support for our mission, it’s now.")**_
| [PITCH IN NOW](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z7j1jvno60lfc7pgsmpug4dalur7lk7buf06hbio_rp22sh2s8i6epj0slg68oj4chh2bs "PITCH IN NOW")
---

Thank you,

House GOP

---
| |
* * *
---
| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z4pjau7kr7mu6388slo3po15o7lke705ree6vheo_rp22sh2s8i6epj0slg68oj4chh2bs "Majority Leader Survey")
---

_A personal note from Majority Leader Steve Scalise:_

I'm humbled to announce that I am your new House Majority Leader. My first order of business is checking in with our best supporters, so I just launched my new** MAJORITY LEADER SURVEY** for that specific reason.

_**[I'd be honored to get your unfiltered thoughts, feedback, and opinions using this secure link.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zrccv6pcfqd4qs5rstimg33b6jr8kut949h0pdq0_rp22sh2s8i6epj0slg68oj4chh2bs "I’d be honored to get your unfiltered thoughts, feedback, and opinions using this secure link.")**_
---
| | | [RESPOND NOW ->](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zr20kg2ja2kgib4e05m67csh44dec7belttokgv8_rp22sh2s8i6epj0slg68oj4chh2bs "RESPOND NOW →")
---
Thank you,

Steve Scalise
_House Majority Leader_

name: Priority GOP Communication [From House GOP]
subject: America’s Golden Age IN JEOPARDY.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
We really wish we had better news to deliver...

| |
---
| | | **America 's Golden Age IN JEOPARDY.**

We really wish we had better news to deliver, Friend...

As of 12:01 AM we fell about 9% SHORT of our first budgetary goal of 2025. **And now we 're bracing ourselves because the Radical Democrats will pounce and exploit our failure for everything it's worth. **

_It 's the worst possible scenario at the worst possible time. _

Our ENTIRE House Majority is on the line and the Democrats are ready to dismantle it the first chance they get.

In the past few weeks they have already:

**1)** Unleashed a 10 MILLION DOLLAR smear campaign against Republicans

**2)** Made a list of our 29 MOST VULNERABLE Conservatives to knock off

**3)** And created a 50 MILLION DOLLAR slush fund to 'Trump-proof' an entire state

Now we've come up short... And left ourselves vulnerable and defenseless - so we have no choice but to ask every Patriot to pitch in and help us out:
| | [PITCH IN NOW](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zcq8of9jd2nha63ktbblbd9if9g3be8h6iqj8t0o_rp22sh2s8i6epj0slg62o74c9h2bs "PITCH IN NOW")
---

**We wouldn 't be coming to you if we didn't have to - you know that. **But we're desperately asking you to help us catch up before today is over.

_**[So please- if there ever was a time to show your unwavering support for our mission, it's now.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zms1cau7gn7hq2us8q2j3oebgstm5elqivgfuh9o_rp22sh2s8i6epj0slg62o74c9h2bs "So please – if there ever was a time to show your unwavering support for our mission, it’s now.")**_
| [PITCH IN NOW](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z2bp860ojd3onom44jr57tqhj1jak0709qoc6m08_rp22sh2s8i6epj0slg62o74c9h2bs "PITCH IN NOW")
---

Thank you,

House GOP

---
| |
* * *
---
| [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z13blmovtn55p8bj9dok6599n7eq1rdvrec0eeng_rp22sh2s8i6epj0slg62o74c9h2bs "Majority Leader Survey")
---

_A personal note from Majority Leader Steve Scalise:_

I'm humbled to announce that I am your new House Majority Leader. My first order of business is checking in with our best supporters, so I just launched my new** MAJORITY LEADER SURVEY** for that specific reason.

_**[I'd be honored to get your unfiltered thoughts, feedback, and opinions using this secure link.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z9ve4j38s4q6d39geppchk3fd1pjifblo39vl9ug_rp22sh2s8i6epj0slg62o74c9h2bs "I’d be honored to get your unfiltered thoughts, feedback, and opinions using this secure link.")**_
---
| | | [RESPOND NOW ->](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zu9kad2l294v0g9v9o1v0fg9l5vidn0kd7ahtjm8_rp22sh2s8i6epj0slg62o74c9h2bs "RESPOND NOW →")
---
Thank you,

Steve Scalise
_House Majority Leader_
