name: No Dem Left Behind PAC
subject: Trump's Dangerous Imperialist Agenda
body:
The candidate who was going to "end wars" has not ruled out using military force against our own allies...
| | | | | | [](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2wak17-umuj1a-kyd76rh7/)
---
# **Trump's Dangerous Imperialist Agenda**
---
|
---
| | | | Hello friend, our power right now is our microphone. We need to call this out before it's too late. Donald Trump is already laying the groundwork for his presidency to be defined by imperialism and reckless aggression. After months on the campaign trail promising that he was going to "end wars," he openly refused to rule out using military force to seize the Panama Canal and Greenland, claiming they are “vital to American national security.” **This is not just another one of Trump’s outlandish statements** —it’s a direct rejection of decades of U.S. policy that champions self-determination over territorial conquest. Trump’s approach mirrors the dangerous attitudes of past empires, prioritizing expansion and control over global cooperation and respect for sovereignty. **Let’s be clear:** Greenland is an autonomous territory of Denmark, a NATO ally. The Panama Canal has been under Panamanian control for over 25 years, a symbol of their hard-fought sovereignty. Trump’s threats undermine relationships with trusted allies, jeopardize our national security, and disrespect the people of these nations. This isn’t about protecting America—it’s about fulfilling Trump’s authoritarian fantasies. From calling for NATO countries to double their defense spending to suggesting Canada join the U.S. as a 51st state, Trump’s rhetoric reflects a dangerous, imperialist agenda. The stakes couldn’t be higher. Trump is not just endangering America’s alliances—he’s also threatening global stability. The last thing we need is to alienate our closest partners or provoke unnecessary conflict. [**_Now is the time to stand against this imperialist agenda and demand accountability from those enabling him. Let’s make it clear: America’s strength lies in its alliances, not in reckless domination. Join us in fighting back against Trump’s dangerous policies before it’s too late._**](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2wak17-umuj1b-kyd76rh8/)

We need to call this out before it's too late. Donald Trump is already laying the groundwork for his presidency to be defined by imperialism and reckless aggression. After months on the campaign trail promising that he was going to "end wars," he openly refused to rule out using military force to seize the Panama Canal and Greenland, claiming they are “vital to American national security.” This is not just another one of Trump’s outlandish statements —it’s a direct rejection of decades of U.S. policy that champions self-determination over territorial conquest. Trump’s approach mirrors the dangerous attitudes of past empires, prioritizing expansion and control over global cooperation and respect for sovereignty. Let’s be clear: Greenland is an autonomous territory of Denmark, a NATO ally. The Panama Canal has been under Panamanian control for over 25 years, a symbol of their hard-fought sovereignty. name: Indivisible Team (via LeftAction)
subject: Sign: Stand up against Trump’s authoritarian overreach
body:
| | | | |
---
| | | | | Friend, You’re probably hearing a lot about Donald Trump’s latest attack on children and immigrants — and rightfully so. On his first day in office, he signed an executive order to end birthright citizenship, an unprecedented and unconstitutional move targeting children born in the United States. This act, which directly undermines the 14th Amendment, seeks to deny citizenship to certain newborns, creating a generation of stateless children. It is a clear and calculated attack designed to advance Trump’s anti-immigrant agenda while flouting the fundamental principles of equality and justice that define America As states file lawsuits to challenge this unconstitutional and blatantly illegal executive order, there’s something you can do to help. [**Indivisible is mobilizing supporters to condemn Trump’s attack on children. If you’re with us, add your name to join the community of people speaking out.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T52a11ce4-cb87-4eee-bf3a-3ff83d1a7c71/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | | [ADD YOUR NAME >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tbb57aaed-10b6-4143-8f19-a5a2e0dc9d03/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | To make matters worse, the order likely also applies to children born in the U.S. while their parents were under a number of temporary legal statuses, including student visa holders, DACA recipients, or work visa holders. Kamala Harris wouldn’t qualify for citizenship if this were in place when she was born. It deepens inequality and emboldens MAGA by targeting immigrant families, weaponizing fear and xenophobia, and turning newborns into political pawns, threatening to destabilize communities, impose significant legal and financial burdens on families, and open the door to further erosion of constitutional rights. **It’s clear: This is not just an attack on immigrants — it’s an attack on the Constitution itself. We must fight back.** We’ve known from the start that Trump would quickly overreach, and now that he has — on day one no less — it’s up to us to help drive backlash. [**If you agree that cruel and inhumane policies like this one have no place in our politics, add your name to stand up to Trump’s overreach and help defend our rights, our neighbors, and our Constitution.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T583ec450-cbd3-4cff-82fe-e0638731c129/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) This is a fight we can and must win. Indivisible Team
---
| | |
---

* Follow us on [Facebook](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb47a9bbb-c996-421f-aeef-6f08b45bffec/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) and [Twitter](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tfb3f09cd-833f-4642-b71e-5d7719bb5817/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
* [Go here for more actions you can take](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9e73fed5-81c1-4276-97c2-02894f0fdc81/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

## [Air traffic supervisor allowed an employee to leave shift early on day of fatal plane crash: Report](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/mAiRQJkXa_5wyYGqeLUpnA~~/AAVLBhA~/g5_qzAQ4QVSpAQ7k_yYCiu6A54c_vR_JxIWgBR2HW-Ob8YEo-pucTCSPBUl36kbnGi-nkVt7ez46kh4YsYeg-9MBd4UOqvuUQEQVkjeIA4dHsuSDKWCMkWIngM_4-1zg_ec4gEZJ5nZwjv-kupGzaXYkkJ4uVSofaVgzLwIYX6ABuYNPqbzqp4FybhwBhTxKrqhvHtI5vazFvCX8T-EuzVsYjkOo_03-whiD_BMR_iTFm9gVIQi1C_9JgDOwYu6MnMk53ve9ScHno122Y9b6gfL_3HbIBLzStkQjvCwws7Gz_74NHAajJ6QePLvN2Sps4YZjsi21jzhqx1qh1Wr1tw~~)
An air traffic control supervisor allowed an employee on Wednesday to leave their shift early, which meant another controller allegedly handled two jobs on the day of the fatal plane collision at Ronald Reagan Washington National Airport, [NBC News reported](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/s2coaGCMaGzJ2wvqs6krUw~~/AAVLBhA~/Rym9pcYZb4zMFGK69AIzQXCmA6C99kv_Q9s8MMerxEhzkPCVY5cf5Wdwigg446sLWMcN3id_tlc5D1Y-A2gjhG2QXptXyxPgZkbR6D3Re5CjbuQ5gDdMfVyR55glWxvCHRScfRo41CbW1IZAU_KLpsxKBLrPC0U1dZ596ouKMgZpyHy0gUyF9pZM0ONFwIfYuCSwtpf_aGkKVMnLZmNvsQ~~) Friday.

name: Tom Cotton
subject: It’s as simple as this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
here’s what I need from you

[](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/ViDKRYZCY7LhapUsQD_KjQ~~/AARclBA~/Or0tPwnvvntrYuaaM5whPF9PRl4ewT0IIRZPK9G_RfMmRQWsj2eKA4msEXs47Tf-sjUF-8b84sDXRffKIhpenGxU5SDTI95hrF8EcyF4BN4w1PBVg_CTEteZEZ6oe9S2GIIv7z_0YUuzPdC5DWZnHhNDkwF7Ytk6_jmiJPxgPi4yx3iNmiJsjAFjUK4Si_2HODz4c16v1omX6mRUUzqhA2OP8GVkWWFqJZrDUpI1GLhXayPtiipDGuKalzb1eSAJiqOHlnNUelQSy5ZCIvT2C1cRMxfnww5h9z4umW_JqsKOlNkhFmU8xGhomCL0RKq2mS6gKxxFuo7s5Kk5xgzL-Zd49hK_FkJrSD_cOLlf1NA~)

It's as simple as this, friend.

Senate Democrats are blocking President Trump's nominees because they want four more years of Joe Biden's terrible policies.

They're spreading smears in hearings, lies in the liberal media, and slowing down the process in the Senate.

**[I've had _ENOUGH,_ friend. My message to these liberals is simple: We can do this the easy way, or the hard way -- and it looks like it's going to be the hard way.](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/ViDKRYZCY7LhapUsQD_KjQ~~/AARclBA~/Or0tPwnvvntrYuaaM5whPF9PRl4ewT0IIRZPK9G_RfMmRQWsj2eKA4msEXs47Tf-sjUF-8b84sDXRffKIhpenGxU5SDTI95hrF8EcyF4BN4w1PBVg_CTEteZEZ6oe9S2GIIv7z_0YUuzPdC5DWZnHhNDkwF7Ytk6_jmiJPxgPi4yx3iNmiJsjAFjUK4Si_2HODz4c16v1omX6mRUUzqhA2OP8GVkWWFqJZrDUpI1GLhXayPtiipDGuKalzb1eSAJiqOHlnNUelQSy5ZCIvT2C1cRMxfnww5h9z4umW_JqsKOlNkhFmU8xGhomCL0RKq2mS6gKxxFuo7s5Kk5xgzL-Zd49hK_FkJrSD_cOLlf1NA~)**

**[I'm asking every patriot in your area to help me reinforce the message and flood Senate Democrats with millions of signatures.](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/ViDKRYZCY7LhapUsQD_KjQ~~/AARclBA~/Or0tPwnvvntrYuaaM5whPF9PRl4ewT0IIRZPK9G_RfMmRQWsj2eKA4msEXs47Tf-sjUF-8b84sDXRffKIhpenGxU5SDTI95hrF8EcyF4BN4w1PBVg_CTEteZEZ6oe9S2GIIv7z_0YUuzPdC5DWZnHhNDkwF7Ytk6_jmiJPxgPi4yx3iNmiJsjAFjUK4Si_2HODz4c16v1omX6mRUUzqhA2OP8GVkWWFqJZrDUpI1GLhXayPtiipDGuKalzb1eSAJiqOHlnNUelQSy5ZCIvT2C1cRMxfnww5h9z4umW_JqsKOlNkhFmU8xGhomCL0RKq2mS6gKxxFuo7s5Kk5xgzL-Zd49hK_FkJrSD_cOLlf1NA~)**

Senate Democrats don't respect the will of the people, and they certainly don't want President Trump to have his team in place.

The only way to stop their games is to mount an unprecedented pressure campaign.

**[So, please, add your name to my petition calling for ALL of President Trump's nominees to be confirmed ASAP. >>](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/ViDKRYZCY7LhapUsQD_KjQ~~/AARclBA~/Or0tPwnvvntrYuaaM5whPF9PRl4ewT0IIRZPK9G_RfMmRQWsj2eKA4msEXs47Tf-sjUF-8b84sDXRffKIhpenGxU5SDTI95hrF8EcyF4BN4w1PBVg_CTEteZEZ6oe9S2GIIv7z_0YUuzPdC5DWZnHhNDkwF7Ytk6_jmiJPxgPi4yx3iNmiJsjAFjUK4Si_2HODz4c16v1omX6mRUUzqhA2OP8GVkWWFqJZrDUpI1GLhXayPtiipDGuKalzb1eSAJiqOHlnNUelQSy5ZCIvT2C1cRMxfnww5h9z4umW_JqsKOlNkhFmU8xGhomCL0RKq2mS6gKxxFuo7s5Kk5xgzL-Zd49hK_FkJrSD_cOLlf1NA~)**

******************************************************[CONFIRM TRUMP'S TEAM: ADD YOUR NAME](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/ViDKRYZCY7LhapUsQD_KjQ~~/AARclBA~/Or0tPwnvvntrYuaaM5whPF9PRl4ewT0IIRZPK9G_RfMmRQWsj2eKA4msEXs47Tf-sjUF-8b84sDXRffKIhpenGxU5SDTI95hrF8EcyF4BN4w1PBVg_CTEteZEZ6oe9S2GIIv7z_0YUuzPdC5DWZnHhNDkwF7Ytk6_jmiJPxgPi4yx3iNmiJsjAFjUK4Si_2HODz4c16v1omX6mRUUzqhA2OP8GVkWWFqJZrDUpI1GLhXayPtiipDGuKalzb1eSAJiqOHlnNUelQSy5ZCIvT2C1cRMxfnww5h9z4umW_JqsKOlNkhFmU8xGhomCL0RKq2mS6gKxxFuo7s5Kk5xgzL-Zd49hK_FkJrSD_cOLlf1NA~)******************************************************

subject: America’s Golden Age IN JEOPARDY.

body:
We really wish we had better news to deliver...

| |
---
| | | **America 's Golden Age IN JEOPARDY.**

We really wish we had better news to deliver, Friend...

As of 12:01 AM we fell about 9% SHORT of our first budgetary goal of 2025. **And now we 're bracing ourselves because the Radical Democrats will pounce and exploit our failure for everything it's worth. **

_It 's the worst possible scenario at the worst possible time. _

Our ENTIRE House Majority is on the line and the Democrats are ready to dismantle it the first chance they get.

In the past few weeks they have already:

**1)** Unleashed a 10 MILLION DOLLAR smear campaign against Republicans

**2)** Made a list of our 29 MOST VULNERABLE Conservatives to knock off

**3)** And created a 50 MILLION DOLLAR slush fund to 'Trump-proof' an entire state

Now we've come up short... And left ourselves vulnerable and defenseless - so we have no choice but to ask every Patriot to pitch in and help us out:

"So please – if there ever was a time to show your unwavering support for our mission, it’s now." | "PITCH IN NOW" Thank you, House GOP | | | "Majority Leader Survey" A personal note from Majority Leader Steve Scalise: I'm humbled to announce that I am your new House Majority Leader. My first order of business is checking in with our best supporters, so I just launched my new MAJORITY LEADER SURVEY for that specific reason. "I’d be honored to get your unfiltered thoughts, feedback, and opinions using this secure link."** | | | "RESPOND NOW →" Thank you, Steve Scalise House Majority Leader | Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC. Team Scalise is committed to restoring a Conservative House majority and electing Conservatives across the country. Thank you for being a part of our movement. This message was sentbecause you are a member of the Team Scalise Conservative grassroots network. Contributions to TEAM SCALISE, or any participating committee, are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, national banks, labor unions, foreign nationals without "green cards," and federal government contractors are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and employer of each individual who contributes over $200 in a calendar year. Defend the Constitution PO Box 1188 Fort Collins, CO 80522 | _

name: Charlie Kirk
subject: My BIG plan
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Turning Point PAC, Inc
body:
Coming off the HUGE victories last November, I am ready to shift things into the next gear.

|
---
| | [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/s/c/Wn7VvMw1GgTYLqcXmJJehCS14ZVf1-CkGp2NSMn0oi4zjn8XpZ9hvEmAn3TuEEWZDEbEhO-ezHGPkPaPpz-BYP-vU7A-AgOQykTl0Xj9deuhXSYXZ9mFjfnXhSS7rFSdyO_Bmh_JJ_LvT9jKyFCHavj3MYC9mzzWvCfUrCzc1v0FiorduhjGPLmyFVxq1JpyhEMlDRGPV8l5Lsrn4xrg5ZzCyD6qhjmTdUhHRbnpNAI3JLWPH2LMycpl545-ak1e_o1Qe7A1MlVrWh-3wJBtUNiS0vgIvydVfmmZ-UXUjTrph2jANllR5Ntcd5UYbUSMDNSklN3wAh23pRIc/meg2aZro7ANT-CBtOR8GLbeygGRGZP8A/5)
Friend,

Coming off the HUGE victories last November, I am ready to shift things into the next gear. I have BIG plans for Turning Point PAC.

I want to personally invite you to be a part of it.

First, let’s recap what we achieved in 2024:
* Hispanic voters swung heavily toward Republicans and President Trump
* The youth vote (18-29) swung MAJORLY to President Trump.
* Republicans swept the White House, Senate, and Congress!

Our ballot chasers were on the ground, turning out voters. These were low-propensity voters, and we cracked the code to get them out to the polls.
[](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/s/c/SRFIYmdli8SJ0VWA0_-Ej7WyCoAaDiTI1olj2xXxy1cWssUBivdVybtTogkLZY1DyGziHGuAU0uIgIhE8UhA7Y420pX40dCq7Lns9VmWBP-8reZ79OQh-g-OgSmz5SdsLvYDH9ZL5HuQ8A6HcfGnz1rNRSw_cOAuTpD9TgP5kUQY2TzrbsHG494s__u-105z7yLnB_HSj2yZ2e3bg_jcs1w9lTQFZ1_qc21GVBu-pzsuvoLW2srG9Fo0HCzty2Rx7ZLEk-4xGwpqcD2xHdRAfE-L5jUaS9HUVk79RRCu9vmlTvNUTEyUEMgozCHUZ-pGOCGwKvLKPLBq1tHT/cvcgk4H-Xcx0870mKBHt6KxxNqSNHW2r/5)
Here is my big plan:

**I want to fund ballot chasers on the ground, even in off-year elections. Our ground game is the best. I am confident we can continue to win key elections for years to come, not just presidential elections.**

To expand our ballot-chasing operations, I am looking to raise $78,000 before the end of the month. As a thank you for your support, my team will send you a Turning Point exclusive “47” hat for contributing $25 or more.

[Can you donate $25, $50, $100, $250, $500, or ANY amount you can generously afford today? Non-Contribution Account (For TTPAC, Inc.’s Expenditures Other Than Direct Contributions to Federal Committees)

As permitted by law, TTPAC, Inc. maintains a non-contribution account for the purpose of influencing federal, state, and local elections. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, address, occupation, and employer of individuals whose contribution exceeds $200 in an election cycle. State and local law may require us to collect and report additional information.

Contributions to this account may be used to influence federal elections by making independent expenditures in support of or in opposition to federal candidates. Additionally, in state and local jurisdictions that permit non-individual type (e.g., corporate) contributions directly to candidates and/or committees, contributions to this account may be used for both independent expenditures and direct contributions to candidates and/or committees, as permitted by state and local law.

Individuals, federal committees, corporations, and labor unions may contribute to TTPAC, Inc.’s non-contribution account without limit. Contributions by national banks, foreign nationals (without lawful permanent resident status), and other foreign entities (e.g., foreign corporations) are prohibited. Contributions to TTPAC, Inc.’s non-contribution account are not tax deductible for federal income tax purposes. Paid for by Turning Point PAC, Inc. **[Your crucial gift of a critically important $25, $50, $100 or more immediately will help us get justice for J6 prisoners!](https://links.conservativesgive.com/s/c/0MVmUDIA5_taII-P-zlvj9FVRrg-8PXoUZ83ErwPeG6IYEre0opmOj_rAOi93-cT_biL3qWUNgC70BSowtAuPwasVI17ktuHNkOt8XuuXwsvCubndL6f4hmCA8EXOQUofKLiZlfLPXk6Q7VceI4vKLo5NqG_7zT0KEEnZl0tilX0DtunQ9y5Bi40PASKYESStCHequXelmqKr2RQlEaYmFShgSgqrz6eBXNV5LB0GyM_8sWnppkP2YhRNfSh3RrQs8bYgKndwAPYvcTHqGoYcc6SBEvCWutmuXrTmLKLVPoIIXXU_XJHhri_oNDIoItGVD0RNM4iN2fTMnjtN6zxQVobGLbERBTSoAC47Uq37L8qrC2EtWD_jFAiApy0yMVGwMKmOF6-RIrgSZyykrhihmykH59Q8xvjYDLF8bS3BuUh4E1J9-U_TAC3LSxrcUsUwXweIHxTV1M/MGpV_hb7ST3i3BvzYVsI_rNXtnCxVUCC/5)**

It's absolutely crucial you read this urgent email. Here's why:

* The infamous D.C. gulag has refused to release 15 J6 prisoners
* J6 prisoner, Green Beret veteran Jeremy Brown, has been shipped to at least two different prisons. _And no one knows where he is_

**You and I know President Trump has pardoned these patriots. But the D.C. Swamp is fighting him tooth and nail!**

[ DONATE NOW ](https://links.conservativesgive.com/s/c/hwjFpJAfl2n5gs85TjxMGYTSSBeRVM4W0YbQiFPgZPYtUtjVWsJBkvEVIWalOYAChZrKEJuva5450f2hsfhYHLr_Eg9sUt1iqNTjy07s9RJFmcXg3Cr5h07ZuOgo6GYBdPOV5yXO-Mqh9Onh5itT_2vIXE_juJF5so9iFcEQSol03B8dg92mXWhhDV9BHdexP6EHGbUr31JsZHyyov5zlLUTWzCTpYmwVaLpMRftwzycSyXUkJpVS5frd5WbygjwicKccstI3yY4JoJ8O7BK5m-7IcEcKPpoWvNt6cF7wBM1E2eyQg1ZF8pP2JRR0uD_huWTwQRCfoq0Dz69pUMWAlknn_5Bie6CcpFn4i_q_gqBM3yzveU0ztS5CpUEWDG-0GkNcKSaweLHWL87j1B8mS3dOawUvgjX7qSKbM5qzJExTVqefHt3OATEiTS0HMNw7w_sXaJYlAk/oBcPiHbLktt_7ArhtY5DEXR5VdSyeOqS/5)
If you're like me, you breathed a big sigh of relief when President Trump was sworn in.

And you rejoiced when he pardoned 1,500 J6 patriots!

**Because you and I know that even though the J6 prisoners are innocent, they 've been:**

* Hunted by Joe Biden's FBI
* Crushed by Joe Biden's DOJ
* Tortured by vicious jail guards
* and torn from their families for years.

J6 patriots have been abused, insulted, blocked from seeing their lawyers, clergy, and family ... blocked from getting urgently needed medical care ... and much, much worse.

Many conservative Americans thought once J6 patriots were pardoned, their long nightmare would end.

But it hasn't.

**Right now, 15 J6 prisoners are being held illegally in the evil D.C. jail. And Green Beret Jeremy Brown, who 's as brave as soldiers come, has disappeared somewhere in the US Prison system.**

[ DONATE NOW ](https://links.conservativesgive.com/s/c/9yKxq3HqC1ZIJ4MtGWLNz6JVhNgs_ihsYQynZqHIr3yDnWS--ozLwyj5FLKMljuh2faw2IYWANsAozjRIzJ-cUy-XKpwgdYo4SYUKgUgwIW7PwX1I1mL79Nh6BwZg0ZuCBzykFRjpCKqAmWZa2bY3L-MhviPor1DyLx2396H67G5S0DuHGw3giuQNYdp5FUxEwy5uxiXX0rFiJf90H_3ajVsXS2mD97SuhfaB9L7l5z_cH_HhRcJ4dqbqNfDm8k_gi4X_R0haF1fF6HOJxRDngGbbovQqcJUpqbzaUT_1fd8eUmxDFzPp8XS8vI1CSaXpF9UlAiORAlxZTSSXB25Av4HHh0chmQnhzpgPIbTuDUTcgsPmO5iBONE5oNFNZS2bZdqnUbhPK9qD4xEUIGWLcuBgEfLhwDF1ei4GczRxPwWKv0avvfIF-xO9m-55wF0g08_-XRgHpU/dN5kuW3mD_OY7sX0eKpSlvcTroBzbE5j/5)
But there's something you can do about it.

I'm John Pierce, founder of National Constitutional Law Union.

Right now, NCLU represents 50 clients who peacefully protested at the United States Capitol on January 6, 2021.

**I 'm proud to say President Trump has endorsed our legal fight for January 6 patriots. Because he knows we're beating Joe Biden's Department of Justice and FBI in case after case:**

We fought like devil dogs for our client, Kenneth Joseph Thomas, and WE WON!

Another January 6 client of ours, Dominic Pezzola, was found NOT GUILTY of committing seditious conspiracy.

**In fact, we 've defeated dozens of charges against our 50 January 6 clients so far!**

And while I can't tell you the details, I can tell you NCLU is working behind the scenes right now to free the 15 from the DC Gulag and get Jeremy Brown home.

[ DONATE NOW ](https://links.conservativesgive.com/s/c/8eLi0kqy3FVD18br5GSRveiKP_Cpt0XKHLqSqDD58d4F9LwXU_FEN1k5XOrjBUN0gdL2deW4yTvKtcQZK-Y6BPSruxoDCUItoavkY-GABzeounOTFKSjlvGNMAI8pyudxb3lH99lTdau270JvkFvEGinFRXvJDBg-1hMy8D8BwPcZSEC2UV4V7e98zGu04rRVA9llyN7yK-IiYe5Or_lioYM_0BbQWMU-eK1jZlrBWGiMu27aayvT3OmpnC1f8Um_BS-JbsVw-CcAdLvjq4HAlSkt87T3_TogNHaMWf4RpW4Az13PZaqDaDPBi80B6JnKWO7bUOXILsOAZGEVYOT0H_2W85XFdf1sTJQFf-eT0KC8Wyzq5s-_NgXJvirn5kgbxu-rfmxMpGJilig5ACnyimo7rPLN7IH56jo8sx2JT5vXvdCJ7oXtOm8KURiyYpZSkXDsJTed4w/6Kg3RVXxEDzjqGOloJ6DdH0e4a77dm8_/5)
While we're excited about our hard won victories, and President Trump's pardon of J6 prisoners, we know the D.C Swamp has only just begun to fight against President Trump and our J6 clients.

**You and I are up against what investigative reporter Lara Logan calls "the worst people in the world." And the stakes couldn't be higher.**

What's more, my law firm has an enormous number of new cases coming in.

We need more lawyers, paralegals, investigators and more to take our fight for J6 patriots to the next level.

And frankly, we're stretched to the absolute breaking point.

There's too much critical work to do, and not enough lawyers, paralegal, secretaries, and more to do it.

As you can imagine, our crucial legal work is very expensive and time consuming.

clean_body: Patriot, the D.C. Swamp is holding 15 J6 prisoners in the horrifying D.C. jail and hiding J6 prisoner, Green Beret Jeremy Brown, even though President Trump pardoned them. Dear Patriot, It's absolutely crucial you read this urgent email. Here's why: The infamous D.C. gulag has refused to release 15 J6 prisoners J6 prisoner, Green Beret veteran Jeremy Brown, has been shipped to at least two different prisons. And no one knows where he is You and I know President Trump has pardoned these patriots. But the D.C. Swamp is fighting him tooth and nail! If you're like me, you breathed a big sigh of relief when President Trump was sworn in. And you rejoiced when he pardoned 1,500 J6 patriots! Because you and I know that even though the J6 prisoners are innocent, they 've been: Hunted by Joe Biden's FBI Crushed by Joe Biden's DOJ Tortured by vicious jail guards and torn from their families for years. J6 patriots have been abused, insulted, blocked from seeing their lawyers, clergy, and family ... blocked from getting urgently needed medical care ... and much, much worse. Many conservative Americans thought once J6 patriots were pardoned, their long nightmare would end. But it hasn't. Right now, 15 J6 prisoners are being held illegally in the evil D.C. jail. And Green Beret Jeremy Brown, who 's as brave as soldiers come, has disappeared somewhere in the US Prison system. But there's something you can do about it. I'm John Pierce, founder of National Constitutional Law Union. Right now, NCLU represents 50 clients who peacefully protested at the United States Capitol on January 6, 2021. I 'm proud to say President Trump has endorsed our legal fight for January 6 patriots. Because he knows we're beating Joe Biden's Department of Justice and FBI in case after case: We fought like devil dogs for our client, Kenneth Joseph Thomas, and WE WON! Another January 6 client of ours, Dominic Pezzola, was found NOT GUILTY of committing seditious conspiracy. In fact, we 've defeated dozens of charges against our 50 January 6 clients so far! And while I can't tell you the details, I can tell you NCLU is working behind the scenes right now to free the 15 from the DC Gulag and get Jeremy Brown home. While we're excited about our hard won victories, and President Trump's pardon of J6 prisoners, we know the D.C Swamp has only just begun to fight against President Trump and our J6 clients. You and I are up against what investigative reporter Lara Logan calls "the worst people in the world." And the stakes couldn't be higher. What's more, my law firm has an enormous number of new cases coming in. We need more lawyers, paralegals, investigators and more to take our fight for J6 patriots to the next level. And frankly, we're stretched to the absolute breaking point. There's too much critical work to do, and not enough lawyers, paralegal, secretaries, and more to do it. As you can imagine, our crucial legal work is very expensive and time consuming. Don't miss out on helping these patriots get freed from prison! Thank you! In Vigilance, John M. Pierce Chairman and Founder National Constitutional Law Union P.S. Patriot, the D.C. Swamp is holding 15 J6 prisoners in the horrifying D.C. jail and hiding J6 prisoner, Green Beret Jeremy Brown, even though President Trump pardoned them. President Trump endorses NCLU because we beat Joe Biden's DOJ in court ... and because we FIGHT. And we must fight for J6 patriots now harder than ever. Thank you! DONATIONS TO THE NCLU ARE NOT TAX-DEDUCTIBLE THE NCLU IS A NON-PROFIT SOCIAL WELFARE ORGANIZATION THAT IS IN THE PROCESS OF APPLYING FOR 501(C)(4) TAX-EXEMPT STATUS. ## Medical Transport Plane Crash Kills All On Board
A medical transport plane carrying a child, her mother, and four other people [crashed in Philadelphia](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00LFqwzAQxvGnkTeZ00mx7EFDoXhLl1I6Gtk6xSpny1giIW9f0r3zDz4-_t_X6eoTp_324TdyNeYJAS8SUAJOwSd-TqYJLhIh6Yacsro3Qwe2a1bXIWC0OhhcgAaiqM0cLnGwAYZoF2qSe60BAiqFPap2jmHuTJzBWNUNfRQGKKSaz_Ynp72uFPmZ73S2S94admutRxH6TeAocPTzstOjtLf8YoHj16fA8VgT-0B8rMnLsnlmebDfSS6nL6s8cy50J67yRQLHUvP5FHpMQeh3pXqtQV9Uc7pwPBJzKp0VBm6bT_z3ov5X5e7wNwAA__87BGQB) Friday night near a busy mall, killing all six aboard. The plane was airborne less than a minute before falling to the Earth, and investigators don't yet know what caused the crash. Tragically, the dead included a child who was[ heading back to Tijuana, Mexico](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLuu2zAQRL-G6tYgV7SkW7BIo-6mTWmsxKW0AR-GSMvx3wdKn2aaAc4Mzq_vxzdJlLz9pMSuhfJAjXfQCBofniR-HrbzLjAj9x07M_aT_Rr0OHS7C549kaHJ2HGynpdeT3zXd5zIYlh8J-6iadRoDE5obkvwy2DDou1ohq8pKKvZSyvH7XeR3HYO8VNOPm5rSV10e2vPqvofCmeFc_48S21XpXC-wApnbRTO_RWvCpnfVeGc2PNJKzwjZYb1oLrDKWuTBOI9UIVPeeUNNjki7EyePewlMbQCif_IWoBC4wOiBIZKp-QN2sHUEucGkuF1zXSH88-3xCh1GJXVWyKJ_463_4k8Hf4NAAD___2AdnM) after receiving “life-saving treatment” at a Philadelphia hospital. All on board were from Mexico. The others on the plane were a doctor, paramedic, pilot, and copilot. [One person in a car was killed](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00LGOpDAMxvGngc7ImBBCQXEN3Vx7JQrEHnwbEgRo0Lz9arbf-vsVn_7_HtPDa9T0_Os3Hi7JEyG1gARIU_Aa35MpwyDMxE3JQ901zvQWO1uuAyFhb8WwERfE9a5b6rp1ZiY2jTgp9UNaJKS6Jkd1NUuYrZEZTVfb3klhkINe-aj-Z03XyhLf-cVHteStjMN6XftZNH8KGgsa7_uu0rwkvs_PXtD40sC5oDGL6KI-nrDkJHpssEefGJbDnytogn3V6APHfVUPXxojB8iJYefjzAnuNcPtz4_0sPgDqEFnsWk722N5DGG_NUY9bVcYfG5e48_B67dgr4G-AwAA__95V23V), and at least 19 people on the ground were injured. [Air ambulances](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kL2uozAQhZ8GOkf2eDBQuNgmXbbdEg32OMzK_Mj4JsrbX3H7250f6ejo-_eYHiRZtudfWtnXtE-goVMalIYpkuTPhG30iRnYtuxNbwccne5du_iUbBdjZGRj5wTsxqHrEWdtYUSDthV_rWnQYAwMYG5zirPDNGvsjRuH1KDmKHUvt_-7bHXhlD_7i8st7Gub_VLrcTb2TwP3Bu50bPw-r-oypUrIfCkpauUogbKqhbbz2EtVV0rr_JVpC6yORTJFzscipEKhc1EzBgpkCEPo-wF1cDZZdDQiJ-5sbIuPx1tyltP1DernSpJ_ftXfOL08fAcAAP__ifZqcA) are used by more than 550,00 patients in the U.S. each year to transport people with traumatic injuries, pregnancy complications, heart attacks, and other medical emergencies.
## Crews Working to Recover Bodies in DC Crash
Search crews spent Saturday working to recover [the remaining 26 bodies](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kDHTpCAMhn8NdjohsKgFxTV0e-2VThRYuWHBEXYd__0N139N0jx58s7757k8KcSQXr_p7XT1eUHARw_YAy6WQrwX2VntnUMnOqf5KCY5KxhVt2s1cRLz6lEInMGtuMG2okdLJLiSWxd0swECco4T8mH1dlXSryBHrubJMwnOhprP4W8Oqe7Oxzt_3Tls-d1Fvdd6FCZ-MTQMzXVdw6dQzZbuBjA0pebzZmiSu0pbVENODE17y9AAtsHbLZU9pFfNqbdbf0RKrt9yjKGEnPrPYam60heqn9NSM44TR3yAAhgZmu7U9rhC49XIJLzeFOL_kPWn0r4a_wUAAP__JHhsnw) in the frigid waters of the Potomac River after the collision of a passenger jet and an Army helicopter that left 67 people dead near Reagan Washington National Airport on Thursday. [The three soldiers killed](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0z71uwyAUQOGngQ3rcvmxPTB08ZauHS1srgMNDpFNg_L2Vbp3PtInna_LfPEpp_v10-_k6lZmBDQCUADOwaf8mjUPbiNCUpyc7NWgRwu95dH1PtAY9DgYNRiF1phlJaskDEYrCYYn99YAAaXEAWW3bGGxeltA99KOw8Y0UEi1HN13Sfcaacuv8qSjW8vOs4u1Pk6mPhhODKfWWudLfjeG053ayXBaD39GCuLnFP7YX2LJfr2J6NtNSAVG2n5UXax75ocLj5ZyTqftmYbr7tOfxet_30-HvwEAAP__o0ZYLQ) in the collision were part of the 12th Aviation Battalion at Fort Belvoir in Virginia, whose responsibilities in a national crisis include evacuating Pentagon officials. Among the victims on the American Eagle flight were [two figure-skating sisters](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00Ltu7CAYBOCnwR0W_MZcCorTuNvTprQwhjUJlxWwa-3bR47SpvukkUaj-bitNxNiyPf_JjndfVmBwIwJYALrbkJ8r2zYtXcO3DQ4TcUkmeJE8OHQBubJe1AgmfFqm2Y5S8W5nISVSnAxBH21ESBAKUig4-b3jTO_ESYoV9IjRtweeqnjZwm5H87Hd3m5OtqShqiP3h8NTf8QLAiW8zzHvNnsznblCJaLCJZnw7-yJaVnDv2NU3nW3HCwDrcv00O-4xZad7XhR-klGYttNe3A1WZDFaGCDlXvjzPEGBoXiJF7MiH-LOl_PfPS8B0AAP__gJBmhw) and their parents who were returning home from a prestigious training camp following the 2025 U.S. Figure Skating Championships in Wichita, Kansas.
## American Hostage Freed by Hamas
Yesterday, Keith Siegel became [the first American hostage freed](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLFyhSAURL8GO53LFQULijR0L21KB-WiJChvhDzHfH3G9Gm2OrO7cz4e48OGGPbl3W6ki08jAnY1YA04OhviNYrKaU-E1FakuWyVGHqQfbVq4lK2Sk4keedmMVuEHttJKD_YtuNQBX23AQJyjgp5M3k39cJPICTvB-WZAHKhpKP5TGEvK_l4pRcdzZy2Kuq1lGdm7RtDw9Cc59l8Z1uSs9cNMDS5pONiaHY6802kIzqG5l5laADv4AyN3egIs93rNeViF6q_KJS1zoEWivVifyxDI-WglEQFIBma6tDueYYYQ-4lE7BsNsS_X-U_Ty-NvwEAAP__0Hdmwg) by Hamas as part of the ceasefire agreement between Israel and Hamas. The 65-year-old was one of three hostages released after 15 months in captivity after Hamas attacked Israel on Oct. 7, 2023. Seigel is a dual Israeli-American citizen. Siegel’s [family thanked President Trump](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00LFq7DAQheGnkTsbaeSV7ELFhYshxaZNaUbSaD1BthZb2WXz9MHpUx_4OPwf1_mKnHm7veNKrqYyg4RLK6GVMEfk_Jr7JrpEBKQbcsrqoR-NtKZZnDEYfJCktVEBfQQKQcbLMI7JWJTQsDs1CRKUggFU51P0pk9e9laZcUiilxS5lr37LLzVhVJ-lQftXShrk91S6_0Q-p-AScCEPmz0PLpbOWcB09tWad-wctkwC5gyP6j9ukesdAiY-NiRcrvgike70LcvOeNyWnriKPR_pQallQXb7C7en5wzH8aKXt5W5Pz7of7V5OHgJwAA__-HMmMS) "for bringing our father back to us,” saying they are "filled with indescribable excitement." It is believed that [two of the six American hostages](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGOpDAQRL_GZEam8RgIHFxCNpdeiNp2G_rOwMi2Bs19_YrNNyupnkql9-e5PJETH-tv3MnWeC6g4CEVSAVLQE6fRTfBRiKgviHbDf2oJ6MG02w2EDz8BF2vlPO9Au9wAtONZBwh6LFhe68pUNB1MELXuhic0dEpPXRmGqPQigLXM7d_Tz7qRjF9zjfl1p97k-xW66uI_peAWcB8XVfrXTnoKncvYL6jgJlLRkpywx2L9ISFImeSuFNmj4f8R1w3WZjWmzpLxZVkn4PMlG5arvgfBcxNtuF1cUpczCC0Wnfk9H2l_qTmbeErAAD__41AZ6c) still held in Gaza are alive—35-year-old Sagui Dekel-Chen and 19-year old Edan Alexander. Four other Americans are believed to have been killed while held captive. Enjoy reading The Flyover? The plane was airborne less than a minute before falling to the Earth, and investigators don't yet know what caused the crash. Tragically, the dead included a child who was after receiving “life-saving treatment” at a Philadelphia hospital. All on board were from Mexico. The others on the plane were a doctor, paramedic, pilot, and copilot. , and at least 19 people on the ground were injured. are used by more than 550,00 patients in the U.S. each year to transport people with traumatic injuries, pregnancy complications, heart attacks, and other medical emergencies. Among the victims on the American Eagle flight were and their parents who were returning home from a prestigious training camp following the 2025 U.S. Figure Skating Championships in Wichita, Kansas. American Hostage Freed by Hamas Yesterday, Keith Siegel became by Hamas as part of the ceasefire agreement between Israel and Hamas. The 65-year-old was one of three hostages released after 15 months in captivity after Hamas attacked Israel on Oct. 7, 2023. Seigel is a dual Israeli-American citizen. Siegel’s "for bringing our father back to us,” saying they are "filled with indescribable excitement." clean_body: ...and the Turning Point Generation –– as I call these high school and college students –– are leading MASSIVE GENERATIONAL CHANGE among young people. | | | Fellow American, What an honor to welcome President DONALD TRUMP as the keynote speaker at Turning Point's AMERICAFEST, the biggest and boldest celebration of our country and our freedoms! Fellow American, thanks to YOU, thousands of young people have been inspired by the President's message of FREEDOM, PATRIOTISM, and AMERICAN GREATNESS... ... and the Turning Point Generation -- as I call these high school and college students -- are leading MASSIVE GENERATIONAL CHANGE among young people. To celebrate this PRO-AMERICA MOMENTUM, I wanted to send you a LIMITED EDITION "47" hat to honor our 47th president: DONALD TRUMP. Thanks to generous patriots like YOU, Turning Point USA: Leads the BIGGEST and MOST IMPACTFUL patriotic student movement in American history, with 820,000+ student activists in ALL 50 states, Reaches nearly EVERY smartphone and computer in our country with POWERFUL, PRO-AMERICA content -- as only Turning Point USA can go HEAD-TO-HEAD with the Fake News Media in online reach, AND Continues to INSPIRE millions of kids to LOVE AMERICA again , with a MASSIVE SWING in favor of conservative principles among young people under age 25! But while we're seeing MAJOR WINS every day ... we must keep up our momentum until we TOTALLY WIN the American Culture War against the "Woke" Left! ** Thank YOU for your patriotism, moral courage, and generous support of the 820,000+ America-loving young people of Turning Point USA. Working together, I know we will totally defeat the "Woke" Left to WIN the American Culture War and restore PATRIOTISM and FREEDOM as our country's way of life again! Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA 4940 East Beverly Road Phoenix, Arizona 85044 Full Mag News PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522 | _

name: Charlie Kirk
subject: My BIG Plan
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Turning Point PAC, Inc
body:
Coming off the HUGE victories last November, I am ready to shift things into the next gear.

|
---
| | [](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/ZD-QHSOD1HyNxWi7qI4GmA~~/AARclBA~/WE5A915vX1tXfYqk5J4hXDW0kyYktHv2PWKo9XQ3vj9docT-xT0e6gLQdG9xJ75fJ7xTYjQ2-zW9umtzaySjJTJwwdD751WsMvo34EROcP6axYJkw3ikZ4kDuB_2jjib9wrCwkgtgWMoIV3-uDFs41EQFlGvmNMC19EerpZlTFTFqbijDEk6z0xPwl4IZ3mG)
Friend,

Coming off the HUGE victories last November, I am ready to shift things into the next gear. I have BIG plans for Turning Point PAC.

I want to personally invite you to be a part of it.

First, let’s recap what we achieved in 2024:
* Hispanic voters swung heavily toward Republicans and President Trump
* The youth vote (18-29) swung MAJORLY to President Trump.
* Republicans swept the White House, Senate, and Congress!

Our ballot chasers were on the ground, turning out voters. These were low-propensity voters, and we cracked the code to get them out to the polls.
[](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/ZD-QHSOD1HyNxWi7qI4GmA~~/AARclBA~/WE5A915vX1tXfYqk5J4hXDW0kyYktHv2PWKo9XQ3vj9docT-xT0e6gLQdG9xJ75fJ7xTYjQ2-zW9umtzaySjJTJwwdD751WsMvo34EROcP6axYJkw3ikZ4kDuB_2jjib9wrCwkgtgWMoIV3-uDFs41EQFlGvmNMC19EerpZlTFTFqbijDEk6z0xPwl4IZ3mG)
Here is my big plan:

**I want to fund ballot chasers on the ground, even in off-year elections. Our ground game is the best. I am confident we can continue to win key elections for years to come, not just presidential elections.**

Non-Contribution Account (For TTPAC, Inc.’s Expenditures Other Than Direct Contributions to Federal Committees)

As permitted by law, TTPAC, Inc. maintains a non-contribution account for the purpose of influencing federal, state, and local elections. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, address, occupation, and employer of individuals whose contribution exceeds $200 in an election cycle. For contributions from federal committees, corporations, and labor unions - regardless of contribution amount - federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the committee’s name and address. State and local law may require us to collect and report additional information.

Contributions to this account may be used to influence federal elections by making independent expenditures in support of or in opposition to federal candidates. Additionally, in state and local jurisdictions that permit non-individual type (e.g., corporate) contributions directly to candidates and/or committees, contributions to this account may be used for both independent expenditures and direct contributions to candidates and/or committees, as permitted by state and local law.

Individuals, federal committees, corporations, and labor unions may contribute to TTPAC, Inc.’s non-contribution account without limit. Contributions by national banks, foreign nationals (without lawful permanent resident status), and other foreign entities (e.g., foreign corporations) are prohibited. Contributions to TTPAC, Inc.’s non-contribution account are not tax deductible for federal income tax purposes. Paid for by Turning Point PAC, Inc. (www.tppac.com) and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

name: The LaRouche Organization
subject: Weekly Newsletter
body:
It's Up to Us

| | [](https://laroucheorganization.nationbuilder.com/r?u=6U-bS5myFB-qaXONaTKygW8Bw5o4M8XoHC3TxaP90HPeLIFflw7WCajMEVGvmb9S&e=8fa7b86c85d8b09f0015ebe544605791&utm_source=laroucheorganization&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newsletter_20250202&n=1)
---
| | [](https://laroucheorganization.nationbuilder.com/r?u=7TeUVbSc0GIXjZJvdJ48PDO6NBSOUC5MRQNhnMgrSmNV2-VHceYt9IsmfIvxu4ls&e=8fa7b86c85d8b09f0015ebe544605791&utm_source=laroucheorganization&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newsletter_20250202&n=2 "LaRouche Show Today at 10am EST") [LaRouche Show Today at 10am EST](https://laroucheorganization.nationbuilder.com/r?u=7TeUVbSc0GIXjZJvdJ48PDO6NBSOUC5MRQNhnMgrSmNV2-VHceYt9IsmfIvxu4ls&e=8fa7b86c85d8b09f0015ebe544605791&utm_source=laroucheorganization&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newsletter_20250202&n=2)
---
Friend —
While there are hopeful initiatives coming from the newly inaugurated President Donald Trump, there is at the same time many policies that are cause for concern. Hence, our role as the LaRouche movement is indispensable in organizing this new presidential administration and the American people around the ideas which are necessary to bring the United States into harmony with the New Paradigm of the Global South.
Among the most important of Trump’s initiatives is his taking on the so-called “Deep State” or what’s known as the “permanent bureaucracy” in Washington D.C. His nominations of Tulsi Gabbard for DNI and Kash Patel for FBI director have caused great consternation among these layers, and Tulsi Gabbard’s confirmation hearing this last Thursday was particularly contentious. She was asked repeatedly to denounce Edward Snowden as a traitor, which she courageously refused to do. Now we must really mobilize and make sure these senators vote for their confirmation. **If you haven't already,[call your senators](https://laroucheorganization.nationbuilder.com/r?u=QLBrH_au-_Km4FLk5287ZqE7A2Go4f5aKPeBzTbT7r1xy_f81dU_dxSWye-Hksk0kpG8qW_gwuWAZK0S2gehhA&e=8fa7b86c85d8b09f0015ebe544605791&utm_source=laroucheorganization&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newsletter_20250202&n=3)** **and demand that they support the confirmations of Gabbard and Patel.**
The LaRouche movement had a powerful team on capitol hill these last two weeks distributing the [“Liars’ Bureau”](https://laroucheorganization.nationbuilder.com/r?u=oOX3oO8XL0tZjrDwSobD-HbwhnMlEdqykvQPLA4wvJ57cXtDhOQP0jE2FeGcxyJB&e=8fa7b86c85d8b09f0015ebe544605791&utm_source=laroucheorganization&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newsletter_20250202&n=4) pamphlet to all Senate offices, organizing them to support the nominations of Gabbard and Patel.
In another move of taking on this "permanent bureaucracy," Trump signed an Executive Order on January 23rd calling for plans to be drawn up in the immediate days ahead to release the John F. Kennedy, Robert F. Kennedy and Martin Luther King Jr. assassination files. The release of these files can open up a pandora's box showing which government institutions were involved in the murders of some of America’s greatest statesmen.
Also promising is Trump’s stated intention to meet with Russian President Vladimir Putin and China’s President Xi Jinping. If Trump can carry on meaningful dialogue with both and come to understand how the majority of the world, led by the BRICS nations, has moved into an irreversibly different, positive direction, the future can indeed be bright for the entire world.
However, Trump's understanding of this is limited and often contradictory, proving that we have our work cut out for us in shaping the discussion. He has attacked the BRICS’s efforts by threatening them with 100 % tariffs if they replace the US dollar as reserve currency.
He is also expressing dangerous views regarding the Middle East, such as his suggestion that the Palestinians should all be relocated from Gaza to nations such as Egypt, Jordan and Indonesia. And he signed a disgusting Executive Order attacking the freedom of speech of “pro-Hamas” protesters on campuses, claiming they are "anti-Semitic," while ignoring that many of these protesters are in fact Jewish. These protesters, as should be obvious, are not "anti-Semitic" but are opposing what they rightfully see as a horrific genocide being carried out by the United States and Israel against the population of Gaza.
**What can you do? Call your[senators](https://laroucheorganization.nationbuilder.com/r?u=QLBrH_au-_Km4FLk5287ZqE7A2Go4f5aKPeBzTbT7r1xy_f81dU_dxSWye-Hksk0kpG8qW_gwuWAZK0S2gehhA&e=8fa7b86c85d8b09f0015ebe544605791&utm_source=laroucheorganization&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newsletter_20250202&n=5) and demand that they support the confirmations of Gabbard and Patel.** Call your [representative](https://laroucheorganization.nationbuilder.com/r?u=nRm-ykgobr4-ZxHmvP2MqSO0J6JgvCJ3PkR_LvbwIKO17NlAx4tlToeQCy2RBwcnErjXa2FTOwnIMNMr28LxTA&e=8fa7b86c85d8b09f0015ebe544605791&utm_source=laroucheorganization&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newsletter_20250202&n=6) and demand they support the BRICS process, work with China and Russia, implement the Oasis Plan for peace in Southwest Asia, and permanently end the genocide in Gaza beyond the current ceasefire. Please also [donate](https://laroucheorganization.nationbuilder.com/donate?e=8fa7b86c85d8b09f0015ebe544605791&utm_source=laroucheorganization&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newsletter_20250202&n=7) to support our efforts. We are not spectators waiting for someone else to save us, we are shaping history and it is up to each of us to play our role in that.
* * *
## Starting At 10am EST! — "The Issue of America's Manifest Destiny for Today" [](https://laroucheorganization.nationbuilder.com/r?u=7TeUVbSc0GIXjZJvdJ48PDO6NBSOUC5MRQNhnMgrSmNV2-VHceYt9IsmfIvxu4ls&e=8fa7b86c85d8b09f0015ebe544605791&utm_source=laroucheorganization&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newsletter_20250202&n=8)
A quarter of a century ago, then-presidential candidate Lyndon LaRouche delivered this major policy address near Boston, Massachusetts. Like today, many Americans at that time believed that the idea of America's "Manifest Destiny" was somehow tied to imperial notions of territorial expansion through gunboat diplomacy and other forms of coercion. But, as LaRouche laid out, the actual notion of the Manifest Destiny of the United States was quite the opposite, namely a mission to expand a form of society which would allow all men and women to realize their full potential TO DO GOOD.
**[Watch Here](https://laroucheorganization.nationbuilder.com/r?u=7TeUVbSc0GIXjZJvdJ48PHUYYgm85b6kVXAy9SSOFUhBybDX6PHlantFn24j0EZ8&e=8fa7b86c85d8b09f0015ebe544605791&utm_source=laroucheorganization&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newsletter_20250202&n=9)**
* * *
## **Friday Symposium with Diane Sare:**
## **[](https://laroucheorganization.nationbuilder.com/r?u=6U-bS5myFB-qaXONaTKygW8Bw5o4M8XoHC3TxaP90HMeGy_uGspnCd41OAzRQnsXdCI_6RjTVsevwPSEJicyCq5tT7aTNe5cJfdpiahZNQolxZIQvlVI2AokETh8uszi&e=8fa7b86c85d8b09f0015ebe544605791&utm_source=laroucheorganization&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newsletter_20250202&n=10)**
****In his inaugural address, much to the delight of a cheering Elon Musk, President Trump announced that we will "plant the American flag on Mars." How many Americans understand why this is so important, but also understand that it must be approached from a completely different perspective —one which seeks to foster discoveries of new physical principles, like the Russians have just demonstrated with their hypersonic Oreshnik missile?
Bill Jones of _EIR_ and Diane Sare take this up from the standpoint of Lyndon LaRouche's 40 year Mars colonization program. Don't remain an earthling!
**[Watch Here](https://laroucheorganization.nationbuilder.com/r?u=7TeUVbSc0GIXjZJvdJ48PDO6NBSOUC5MRQNhnMgrSmMLVJmyKdCyGDs42MHsT-bW5CnZt6A3gaVhCrK7ONaJPQ&e=8fa7b86c85d8b09f0015ebe544605791&utm_source=laroucheorganization&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newsletter_20250202&n=11)**
* * *
## LaRouche Movement Drains the Swamp, Makes Breakthrough in Berlin & Builds the Oasis Plan!
[](https://laroucheorganization.nationbuilder.com/r?u=6U-bS5myFB-qaXONaTKygW8Bw5o4M8XoHC3TxaP90HMeGy_uGspnCd41OAzRQnsXGDQ9r0DV3101lSp9J0Qf3nYYMku0Y5X2JtMc9eCzoJ8gGVQWcnSGrOsslzCwUVY57mSKd2F1G6O_lmwI4bgQ9EylD9cp82c4Uc6f__2a-MU&e=8fa7b86c85d8b09f0015ebe544605791&utm_source=laroucheorganization&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newsletter_20250202&n=12)
Michelle Erin brings you the weekly LaRouche movement's "On the Ground Battle Report." These reports spotlight organizing activities of the International LaRouche Movement with videos, photos, and more.
**[Watch here](https://laroucheorganization.nationbuilder.com/r?u=6U-bS5myFB-qaXONaTKygW8Bw5o4M8XoHC3TxaP90HMeGy_uGspnCd41OAzRQnsXGDQ9r0DV3101lSp9J0Qf3nYYMku0Y5X2JtMc9eCzoJ8gGVQWcnSGrOsslzCwUVY57mSKd2F1G6O_lmwI4bgQ9EylD9cp82c4Uc6f__2a-MU&e=8fa7b86c85d8b09f0015ebe544605791&utm_source=laroucheorganization&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newsletter_20250202&n=13)**
* * *
## MOBILIZE to Circulate this Special LaRouche Organization Report:
[](https://laroucheorganization.nationbuilder.com/r?u=6U-bS5myFB-qaXONaTKygW8Bw5o4M8XoHC3TxaP90HMeGy_uGspnCd41OAzRQnsXYvEBvw1V4YzP41gFotuQMtXvxK6p2WV5A7S3POuthfc&e=8fa7b86c85d8b09f0015ebe544605791&utm_source=laroucheorganization&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newsletter_20250202&n=14)
Yes, it is indeed true that the national security of the U.S. is under threat by various forms of meddling and malicious intrigues—but the problem does not originate in Russia, China, Iran, or any of the other nations on the neocon “bad guys” list. The threat emanates from long-term operatives embedded deep within the permanent bureaucracy of the U.S. government and other related agencies.
Trump's nominations of Tulsi Gabbard and Kash Patel have sent waves of fear into this establishment, and they are now mobilized to stop their confirmations. Gabbard and Patel are not without their faults, and no one can say with certainty what they will do once they assume office. But we can with certainty tell you who fears their scrutiny, and why.
[**Read here**](https://laroucheorganization.nationbuilder.com/r?u=6U-bS5myFB-qaXONaTKygW8Bw5o4M8XoHC3TxaP90HMeGy_uGspnCd41OAzRQnsXYvEBvw1V4YzP41gFotuQMtXvxK6p2WV5A7S3POuthfc&e=8fa7b86c85d8b09f0015ebe544605791&utm_source=laroucheorganization&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newsletter_20250202&n=15)
And get active! Contact your Senators and demand they vote for confirmation. **You can call your Senators' DC offices via the Congressional switchboard 202-224-3121.**
**For the local offices:** Print out the [PDF copy of the report](https://laroucheorganization.nationbuilder.com/r?u=6U-bS5myFB-qaXONaTKygW8Bw5o4M8XoHC3TxaP90HNFwdJMrXR2G1R3l2fQ2L0oVnr8Kx-L0MD1TUz4DI27ij19CZN2rKCP6NUsdJ93DPJlO_jUn7fWDGtCnRHIYi3up42Lyftys8Its7DtUpTnkle4j6-emi9StVnYpgEkxF0&e=8fa7b86c85d8b09f0015ebe544605791&utm_source=laroucheorganization&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newsletter_20250202&n=16) and hand deliver it to the staff at the local offices near you.
**For the Washington offices** : Call both your senators' offices in Washington and email them the PDF copy of the report.
**On Social Media:** you can use [this link](https://laroucheorganization.nationbuilder.com/r?u=oOX3oO8XL0tZjrDwSobD-HbwhnMlEdqykvQPLA4wvJ57cXtDhOQP0jE2FeGcxyJB&e=8fa7b86c85d8b09f0015ebe544605791&utm_source=laroucheorganization&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=newsletter_20250202&n=17) (https://eir.news/2025/01/the-liars-bureau/), with its eye-catching image, to post the report on Facebook, Twitter/X, Instagram, Tiktok and other platforms. Use it to support posts which are supportive of Gabbard and Patel, or to rebut the digital screechings of the neocons who feel threatened by them.

clean_body: It's Up to Us | | | | "LaRouche Show Today at 10am EST" Friend — While there are hopeful initiatives coming from the newly inaugurated President Donald Trump, there is at the same time many policies that are cause for concern. Hence, our role as the LaRouche movement is indispensable in organizing this new presidential administration and the American people around the ideas which are necessary to bring the United States into harmony with the New Paradigm of the Global South. Among the most important of Trump’s initiatives is his taking on the so-called “Deep State” or what’s known as the “permanent bureaucracy” in Washington D.C. His nominations of Tulsi Gabbard for DNI and Kash Patel for FBI director have caused great consternation among these layers, and Tulsi Gabbard’s confirmation hearing this last Thursday was particularly contentious. She was asked repeatedly to denounce Edward Snowden as a traitor, which she courageously refused to do. Now we must really mobilize and make sure these senators vote for their confirmation. If you haven't already, and demand that they support the confirmations of Gabbard and Patel. The LaRouche movement had a powerful team on capitol hill these last two weeks distributing the pamphlet to all Senate offices, organizing them to support the nominations of Gabbard and Patel. In another move of taking on this "permanent bureaucracy," Trump signed an Executive Order on January 23rd calling for plans to be drawn up in the immediate days ahead to release the John F. Kennedy, Robert F. Kennedy and Martin Luther King Jr. assassination files. The release of these files can open up a pandora's box showing which government institutions were involved in the murders of some of America’s greatest statesmen. Also promising is Trump’s stated intention to meet with Russian President Vladimir Putin and China’s President Xi Jinping. If Trump can carry on meaningful dialogue with both and come to understand how the majority of the world, led by the BRICS nations, has moved into an irreversibly different, positive direction, the future can indeed be bright for the entire world. However, Trump's understanding of this is limited and often contradictory, proving that we have our work cut out for us in shaping the discussion. He has attacked the BRICS’s efforts by threatening them with 100 % tariffs if they replace the US dollar as reserve currency. He is also expressing dangerous views regarding the Middle East, such as his suggestion that the Palestinians should all be relocated from Gaza to nations such as Egypt, Jordan and Indonesia. And he signed a disgusting Executive Order attacking the freedom of speech of “pro-Hamas” protesters on campuses, claiming they are "anti-Semitic," while ignoring that many of these protesters are in fact Jewish. These protesters, as should be obvious, are not "anti-Semitic" but are opposing what they rightfully see as a horrific genocide being carried out by the United States and Israel against the population of Gaza. What can you do? Call your and demand that they support the confirmations of Gabbard and Patel. Call your and demand they support the BRICS process, work with China and Russia, implement the Oasis Plan for peace in Southwest Asia, and permanently end the genocide in Gaza beyond the current ceasefire. Please also to support our efforts. We are not spectators waiting for someone else to save us, we are shaping history and it is up to each of us to play our role in that. Starting At 10am EST! — "The Issue of America's Manifest Destiny for Today" A quarter of a century ago, then-presidential candidate Lyndon LaRouche delivered this major policy address near Boston, Massachusetts. Like today, many Americans at that time believed that the idea of America's "Manifest Destiny" was somehow tied to imperial notions of territorial expansion through gunboat diplomacy and other forms of coercion. But, as LaRouche laid out, the actual notion of the Manifest Destiny of the United States was quite the opposite, namely a mission to expand a form of society which would allow all men and women to realize their full potential TO DO GOOD. Friday Symposium with Diane Sare: **In his inaugural address, much to the delight of a cheering Elon Musk, President Trump announced that we will "plant the American flag on Mars." How many Americans understand why this is so important, but also understand that it must be approached from a completely different perspective —one which seeks to foster discoveries of new physical principles, like the Russians have just demonstrated with their hypersonic Oreshnik missile? Bill Jones of EIR and Diane Sare take this up from the standpoint of Lyndon LaRouche's 40 year Mars colonization program. Don't remain an earthling! LaRouche Movement Drains the Swamp, Makes Breakthrough in Berlin & Builds the Oasis Plan! Michelle Erin brings you the weekly LaRouche movement's "On the Ground Battle Report." These reports spotlight organizing activities of the International LaRouche Movement with videos, photos, and more. MOBILIZE to Circulate this Special LaRouche Organization Report: Yes, it is indeed true that the national security of the U.S. is under threat by various forms of meddling and malicious intrigues—but the problem does not originate in Russia, China, Iran, or any of the other nations on the neocon “bad guys” list. The threat emanates from long-term operatives embedded deep within the permanent bureaucracy of the U.S. government and other related agencies. Trump's nominations of Tulsi Gabbard and Kash Patel have sent waves of fear into this establishment, and they are now mobilized to stop their confirmations. Gabbard and Patel are not without their faults, and no one can say with certainty what they will do once they assume office. But we can with certainty tell you who fears their scrutiny, and why. And get active! Contact your Senators and demand they vote for confirmation. You can call your Senators' DC offices via the Congressional switchboard 202-224-3121. For the local offices: Print out the and hand deliver it to the staff at the local offices near you. For the Washington offices : Call both your senators' offices in Washington and email them the PDF copy of the report. On Social Media: you can use (), with its eye-catching image, to post the report on Facebook, Twitter/X, Instagram, Tiktok and other platforms. Use it to support posts which are supportive of Gabbard and Patel, or to rebut the digital screechings of the neocons who feel threatened by them. Join the Discussion! Upcoming Events Starting soon! name: History Facts
subject: This ancient wonder didn't last long
body:
Of the Seven Wonders of the Ancient World, the Colossus of Rhodes stood for the shortest period of time — roughly 55 years. [](https://track.historyfacts.com/?xtl=1krv9cfc68dnrz5zgnoouioqtfntsxllqhyxmn87xg1ij38okpy0vumfjfaouq37e56n99opjtddxb791ycbfs3ib4kcj3ib0711254a9951jh03tnb8hl4xyaem19in560yuvleom7ji798o08a0mk5n&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sr21jj&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
---
---
# [The Colossus of Rhodes only stood for about 55 years.](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sr21jj&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
### [World History](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sr21jj&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sr21jj&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
| O f the Seven Wonders of the Ancient World, the Colossus of Rhodes stood for the shortest period of time — roughly [55 years](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sr21jj&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com). Sources vary as to the exact number, but what’s certain is that the statue existed for a mere blip in the annals of history. (By comparison, the Great Pyramid of Giza has stood for more than 4,500 years.) The Colossus’ creation dates back to the siege of the Greek island of Rhodes in 305 BCE, when the Macedonian ruler Demetrius I led an ultimately futile attempt to capture the city and harbor. As his army abandoned its efforts the following year, they left behind their supplies and equipment, which the city later sold off for profit. With this unexpected windfall, Rhodian officials commissioned a celebratory statue of the Greek sun god Helios, the patron god of Rhodes.
---
Greek sculptor Chares of Lindos was tasked with building the colossal 108-foot-tall statue; he began around 292 BCE, and the work lasted for 12 years. Though the sculpture’s exact location is unknown, it’s believed to have stood on the harbor’s eastern side, and was likely made of iron and stone coated with bronze. The Colossus stood triumphantly for five decades, but it fell around 226 BCE when an [earthquake](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sr21jj&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) struck the region and toppled the great wonder. Its remnants were scattered around until 654 CE, when invading Arabian forces gathered and sold what remained of the statue. There was so much debris that it’s said to have taken more than 900 camel loads to transport.
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sr21jj&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) | [](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sr21jj&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)

## The marathon was inspired by an ancient Greek battle.
The origin of the marathon race dates back to the Greco-Persian Wars of the fifth century BCE and the ancient Battle of Marathon, though the commonly told origin story is likely a myth. According to the legend, a messenger named Pheidippides ran 25 miles between Athens and the city of Marathon to spread the news of a Greek victory in the battle. That myth is likely a combination of [two events](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sr21jj&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) that actually occurred. In 490 BCE, over the course of several days, Pheidippides ran nearly 300 miles from Athens to Sparta and back to gather additional forces to defend against a Persian attack. The Athenians won the Battle of Marathon days later, and marched 25 miles back home from Marathon to defend against a potential second attack. That march was conflated with Pheidippides’ initial run in retellings of the battle that were written centuries later, including Robert Browning’s 1879 poem “Pheidippides.” The myth inspired French archaeologist Michel Bréal to propose a similar event for the 1896 Athens Olympics. The first Olympic marathon featured 17 runners traversing a 24.8-mile course between the Marathon battlefield and the city of Athens.

clean_body: Of the Seven Wonders of the Ancient World, the Colossus of Rhodes stood for the shortest period of time — roughly 55 years. | O f the Seven Wonders of the Ancient World, the Colossus of Rhodes stood for the shortest period of time — roughly . Sources vary as to the exact number, but what’s certain is that the statue existed for a mere blip in the annals of history. (By comparison, the Great Pyramid of Giza has stood for more than 4,500 years.) The Colossus’ creation dates back to the siege of the Greek island of Rhodes in 305 BCE, when the Macedonian ruler Demetrius I led an ultimately futile attempt to capture the city and harbor. As his army abandoned its efforts the following year, they left behind their supplies and equipment, which the city later sold off for profit. With this unexpected windfall, Rhodian officials commissioned a celebratory statue of the Greek sun god Helios, the patron god of Rhodes. Greek sculptor Chares of Lindos was tasked with building the colossal 108-foot-tall statue; he began around 292 BCE, and the work lasted for 12 years. Though the sculpture’s exact location is unknown, it’s believed to have stood on the harbor’s eastern side, and was likely made of iron and stone coated with bronze. The Colossus stood triumphantly for five decades, but it fell around 226 BCE when an struck the region and toppled the great wonder. Its remnants were scattered around until 654 CE, when invading Arabian forces gathered and sold what remained of the statue. There was so much debris that it’s said to have taken more than 900 camel loads to transport. | Thank you for supporting our advertisers! | By the Numbers | | Greek deities that live on Mount Olympus, according to myth 12 | | City-states that comprised ancient Greece 1,000+ | City-states that comprised ancient Greece 1,000+ | | Height (in feet) of the world’s tallest statue (India’s Statue of Unity) 597 | | Stone blocks used to construct the Great Pyramid of Giza 2.3 million | Stone blocks used to construct the Great Pyramid of Giza 2.3 million | | | Did you know? ---|---|--- The marathon was inspired by an ancient Greek battle. The origin of the marathon race dates back to the Greco-Persian Wars of the fifth century BCE and the ancient Battle of Marathon, though the commonly told origin story is likely a myth. According to the legend, a messenger named Pheidippides ran 25 miles between Athens and the city of Marathon to spread the news of a Greek victory in the battle. That myth is likely a combination of that actually occurred. In 490 BCE, over the course of several days, Pheidippides ran nearly 300 miles from Athens to Sparta and back to gather additional forces to defend against a Persian attack. The Athenians won the Battle of Marathon days later, and marched 25 miles back home from Marathon to defend against a potential second attack. That march was conflated with Pheidippides’ initial run in retellings of the battle that were written centuries later, including Robert Browning’s 1879 poem “Pheidippides.” The myth inspired French archaeologist Michel Bréal to propose a similar event for the 1896 Athens Olympics. The first Olympic marathon featured 17 runners traversing a 24.8-mile course between the Marathon battlefield and the city of Athens. body:
Ensure our new majority knows YOUR priorities.

Friend,

We have two NEW Republican Senators!

**[In Ohio, Lieutenant Governor Jon Husted was appointed to fill Vice President JD Vance's seat and in Florida, state Attorney General Ashley Moody was appointed to replace Secretary of State Marco Rubio.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/s/c/-p3uLCEirelUVLxnrgCE27gr373PJEtA4_1b8ssBrY4Dy6UxxpV5t8vVwU-9OZoBnHVNhllasJazstzIqFKXPcergp54lJffEB7t5_b8kq4E6GSOaEcBTfdoZV6CAnB26OsS6O4uQgcx0RzJ_lyu3fiItqfy9Rq-xOZkynmMO4wlXxyPcYAMXsHlN6GDcvIG7oPb26503vcIM1phugzLacpnBrz1e9fzUm1bzzACGYQy5I2bRxhyBgjBfdedgRrollY-_twx6KmAR3oQBxcfbCwo5Tdgwfs04I_0lcwc2T7RxZb_2k4D3JjtSkxv062R3BIAZ5W6WhlEM4kDi8PMvtK3duyFWNWxKxSzirA1S8jCRgrCbDjTVqEr5mYWbiRqtWlqS2GwidOC6EB6MIZm7NDTsIaBgNh6vlxIUlYdRhisZfBoTEqPPzDHd5x9e6z-1rt9R21BB4shC1SjF-584l_tygt3ayN-3mrcNyZuQxLefr01noM3AdZEquq3E3t_dwazUtJN-olY9dHMMpU5Il7Y2LWwCQ/oqeUDJEx2dUTlMwjwZdCBgj8Gv3QC3Py/5)**

With these two additions, our _NEW_ Senate majority is officially set until 2026!

subject: My BIG plan
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Turning Point PAC, Inc
body:
Coming off the HUGE victories last November, I am ready to shift things into the next gear.

|
---
| | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/s/c/m5eTFdHScxk7GMD3pzIFjqIGcbsbpmO0P5eZAU221Qid4Fyus9YJZeys0AIWdTsE2oJr_-RDzgUrXJxUI7zi1_9ssg83tFJKmFWf9eWSlyaV9EazuNEI-1N2Hp6Orzd-EDzUqEFlbgVbuUjtdPKcVNIncmulVeZRDrln43YiBLundR5jUuRaeRR6OI3bR-s6Syex56mLUtlQ5MapEFLiudMjZa070byTNeRuXTimYfdKteDf9RGIAqHJ5lwDL9W1FBfbegeYc5Z1Htgv-FeG3i4Z7Gt8Z1ksnHVck4bsczRgtZJK9yGPYVmGmIZbwS_cuyqxVXGPSgSY8UkH/bvcGkGLcLUGXgllcO-J9-8v2JaS5jIBp/5)
Friend,

Coming off the HUGE victories last November, I am ready to shift things into the next gear. I have BIG plans for Turning Point PAC.

I want to personally invite you to be a part of it.

First, let’s recap what we achieved in 2024:
* Hispanic voters swung heavily toward Republicans and President Trump
* The youth vote (18-29) swung MAJORLY to President Trump.
* Republicans swept the White House, Senate, and Congress!

Our ballot chasers were on the ground, turning out voters. These were low-propensity voters, and we cracked the code to get them out to the polls.
[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/s/c/82Ip2QrWCaDdqOJsyQ4IU6EsCSLvCIFvKu9Ic_X1-BJIydheZOH2_QYNPWEOGbyaaOb3dPOz04n3f9gtjXyucE6TnErXLlQDwRbtJt-v8ELGofmeBVMavIPMhjurlDoq776G3TEv8dVjmcHfa-a78-BIWI8ntK3M6l_KvL0ehNL2Z8hX6JlOo5nzTnrtUbLOJ2ISAWE73UJmrg03RylJmXtOHhF4cuclhn1TYUlMm192e3K8JoTayD8Kv90xIOcZEWDvfOLZL5P1d0bM4vxHq3cEeff01o5qbS0Y03xogsCDuHzHepuMkT02EoSvqkL7Tk0-JFdoDnODngaC/Ok83hjHwmiHggq1JHtMG-utQp3gIKzXq/5)
Here is my big plan:

**I want to fund ballot chasers on the ground, even in off-year elections. Our ground game is the best. I am confident we can continue to win key elections for years to come, not just presidential elections.**

To expand our ballot-chasing operations, I am looking to raise $78,000 before the end of the month. As a thank you for your support, my team will send you a Turning Point exclusive “47” hat for contributing $25 or more.

[Can you donate $25, $50, $100, $250, $500, or ANY amount you can generously afford today? Non-Contribution Account (For TTPAC, Inc.’s Expenditures Other Than Direct Contributions to Federal Committees)

As permitted by law, TTPAC, Inc. maintains a non-contribution account for the purpose of influencing federal, state, and local elections. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, address, occupation, and employer of individuals whose contribution exceeds $200 in an election cycle. For contributions from federal committees, corporations, and labor unions - regardless of contribution amount - federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the committee’s name and address. State and local law may require us to collect and report additional information.

Contributions to this account may be used to influence federal elections by making independent expenditures in support of or in opposition to federal candidates. Additionally, in state and local jurisdictions that permit non-individual type (e.g., corporate) contributions directly to candidates and/or committees, contributions to this account may be used for both independent expenditures and direct contributions to candidates and/or committees, as permitted by state and local law.

Individuals, federal committees, corporations, and labor unions may contribute to TTPAC, Inc.’s non-contribution account without limit. Contributions by national banks, foreign nationals (without lawful permanent resident status), and other foreign entities (e.g., foreign corporations) are prohibited. Contributions to TTPAC, Inc.’s non-contribution account are not tax deductible for federal income tax purposes. Paid for by Turning Point PAC, Inc. (www.tppac.com) and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

name: National Republican Senatorial Committee
subject: Our two new Republican Senators
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
Ensure our new majority knows YOUR priorities.

Friend,

We have two NEW Republican Senators!

**[In Ohio, Lieutenant Governor Jon Husted was appointed to fill Vice President JD Vance's seat and in Florida, state Attorney General Ashley Moody was appointed to replace Secretary of State Marco Rubio.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=3f46f6bef9e04cf2905d029d316343e0&_e=SUtEKjeloMOFEYir5NNxLpfVHKkc52FY8YKMrgcVh7PueaTACdWKueA_h5An6Xhaul6YNFqDinsE5CMF4oHvT9e3_rIyG9V_at6qv8m4C7rxJU0sLBfySDepI2Zyubc3oQ9DEXR--qCErlppTZhX5FgHauewnTuMAETdoUcDlPTwjM0LNukfN0QFCeuctmA-PJy1_zhysVe22ZfwNGPhhz_is_S7UZezESv_1NL9gRyax1kRtEGDBIYZmDTYfqnS2Z7ngIRyToNLDjFTtlFK948ZmYQWrw68Sv5g4p6ZHBaMGIH8DF2dD_VoPjn1r7ZHd1k7NoRyDxFT10d1HR6IMTqd704sLaAGpyxM1DhYf82E9vRMzIV8KU0GsORvcF_j9ysMNnSERNBz9Vbf9NP2O0ku27D-pPQHdQn08w293KgGdzptSxI_qkNrgPI1M-g0d-u0qlzhm2xRljId050xxDITd-NwIHBayhcyOlb6Lx0%3D)**

With these two additions, our _NEW_ Senate majority is officially set until 2026!

_Now that our majority has been finalized, we wanted to make sure all our members are familiar with _YOUR_ top priorities, friend._

name: Congressman Troy Downing
subject: 969 arrests in ONE DAY
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Troy Downing for Congress
body:
We won’t stop until the border is secure

| | | [](https://trk.emails.troydowning.-2eyuX1dU23LQeiLqEVUQ)
---
|
---
Did you see the news, Peter? The Trump administration announced that 969 illegal immigrants were arrested in just ONE DAY. We’ve been asking for this for the last 4 years, and it's good to see law and order is back on the menu.

I also made border security a pillar of my campaign and will support this administration's moves at every step. But we still need to finish the job and secure our border once and for all.

With all the recent pushback from Democrats, we’re going to need the support of the American people to secure our border finally. **[**Will you spare a minute to sign your name and chip in to support finishing the border wall?**](https://trk.emails.troydowning.-iJtQ)**
---
[ FINISH THE WALL](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)
---
[ SIGN NOW](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)
---
Thank you for taking border security seriously and signing your name.
---
[](https://trk.emails.troydowning.--Z_-E7XUcdNQ5Gfg)
---
Congressman Troy Downing
---

**_MEMO FROM RUDY W. GIULIANI_**
---
ATTN: Friend,
---
Some have wondered if a Presidential Pardon could save me in the Arizona witch hunt where Democrats are trying to put me in prison for the rest of my life.
---
_**Unfortunately, because the charges are at the _state_ level, President Trump cannot grant a federal pardon to save me.**_
---
After a brutal loss last November, Democrats are seeking revenge, and they’ve turned me into their political punching bag.
---
_If they can’t take down President Trump, then they’ll gladly settle for his former attorney – yours truly!_
---
**And now they believe they’ve finally got me backed into a corner in this pardon-proof Arizona criminal case.**
---
But what the Left doesn’t understand is that I’m not defenseless and all on my own. _I’ve got countless patriots just like you, Friend, standing right by my side._
---
Thanks to your support, I was able to SAVE my home! Thanks to your support, Fani Willis has been REMOVED from the witch hunt against me and President Trump in Georgia.
---
_**And with your support right now, I will be able to prevail in the FINAL case against me where the Democrats wrongly think I have no chance at survival!**_
---

clean_body: The President can only pardon in federal cases. The President can only pardon in federal cases. | MEMO FROM RUDY W. GIULIANI ATTN: Friend, Some have wondered if a Presidential Pardon could save me in the Arizona witch hunt where Democrats are trying to put me in prison for the rest of my life. Unfortunately, because the charges are at the state level, President Trump cannot grant a federal pardon to save me. After a brutal loss last November, Democrats are seeking revenge, and they’ve turned me into their political punching bag. If they can’t take down President Trump, then they’ll gladly settle for his former attorney – yours truly! And now they believe they’ve finally got me backed into a corner in this pardon-proof Arizona criminal case. But what the Left doesn’t understand is that I’m not defenseless and all on my own. I’ve got countless patriots just like you, Friend, standing right by my side. Thanks to your support, I was able to SAVE my home! Thanks to your support, Fani Willis has been REMOVED from the witch hunt against me and President Trump in Georgia. And with your support right now, I will be able to prevail in the FINAL case against me where the Democrats wrongly think I have no chance at survival! Thank you and God bless you, Rudy Giuliani Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust The Republican Team PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522 | _

body:
Coming off the HUGE victories last November, I am ready to shift things into the next gear.

Friend,

Coming off the HUGE victories last November, I am ready to shift things into the next gear. I have BIG plans for Turning Point PAC.

I want to personally invite you to be a part of it.

First, let’s recap what we achieved in 2024:
* Hispanic voters swung heavily toward Republicans and President Trump
* The youth vote (18-29) swung MAJORLY to President Trump.
* Republicans swept the White House, Senate, and Congress!

Our ballot chasers were on the ground, turning out voters. These were low-propensity voters, and we cracked the code to get them out to the polls.
[](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/cGEhBEEynGc5RVm0TAMRdA~~/AARclBA~/H096xTA0_FJb654zl1tPlky59MxczUwRX9MEgKYcAoIt0KOstk_z9IW3w0FWLjTd-KmWVCQIpgwhFTranCh2PeBFPeF8BCaUfP7-71oLNUXyE4ma9eTb6QMTa-DXFChk1IXIZS71d5NLEeLJUFPYe2vXkWiRZqnjUZ-29TsHtzGzWdROYi5ALUxRlXFkWkEL)
Here is my big plan:

**I want to fund ballot chasers on the ground, even in off-year elections. Our ground game is the best. I am confident we can continue to win key elections for years to come, not just presidential elections.**

To expand our ballot-chasing operations, I am looking to raise $78,000 before the end of the month. As a thank you for your support, my team will send you a Turning Point exclusive “47” hat for contributing $25 or more.

[Can you donate $25, $50, $100, $250, $500, or ANY amount you can generously afford today? Non-Contribution Account (For TTPAC, Inc.’s Expenditures Other Than Direct Contributions to Federal Committees)

As permitted by law, TTPAC, Inc. maintains a non-contribution account for the purpose of influencing federal, state, and local elections. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, address, occupation, and employer of individuals whose contribution exceeds $200 in an election cycle. For contributions from federal committees, corporations, and labor unions - regardless of contribution amount - federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the committee’s name and address. State and local law may require us to collect and report additional information.

Contributions to this account may be used to influence federal elections by making independent expenditures in support of or in opposition to federal candidates. Additionally, in state and local jurisdictions that permit non-individual type (e.g., corporate) contributions directly to candidates and/or committees, contributions to this account may be used for both independent expenditures and direct contributions to candidates and/or committees, as permitted by state and local law.

Individuals, federal committees, corporations, and labor unions may contribute to TTPAC, Inc.’s non-contribution account without limit. Contributions by national banks, foreign nationals (without lawful permanent resident status), and other foreign entities (e.g., foreign corporations) are prohibited. Contributions to TTPAC, Inc.’s non-contribution account are not tax deductible for federal income tax purposes. Paid for by Turning Point PAC, Inc. (www.tppac.com) and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

body:
