clean_body: How MAGAs are undermining every aspect of our Republic as they march the United States towards fascism--and the actions we must take to stop them | | ---|---|--- | | | Forwarded this email? ? for more ? Thank you for being an awesome subscriber! When possible, I hope you'll consider upgrading to a $6/mo or $50/year subscription! How MAGAs are undermining every aspect of our Republic as they march the United States towards fascism--and the actions we must take to stop them | | | Feb 2 | | | | | | | | | | | | This Black History Month remember that human trafficking was legal. Slavery was legal. Jim Crow was legal. The US Government paying reparations to white enslavers and not to the enslaved was legal. Prison slavery is still legal. The lesson is--do not let legality and power be a measure of morality and justice. And this is the lesson to remember now as the new MAGA government dismantles every semblance of a functioning society under the guise of "law and order." Their acts are not only likely illegal, they are absolutely immoral and unjust. And unless we act with immediate urgency the damage done will be irreparable. What are these injustices, and how do we work with meaningful action to counter them? Let 's Address This. Earnest Ask! I am doing everything in my power to stave off fascism in the United States, and I need your support. Subscribe and join more than 107,000+ fellow activists. | | ---|---|--- A protester holds a sign that reads "Make Fascists Afraid Again!" during a demonstration at the University of Washington. [Credit: Ted S. Warren/AP] In just a few weeks, the Trump administration has unleashed some of the most sweeping assaults on democracy, civil rights, and global stability in modern history. Every move has been calculated to entrench authoritarian control, whether by punishing law enforcement officials who prosecuted insurrectionists, dismantling public health protections, handing over government power to billionaires, criminalizing diversity and thought, or upending global trade agreements. These are not the actions of a democratic leader--they are the hallmarks of a fascist regime. Here are seven of the most dangerous actions Trump has taken so far--and likewise--what actions can take to counter and protect from the harm he is causing. 1\. Handing an Unelected Billionaire Control Over Americans ' Financial Data Trump's Treasury Secretary, Scott Bessant, has granted Elon Musk full access to sensitive Treasury data, including Social Security and Medicare payment systems. Musk's cronies have reportedly blocked out government officials from their own systems. This means Musk, a private billionaire with no official government position, now has direct access to: Federal grant and loan distributions Social Security and Medicare benefits records Government contractor payments, including those that compete directly with Musk's companies This is blatant corruption. Musk previously publicly pressured Trump to fire the FAA administrator after the agency fined SpaceX for safety violations. The administrator was fired on January 20th. And we've already seen the devastation caused in air traffic. Two days later, Trump's Treasury Department handed Musk access to the most sensitive financial data in the country. A reminder once more that the President has zero authority to reallocate funds already appropriated by Congress for a particular purpose. And an unelected billionaire oligarch has even less than zero authority to hijack and reallocate funds. If Musk were an elected official, this would be a massive conflict of interest. Instead, it's something even worse: a billionaire oligarch being given unchecked power over Americans' financial information. If any other nation on Earth did this we'd consider it a coup. And that's what this is. This is a coup. A hostile takeover. A Constitutional crisis. Meanwhile, a reminder that 16 Democrats joined Republicans to confirm the billionaire hedge fund manager Bessant, who is now handing over the keys to our $28T economy to Musk. 2\. Weaponizing the Justice System: Firing FBI Officials Who Investigated the Insurrection This attempted purge of FBI officials involved in the prosecution of January 6th insurrectionists is of the most chilling early actions of the Trump regime. A reminder that Trump pardoned 1,500 white supremacist felons convicted for their role in the violent coup attempt. The people who stormed the Capitol in tactical gear, wore "Camp Auschwitz shirts," beat police officers to death, and openly called to execute public officials are now free to walk the streets, while the law enforcement officials who held them accountable are being punished for doing their jobs. Now, the Department of Justice has ordered the termination of eight senior FBI officials and demanded a list of every agent who worked on prosecuting January 6 insurrectionists. This is a direct authoritarian attack on law enforcement officials who dared to uphold the rule of law. In response, several of my contacts in the FBI leaked the following internal updates to me: When told they were being fired, the FBI executives refused to leave. The Agents Association advised the Administration that it was unlawful by statute. They told the Administration they are required full formal OPR [Office of Professional Responsibility] adjudication before dismissals as we are not political appointees. So the Administration threatened that "we will OPR you" and all executives said "go for it." Bottom line no one was walked out. The Administration backed down once they were threatened with legal action. They may OPR everyone but good luck with that. This makes me feel much better. Keeping you up to date. One of the first rules in resisting autocracy is "do not comply in advance." Therefore, it is encouraging to see that the targeted FBI officials have threatened legal action, which has temporarily halted the firings. The FBI has also refused to turn over the names of agents involved in January 6th cases until the DOJ provides a legal justification. As a reminder, this is the same tactic Trump used last week when he attempted to purge 17 Inspectors General. The IGs also responded by pointing out that Trump did not follow the legal procedure to fire them, and therefore refused to leave their posts. Finally, USDA Inspector General Phyllis Fong was forced to leave. This is courage in the face of fascism. Clearly, Trump does not support law enforcement. He only supports law enforcement when it is a tool to uphold white supremacy and silence dissent. 3\. Censoring Public Health: Erasing Critical Medical Information The Trump regime has purged crucial public health resources from government websites, an action that medical experts warn will cost lives. The Centers for Disease Control and Prevention (CDC) has removed: Contraception guidance HIV prevention and treatment resources Studies on mental health in transgender and nonbinary communities Data on bullying, suicide rates, and drug use in marginalized communities The Infectious Diseases Society of America has condemned these removals, stating that erasing HIV information directly undermines efforts to end the epidemic, and will lead to more death. Indeed, as we still recover from the deadly COVID pandemic, we know all too well how stripping access to health resources costs lives. This move by the Trump regime will kill people, and sadly that appears to be the point. 4\. Reviving Concentration Camps: 30,000 Migrants to Be Detained at Guantanamo Bay Trump's Department of Homeland Security (DHS) is preparing to detain up to 30,000 migrants at Guantanamo Bay in Cuba. This is not just a return to some of the darkest moments of U.S. history--it is an intentional echo of Executive Order 9066, which led to the mass internment of Japanese Americans during World War II. Already we see reports of , assuming they are "illegal" because of the color of their skin. Meanwhile DHS Secretary Noem, whom 6 Democrats joined Republicans to confirm, is on the streets with ICE assisting, even as IC raids of schools and hospitals. Yes, even children are not spared this cruelty, including sick children. For example, the Children's Hospital of Atlanta sent a notice to its entire staff to prepare for ICE raids, and provided guidance on how to remain calm when they show up. The Trump regime wants Americans to believe that "freedom" is targeting and arresting sick children at their most vulnerable point in life. Barbaric. And for those who claim that "America is becoming 1930s Germany", let's remember that in the 1930s, Hitler sent his lawyers to study U.S. segregation laws, ultimately to model his own genocidal policies. America was Hitler's blueprint, and shockingly, Hitler's lawyers reported back to him that the U.S. segregation laws were in fact "too extreme, even for Nazis." (The pre-eminent book on this topic is Hitler 's American Model by Princeton Professor James Q Whitman). Trump is not "copying 1930s Germany," but reviving 1920s America--the America of Jim Crow, immigration bans, women's oppression, and state-sanctioned racial violence. That is what "MAGA" has always meant. 5\. Shutting Down Humanitarian Aid: USAID Purge The Trump regime has virtually dismantled the U.S. Agency for International Development (USAID)--the agency responsible for providing humanitarian aid to people in crisis worldwide. At least 56 senior USAID officials have been placed on administrative leave, while over $1 billion in critical aid has been frozen. This means: Food assistance for starving children has been blocked Medical aid for war-torn regions has been suspended Disaster relief programs have been dismantled All of this is being carried out under Secretary of State Marco Rubio, whom Democrats joined Republicans in unanimously confirming 99-0. This is not just MAGA cruelty--it is bipartisan complacency. 6\. Igniting a Trade War: Tariffs That Will Crush Consumers Trump has recklessly imposed a 25% tariff on all goods from Canada and Mexico and a 10% tariff on all imports from China. These tariffs are scheduled to go live on Tuesday at midnight February 4 Let's be clear: Tariffs are not paid by foreign governments or foreign companies. They are paid by American consumers. And unsurprisingly, Canada and Mexico have already announced retaliatory tariffs: Canada is imposing 25% tariffs on $155 billion worth of U.S. exports Mexico is planning tariffs on U.S. pork, cheese, fresh produce, and steel This will skyrocket prices for consumers while crushing American businesses that rely on exports. Trump either doesn't understand basic economics or doesn't care how much working people suffer. At a time of historically high wealth and income inequality, this reckless move will further crush working people. 7\. The Ideological Purge: Attacking DEI and Silencing Journalists As , Trump is purging non-white officials, political opponents, women, and journalists from federal agencies and the Pentagon. Specifically, since taking office, he has: Canceled student visas for pro-Palestinian protesters, a clear First Amendment violation Ordered Politico, the New York Times, and NBC to vacate their Pentagon offices, and has replaced them with OANN, Breitbart, and the New York Post--right wing outlets with a history of bias and disinformation Attempted to force out federal employees who are not ideologically aligned with the "Trump agenda" Purged all DEIA verbiage, actions, and initiatives from all Federal agencies, and openly demonized Black and brown people, disabled people, and women as the cause of America's problems This is not about government reform. It is about creating a one-party fascist state where Trump controls the media, purges opposition, and rules with unchecked power. How Do We Respond With Meaningful Action? "So what do we do?" is a question I receive dozens of times per day. I answer in detail below. To be sure, the worst thing we can do is give up. Autocrats want capitulation through exhaustion and compliance through fear. Do not give them that fuel. Instead, in response to the 7 fascist actions cited above, I offer below 7 acts we can take to enact meaningful change for justice. Even if you don't know where to begin or don't have expendable funds, you can play a meaningful role. Some of these action items below have immediate effect and others take time. I ask you to engage in both. 1. Federal Employees -- Use All Legal Means At Your Disposal: The eight FBI agent executives and the 17 Inspectors Generals refusing to comply in advance with unlawful firings are two excellent examples to follow. As federal employees, you have rights and protections. Contact employment attorneys in your area and speak to labor rights organizations. Understand your rights and know your rights. Get in good trouble, as John Lewis reminds us. Fight tooth and nail for your position, as your actions set a precedent for the future. Set the precedent of resisting autocratic terminations. Use your full constitutional protections to drag out every case imaginable and clog up the legal system for the Trump regime. If even 10% of the 2.3 million federal employees stand united and resist through the court system, you will slow down Trump autocracy. Do not capitulate to autocracy, combat autocracy with the full power of the law. 2. Democrats in Congress - Do Something More Than Tweet Your Outrage: Your constituents are angry, tired, and confused at your apathy, silence, and lack of organization. For your convenience, I have a short list of questions that should not be hard to answer: 1. Who is your party leader who should be coordinating all counter-fascism efforts and calling the shots on how to protect the American people? 2. Where are the daily press conferences and media blitzes documenting Trump's fascism? 3. Where are the courageous protests by Members of Congress on the Capitol steps like former Congresswoman Cori Bush held in 2020 to protest the end of the rent moratorium during COVID? 4. Where are the Senate investigations into Trump's corruption and Musk's illegal access to the Treasury? How are you protecting our sensitive data? 5. Where are the guidances on what to do if our care is denied or the resources on getting accurate healthcare information removed from the CDC website? Where are the guidances if our SNAP, TANF, or Section 8 is denied? 6. Where are the barrage of lawsuits to clog up Trump's fascist Executive Orders? For example, between lawsuits and floor votes, Republicans have attempted to repeal the ACA more than 100 times, even when in the minority, and now they might finally succeed in doing so. If Republicans can organize this effectively to strip our healthcare, why can't you organize even half this effectively to protect our human rights? Moreover, as Indivisible Co-Executive Director Leah Greenberg excellently : Democrats can oppose all Trump nominees, deny unanimous consent to slow senate proceedings, vote no on all cloture, force quorum calls at every chance. It's a constitutional crisis. There is absolutely no reason the Senate should be connecting business as usual. All of the above actions are wholly within Democrat control, even as the minority party --yet we see virtually none of it. Stop hiding behind the excuse of being a minority party, and start working with the awesome power of Congress afforded to you. 3. Everyone - Activate: Get involved in your local politics, which affects you more than most realize. Whether it is your local school board, your local city council, or your local immigrant rights organization--get involved. Show up to the next meeting, meet your local elected officials, and, for example, make sure you have a local policy on how to counter ICE raids in your local schools, shelters, and hospitals. Google is your friend in finding a local calendar of events. Use it. 4. Everyone - Communicate: Contact your member of Congress () and relentlessly remind them that you do not support Trump's fascist agenda. Even if they are not willing to listen to you, inundate them with calls, texts, and emails. Ensure they hear your outrage as much as possible. Here's a sample email to send to protest the illegal FBI firings (and illegal federal terminations in general): Hi, my name is [insert name] and I live in [city/town/zip code]. I am a constituent of Congressman/Senators [name] and I am calling to strongly oppose the firing of any rank-and-file FBI agents, and any federal civil service employees, that are suspected to happen by the White House and DOJ. I am asking Congressman/Senator [name] to contact DOJ and White House leadership to demand they stop any planned action into these unjust firings and forced resignations. Unlike political appointees, line FBI agents are non-partisan federal government employees that are assigned to investigate any allegation of federal crime and they do so without any bias. Firings of these agents sets a dangerous precedent that retribution could take place if a rank-and-file FBI agent investigates a federal crime. This would fundamentally damage the core of our country's premier law enforcement agency -- that justice is blind. In addition, the mass firings of FBI agents would also indefinitely halt thousands of cases into violent criminals and gangs, drug tracking organizations and cartels, and terrorists, which is a something that this Administration has promised to focus on. I strongly believe civil service protections for line FBI agents help them maintain independence from external influence or pressure from any outside group, person, or political party, no matter what side. This issue is of the upmost priority for my representative to take action on this immediately and is something I will pay close attention to as the upcoming elections come around. 5. Everyone - Invest: Invest your time and your money into the people and organizations doing the front line work. If you have time to volunteer, make phone calls, knock doors, and sign petitions, do so. If you have the financial resources to donate to organizations working to protect our democracy, especially local orgs, please do so. Even a few dollars a month, if you can afford it, goes a long way. And as always, consider running for office yourself. And especially if you're under 40, reach out to to get started. 6. Everyone - Educate: It is critical we remain informed on the key issues, by educating ourselves and those around us. As corporate media sadly continues to capitulate to fascism, support writers and human rights lawyers working to stop fascism in America (e.g. ). Read the work of non-profit media like ProPublica, The Appeal, and more. We may not have the billions of dollars in autocrat dark money, but we have strength in numbers and your support makes that difference. 7. Everyone - Organize: Bring friends with you. You are the best ambassador for justice in your friend group--lead by example. Grab even one friend and drag them with you to the next school board meeting, city council session, next phone banking session to an elected official, or town hall in your local community. We need to build organizational capacity, and means each one reaches one to get involved. This also means consider joining the General Strike that so far nearly 200,000 Americans have joined. The goal is to reach 11 million Americans. You can find out more at . Conclusion The Southern Strategy never stopped. Capitulation to MAGA fascism is made possible because so many are willing to embrace culture wars to distract from economic injustices as long as it gives them the perception of racial superiority over Black and brown people. We need to reject these culture wars and recognize that billionaire oligarchs will undermine the humanity in all of us, left or right, if it makes them a few extra bucks. We need unity in this time of crisis. The only way to fight back is through relentless resistance, organization, and action, as I've described above. It is imperative we remember what justice looks like--because none of this is just--and continue to fight for that justice. I will continue to document and expose these autocratic attacks as they unfold, and I encourage you to act on the action items mentioned above. Again--do not let legality and power be a measure of morality and justice. And finally, I need and welcome your continued support to advance my human rights advocacy. Resist. Activate. Communicate. Invest. Educate. Organize. Subscribe. And share. Thank you for your trust in this battle for democracy itself. Before you go. I am doing everything in my power to stave off fascism under this new administration. I cannot do it alone. Subscribe below and join the movement. | | ---|---|--- Quick Ask! I am doing everything in my power over the next four years to stave off fascism in the United States, and I need your support.Become a paid subscriber and join the movement.** | | | | | | | (C) 2025 Qasim Rashid, Esq. 1552 South Route 59 #1333 Naperville, IL 60564 ? ?

President Trump just disbanded a federal school safety board that *he* created after the Parkland shooting where 17 people died.
#

Friends,
President Trump has disbanded a federal school safety advisory board, which was created by Trump himself after the Parkland shooting where 17 people died. The goal of the advisory board was to help share resources and best practices related to school safety—an incredibly vital area of work, considering there were 330 shootings at schools in 2024.
Between this and his apparent dissolution of the federal Office of Gun Violence Prevention, it’s clear that President Trump is choosing the gun lobby over saving lives.
We’re hard at work urging the Trump Administration to reconstitute the federal school safety advisory board, and we need your help to fuel this critical effort.
[**So please: If you’re ready to join us in this crucial fight, will you make a $3 contribution to GIFFORDS PAC today?**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-feb25.m4Qwdn&refcode=em250202-1-b&t=1&akid=9923%2E3935704%2E9urJRr)

clean_body: President Trump just disbanded a federal school safety board that he created after the Parkland shooting where 17 people died. Friends, President Trump has disbanded a federal school safety advisory board, which was created by Trump himself after the Parkland shooting where 17 people died. The goal of the advisory board was to help share resources and best practices related to school safety—an incredibly vital area of work, considering there were 330 shootings at schools in 2024. Between this and his apparent dissolution of the federal Office of Gun Violence Prevention, it’s clear that President Trump is choosing the gun lobby over saving lives. We’re hard at work urging the Trump Administration to reconstitute the federal school safety advisory board, and we need your help to fuel this critical effort. If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly: | | ** | | | | | | | ** Thank you for taking a stand. We can’t allow President Trump to betray Parkland families and their tireless advocacy to protect kids in schools. \- Team GIFFORDS Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org

A resurfaced video of then-Senator **[JD Vance grilling Biden's woke FAA Administrator Billy Nolen](https://substack.com/redirect/63a646d9-6a53-451b-8f15-b1b70ad1f876?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** is now more relevant than ever amid last week's tragic plane collision and questions of DEI hiring leading to unsafe flight travel.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/63a646d9-6a53-451b-8f15-b1b70ad1f876?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Vance questioned Nolen about the FAA's push to remove gendered language from their protocol's in order to be more "inclusive." Nolen stood firmly behind the initiative and said inclusivity should be a priority to recruit the new generation of pilots.
"The next generation of people who get into aerospace, they won't look like the people sitting in this room," Nolen told vance. "Our ability to find inclusive ways to reach underrepresented groups is a right path to be on."
Vance was not buying this answer for a second, "If there is a pilot who is offended by the word 'wife' or 'cockpit' maybe that person shouldn't be a pilot!"
**[Watch the tense exchange here:](https://substack.com/redirect/63a646d9-6a53-451b-8f15-b1b70ad1f876?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**

For showing up and believing, even when things feel dark, that we can fight back and celebrate some wins along the way — like our down-ballot victories in Virginia and Minnesota last month. There’s still a long road ahead, but today, I just want to say: I’m grateful for you. In solidarity, xx Jane

name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: Thank you, Peter!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Meeting this goal was critical to rallying the public against the worst of the MAGA agenda and building our progressive movement.
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20250202-4723-footer&t=1&akid=4723%2E420207%2E4As-MS)
Thank you, thank you, thank you, Peter!
As my team has mentioned, fundraising has been down for the past few months. But in the last couple of weeks, this grassroots team really stepped up — and **we met our January fundraising goal** as a result.
Donald Trump has only been in office for two weeks, and already he’s made it clear that he’s not interested in lowering prices or making life easier for working people. **Instead, he’s focused on enriching his gang of billionaire friends.**
Meeting this goal was critical to rallying the public against the worst of the MAGA agenda and building our progressive movement, so I couldn’t be more grateful for your support.
But that was just one of many goals we’ll need to meet in the coming months if we’re going to take back control of Congress and pass a **bold, populist, working class agenda.** And I’m counting on your support to reach all of them.
[**If you’d like to help us get a head start on our February goal, please click here to pitch in $3 or whatever amount you can right now.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250202?refcode=em20250202-4723&amount=3&refcode2=4723_420207_4As-MS&akid=4723%2E420207%2E4As-MS)
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250202?amount=3&refcode=em20250202-4723&refcode2=4723_420207_4As-MS&akid=4723%2E420207%2E4As-MS)**
Thanks again,
Pramila Jayapal
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20250202-4723-footer&t=2&refcode2=4723_420207_4As-MS&akid=4723%2E420207%2E4As-MS)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.

Ritchie Torres represents the future of the Democratic Party. Raised by a single mother in public housing, Ritchie personally understands the hardships that working families endure. At age 25, Ritchie made history as the youngest elected official to serve on the New York City Council. He fought tirelessly for the working families of The Bronx, and now, he's fighting for those families and for progressive values in Congress. He is the first openly gay Afro Latino ever elected to Congress. Ritchie is a champion for progressive policies to fight poverty and to improve the lives of families just like the one he was raised in.

# [Make Your Voices Heard - Protect Local Zoning](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1454853&post_id=156215582&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTU2MjE1NTgyLCJpYXQiOjE3Mzg1MTU3NjEsImV4cCI6MTc0MTEwNzc2MSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTE0NTQ4NTMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.4AEut8K-Xv5ANgLxpTq6kodXgHJvV1SOiv5POjFQMvI)
### You can submit testimony for Monday's hearing
| | [Jonathan Goldstein](https://substack.com/@jonathangoldstein81) and [Dr. Michael Goldstein](https://substack.com/@drmichaelgoldsteinct)
---
| Feb 2
---
| [](https://substack.com/@jonathangoldstein81)| | [](https://substack.com/@drmichaelgoldsteinct)

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1454853&post_id=156215582&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTU2MjE1NTgyLCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTczODUxNTc2MSwiZXhwIjoxNzQxMTA3NzYxLCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMTQ1NDg1MyIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.ZImGiSuEkPl81nQ6qlleUbonSS9P63CxYfU6sTK1kfQ&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)

| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/drmichaelgoldstein4ct/p/make-your-voices-heard-protect-local?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

As you may recall, the the "Work Live Ride" zoning proposal was defeated thanks to the Connecticut Republicans last year.
[Pledge your support](https://substack..Q8xLfuaimoCoW9vCsgTNNgLDtih97Lz0RSlHNHXM5kA?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=156215582)
[Share](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1454853&post_id=156215582&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTU2MjE1NTgyLCJpYXQiOjE3Mzg1MTU3NjEsImV4cCI6MTc0MTEwNzc2MSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTE0NTQ4NTMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.4AEut8K-Xv5ANgLxpTq6kodXgHJvV1SOiv5POjFQMvI)
| [](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/41897d91-3587-423e-a846-9b1b82c1861f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Like any bad bill in Connecticut, they get re-treaded and put back for consideration and now with a Supermajority in the House and Senate in Hartford for the democrats, it is back for the passing - **UNLESS YOU SPEAK UP.**
The proposal, [HB6831](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/24389906-f70b-4720-83d7-a089a6db4a6b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), would require municipalities to adopt as-of-right development for up to 10 units around/near bus or train stations or deprive municipalities of their eligibility for hundreds of millions of dollars in state funding. **THESE THREATS MUST STOP.**
The 4th Congressional District sends billions in taxpayer dollars to Hartford every year and your taxation gets you limited representation. There are a handful of sensible State Representatives and State Senators that actually represent our interests and fight for local control of our towns. The rest want a dictatorship from Hartford telling us what to do. The Power to make this stop is IN YOUR HANDS.
This latest round of a bill forces our downtowns to put up developments or withhold the limited state funds that come back into the district.
We have fought hard to bring this issue to your attention and push for local control and the only real way to improve housing is to leave it in the hands of your local towns while making Connecticut affordable with home ownership opportunities (not Rentals), make the commutes better on I-95, increase jobs in the district and make your electric bill affordable again. This latest bill is another run-around of 8-30g and enough is enough. - See our past article on 8-30g [here ](https://open.substack.com/pub/drmichaelgoldstein4ct/p/how-i-will-work-on-local-housing?r=26c3ku&utm_campaign=post&utm_medium=web&showWelcomeOnShare=false)\- You should also check out CT-169 Strong [here ](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/7f6a7433-1a2a-49e4-810c-d0f07ab73e2d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
If you are reading this, then you can make a difference and impact the discussion from the convenience of your armchair. **In this rare instance, armchair avengers can spread this like wildfires on social media and inundate Hartford with testimony.**
Please testify against Work Live Ride and in favor of local control of housing decisions. **The live hearing is Monday Feb. 3rd starting at 10:30AM.**

To sign up to testify over Zoom or in person, do so [HERE](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/5aeebe5f-141c-4373-82e3-2933639d0531?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).

To submit written testimony, do so [HERE](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/df68522f-deb8-471f-a99a-583b5b559021?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
Here is a canned testimony if you need some talking points:
Dear Senate and House representatives of Connecticut.

My name is ____________ and I am a resident of the town of _____________.

I am writing this testimony in opposition to HB6831 concerning transit oriented communities and development as of right in downtown areas that are located near bus transit or rapid transit areas. I have a real problem with legislators making housing decisions for my community when they do not live there and threatened to withhold sending back tax revenues if they failed to comply with legislation such as this one. **This is classic overreaching.**
The opt-in options required by this bill would force a town like mine to surrender local decision making to some zoning coordinator that would overrule local zoning boards. Our town actually takes into consideration meaningful objections by neighbors and other impacted residents which would disappear under HB 6831.
I know that local control of zoning and housing development is in the best interest of my community and such overarching control by Hartford will cause developments that will cause unintended consequences such as increased traffic, increased frustration, and increase friction among neighborhoods or such larger developments and do not fit in with the landscape.

We already have similar developments in my town, and the majority of my fellow neighbors are not pleased with the results.

I strongly object to this bill in favor of local zoning. Enough is enough.

Sincerely ___________
**Thank you for your continued support. Please subscribe and spread the word.**
Dr. Michael Goldstein & Jonathan Goldstein
_The father-son team continues on_ so please spread the word and lets really rebuild CT together in a meaningful way.
Please subscribe and support.

name: Rashida Tlaib
subject: Re: Trump’s trying to dismantle 60 years of civil rights protections.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress
body:
I introduced legislation to restore and expand protections in our country’s crucial civil rights laws. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.X6XUC7u8ppFLNtMO_55SZlNseb7gEYIOhm_EWnhzEOZKmTtnV3k2h4V2x_O3H7rdW2az5rgktBwzxQ8Ml9Wgkmv85qW-UsBonL4KRa0bcNqdICU6T3NBDdNIZG7w7wEWeg0M-9XNSrKG7P3vQzAe1eM_C55vbVD1DoerAMpMtiMvEtFDqBRbKHuVlUxG9N7pDcDraKiN5bHsAhvVl7WRy4SgC5JYuGHcPP7EzAMaRqwa3qRs3vceKeQu63WvoDQPhVdQB9lMSZ4VPFGlmitB4vZFZ9KoaUcRlPsKAxqOBp-y6XiuBQWwg9BIky8lV_pCIEmHwIxFOtjjfd5Of-Z2X7Mfoo4A7_-wlkhgnHi9Doqmbgs0p8q1wze5a-pHZlK0/4do/03Cap9MkQxKNB_ZwpmDgvA/h0/h001.Zj451WhSNTjVppjGT4QZLy7Uq_jQ0YrhaXQTMEUKpUk)
---
Friend, The Trump administration is anti-Black. **As we begin Black History Month, the White House is blocking the Justice Department’s civil rights division from doing its duty to protect Americans from discrimination.** Author and 1619 Project creator Nikole Hannah-Jones recently explained, _“I and many others warned that the anti-CRT, anti-DEI propaganda campaign that so many embraced or downplayed was always about creating the narrative for and paving the way for a larger attack on civil rights. We are here.”_ Already, decades of conservative court rulings have watered down our crucial civil rights laws such as the _Civil Rights Act of 1964_ and the _Fair Housing Act of 1968_. To strengthen and restore the original intent of these laws, I have continually introduced the _Justice For All Act_ in Congress. Now it’s more urgent than ever to pass this kind of legislation. If passed, the _Justice For All Act_ would:
* Give our communities more tools to fight back against discrimination and expand the rights of millions of Americans
* Support victims of discriminatory impact (regardless of intent) by ensuring they receive the compensation they deserve and the attorney’s fees necessary to allow civil rights lawyers to take up their cases
* End qualified immunity for government employees, including police officers
* Prohibit racial and gender profiling in police investigations and activity
* Clarify the definition of “race” to include race-related traits like hair texture
* And more!

[**Amid escalating attacks on Black Americans, please sign on to demand Congress expand civil rights protections and restore the original intent of our civil rights laws.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm381rcfdHkIQD_K7aziRYYN5JnjCSGCZTnsLdyHpqfDBgkdDXMeslnPy0L0Jb1EFUNswAyrVJIAAX3_KU8h9zpIZy7gEBbFSmG8Ibr-ilSm4ErLpuKkFMXmfZMAij41h8nt1m4IxM15_FgEIpabj5H7BRoWdVhAr1ItGtpMONBIJN8RULuc6r8TLjk_iE-AaITB4KTcxBfXl-E9yOzNHXVb-6jwC14VM_toDsPbhLovJ6i2GI-VkdGCsk_L3aGtSNKfgrhrDQfvMOyKDzXZpioPjOAFtnbHlQfjQxaiZzbycFqb8AhA3lNydHkKgyPcxIF101HTx8kYWiI16HGPgMMIpZ5Hiw2NW54bEIQkMsV5PNcZ492XqLaMt_H9joVLB1r2fAgV9GuvHlCplZvBnjmnMSCiZ4pUO6xJ73OMemS8rs1fFLc_DlxOnE_7ZiYZ91rE/4do/03Cap9MkQxKNB_ZwpmDgvA/h1/h001.vxNKMVUtulxRaNVGmB1euUVJSRibN_xHCIJWtBs8Ntk) | [SIGN ON](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm381rcfdHkIQD_K7aziRYYN5JnjCSGCZTnsLdyHpqfDBgkdDXMeslnPy0L0Jb1EFUNswAyrVJIAAX3_KU8h9zpIZy7gEBbFSmG8Ibr-ilSm4ErVWdDObqbgVz3j6JeZfgwVKPvYMnPWrsLeps944JBQ1uFzpE5budn6NXjDTqfqRt_TI8gN2MQ6J_c3VSSRNHqxgjFAu0qyx-j_A-FmaOSGJIY5tX6GzVOTnhKfG9twN615r-nqyZXTM6lw9emTvkEfzgbMJek4l_Udigh1776Oex4nsWp6eeH-f2f7Yc6HXEj0kw5Xt_VrahQquXMKmmwIYJVoKakASYBoVgOsk8uogVQ4Z-y6tUGLTLu7MCkf11d3td-lr7sdbiAUCLJEBWR8UmEIHYOrtf0-jWpwwHSEtJ9EBVJB4SqNSqBRPV9Zm53TtNSuFsWky5_Nkbv0xp4w/4do/03Cap9MkQxKNB_ZwpmDgvA/h2/h001.bm88HnBN1m9yFW6hixJ2_1vUOkZCtuSL9LyNKa-ruAg)

Built into our country’s institutions, systemic anti-Black racism leads to staggering health and education inequities, as well as the unjust over-policing and over-incarceration of Black communities. We must reckon with and repair these outrageous injustices, including the still-expanding wealth gap between Black and white families.
**I’m working in Congress to expand Black homeownership, end redlining in mortgages and auto insurance, protect Black maternal health, enact reparations for Black Americans, and more.** Together, we will keep pushing back against the ideology of white supremacy and build a country with a truly multi-racial democracy where everyone can thrive with dignity.
As activist and teacher Brittney Cooper recently wrote, _“In this moment there are an abundance of ways to resist. All of them matter.”_ She said, _“We need each other. Pick up the phone and call someone you love today... Our current regime has no regard for us and this is why we must, we must, have it for each other.”_ Please know that you are loved, and you will always have a partner and ally in me.
Always fighting for you,
Rashida

From: **Rashida Tlaib******
Date: Sat, Feb 1, 2025
Subject: Trump’s trying to dismantle 60 years of civil rights protections.
To: dpwillis67@gmail.com
Friend,
Today is the beginning of Black History Month, and anti-Black racism is at a fever pitch. **Through illegal and unconstitutional actions, Trump is trying to dismantle 60 years of civil rights protections and halt the Justice Department’s civil rights enforcement, in addition to suspending federal support for equity programs and trying to block teachers from talking about race in schools.**
Our country is rooted in systemic racism, but we have powerful tools to protect people from discrimination thanks to Black activists and movements led by Black folks in this country, including the Civil Rights Movement. Unfortunately, decades of conservative court rulings have undermined these hard-fought civil rights protections, and now the racists in the White House are further attacking our rights and our communities.
In response to the right-wing assault on marginalized communities, I partnered with civil rights attorneys in my district to introduce the _Justice For All Act_ , which would restore and strengthen the protections in our country’s crucial civil rights laws: the _Civil Rights Act of 1964_ , the _Fair Housing Act of 1968_ , the _Age Discrimination Act of 1975_ , the _Rehabilitation Act of 1973_ , and _Title IX of the Education Amendments of 1972_.
We must urgently pass legislation like the _Justice For All Act_ , which would prohibit actions that have a discriminatory effect (regardless of any discriminatory intent) and give people more tools to combat discrimination in the courts—including rejected mortgage applications, unfair car insurance rates, racial profiling by the police, and workplace discrimination against race-related traits like hair texture.

But the Left doesn't respect the will of the people, so they'll stoop to all kinds of dirty tactics to sabotage the confirmation process. Enough is enough, Peter. We need to start fighting back IMMEDIATELY if we 're going to overcome the Democrats' plot to sabotage his second presidency. Now, we need your help to reinforce his message by flooding Washington with petitions from millions of grassroots Americans like YOU echoing President Trump's call. [_**Peter, I was officially sworn in as House Democratic Leader. Now, I’m asking you to help me lead Democrats in a historic fundraising day – 3,000 donations before midnight – to show we stand ready to hold MAGA Republicans accountable and win back the House majority for Democrats. I can’t tell you how much it would mean to see your donation >>**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101429306/525928454/1662333048?amount=15&refcode=20250202_em_fr_b1_jeffries_main_rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzM0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NTYzM2U0Mi04OWUxLWVmMTEtODhmOC0wMDIyNDgyYTk3ZTkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=s_eCHOqo4_uwXlzFoutEAmz6YpA6DYLDEgLbHSdGkJQ=)
[**Peter, as Democratic Leader, I want to take a moment to share our priorities this Congress.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101429307/525928455/1662333048?amount=15&refcode=20250202_em_fr_b1_jeffries_main_rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzM0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NTYzM2U0Mi04OWUxLWVmMTEtODhmOC0wMDIyNDgyYTk3ZTkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=s_eCHOqo4_uwXlzFoutEAmz6YpA6DYLDEgLbHSdGkJQ=)
House Democrats will work with anyone to lower the high cost of living in the United States of America once and for all.
As Democrats, our promise to the American people is that we will fight hard to make sure that no one takes away Social Security or Medicare from the American people that they earned – not now, not ever. [**_No means never_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101429308/525928456/1662333048?amount=15&refcode=20250202_em_fr_b1_jeffries_main_rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzM0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NTYzM2U0Mi04OWUxLWVmMTEtODhmOC0wMDIyNDgyYTk3ZTkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=s_eCHOqo4_uwXlzFoutEAmz6YpA6DYLDEgLbHSdGkJQ=).
Our position is that it is not acceptable to cut Social Security, cut Medicare, cut Medicaid, cut veterans’ benefits or cut nutritional assistance from children and families to pay for massive tax breaks for billionaires and wealthy corporations.
[**I’m leading House Democrats forward as we fight for opportunity in every single zip code and an economy that works for everyone. We’re not wasting a single second getting to work.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101429309/525928457/1662333048?amount=15&refcode=20250202_em_fr_b1_jeffries_main_rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzM0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NTYzM2U0Mi04OWUxLWVmMTEtODhmOC0wMDIyNDgyYTk3ZTkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=s_eCHOqo4_uwXlzFoutEAmz6YpA6DYLDEgLbHSdGkJQ=)
That's why I'm asking for a historic surge of support – 3,000 Democratic donations before midnight – to lay the groundwork for Democrats to reclaim the House and continue to get big things done for the American people. Can I count on your $15?

Now, as the top Democrat in the House, he’s fighting to stop MAGA extremism and reclaim the majority for Democrats.

Hakeem is committed to electing a record number of Democrats in the next election and beyond. But he can’t compete with Republicans’ special interest cash without our support. clean_body: | | | = = = House Democrats will work with anyone to lower the high cost of living in the United States of America once and for all. As Democrats, our promise to the American people is that we will fight hard to make sure that no one takes away Social Security or Medicare from the American people that they earned – not now, not ever. =. Our position is that it is not acceptable to cut Social Security, cut Medicare, cut Medicaid, cut veterans’ benefits or cut nutritional assistance from children and families to pay for massive tax breaks for billionaires and wealthy corporations. = That's why I'm asking for a historic surge of support – 3,000 Democratic donations before midnight – to lay the groundwork for Democrats to reclaim the House and continue to get big things done for the American people. Can I count on your $15? | = = | = = | = = House Democrats will continue to find common ground when possible, fight extremism when necessary and always put People over Politics. = This is our best shot to show how unified Democrats are. = Keep the faith, Hakeem Hakeem Jeffries is the Democratic Leader of the U.S. House of Representatives. Like many of us, Hakeem was raised by a working-class family; His mom was a social worker and his dad was a substance abuse counselor. Now, as the top Democrat in the House, he’s fighting to stop MAGA extremism and reclaim the majority for Democrats. Hakeem is committed to electing a record number of Democrats in the next election and beyond. But he can’t compete with Republicans’ special interest cash without our support. Is there any way you could chip in to help? = We know you’re getting a lot of emails, but that’s because Democrats have a clear path to winning back the House – and Hakeem isn’t letting a single second go to waste. Jeffries for Congress PO BOX 65322 Washington, DC 20035 United States | mailto:info@hakeemjeffries.com | | | Paid for by Jeffries for Congress

name: Steve Daines
subject: I don’t have the luxury of time
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Steve Daines for Montana
body:
I spent all of 2024 leading the fight to retake the Senate Majority, ending the Democrats’ four catastrophic years in the Majority. |
---
[](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=2aecc186a2a54a26b2d3777cd3f6ea80&_e=3xfRXU0Qmk4XD4uNhpYhrqlV5qJgypGwSHDGT6SPus2kHc5mkrpZjm6iVosTSMPot6PPX4Whm0dayY1jecJ8zcm8k_4hlWrNHKhbJERcwhYsWcOY7vMyfThd60MsCDcRRZD6PFqtpwuTb-1f3jipe3IwdRNabgFEIHZBSXNgPnXRroiJTOh1KyczxXruQqOtRLDk8J3j0MaHiIVow6fltBSISb05elBSBvM-_-EcewJs1vcvJmGKwE2oIHe-r1oSJKm4l9Xmh0XJ8l12DUHx0Y_vWlnF-23TrIkNFpXGxBKTSc_8mVzx5ASw4s0Fpz2odkbidASNhHTogavsR98HVWSDvfC3_IiDGwJXpzYrc6Juuhy55vM7vWpD4IoFwy4v5Z8w07OUDZLtBjr3GayVDd1y3oZMINZq5b5Flk-3clbdIHFiQpUMbhWqQ65t9kPz)
Fellow American,

I spent all of 2024 leading the fight to retake the Senate Majority, ending the Democrats’ four catastrophic years in the Majority.

Here is the good news - _WE WON!_

Now, here is the bad news - **This made me the Democrats’ #1 target in 2026.**

If we’re going to hold our Senate Majority, we need to keep this Montana seat RED in 2026, and Democrats have already rushed a candidate into this race. **Chuck Schumer is going all in to defeat me in 2026.**

[**That’s why I’m asking you to become one of the founding donors for my 2026 re-election campaign. name: Adam Schiff
subject: A lot in store
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
|
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=8282%2E5257348%2EGmAd0b)
Derek —
It’s been less than two months since I was sworn in, and the reality of this job — its urgency, its responsibility — sets in more each day.
In Southern California, wildfires have devastated entire communities. I’ve spent much of my time there, meeting with the families who lost everything, the first responders and firefighters risking their lives, FEMA and the Small Business Administration, and the local leaders doing everything they can to help people piece their lives back together.
I launched a one-stop site with resources for those affected, and I am conducting oversight, even as I push for every federal dollar possible to rebuild–because the recovery can’t wait.
Back in Washington, I took my seat on the Senate Judiciary Committee and started reviewing Trump’s nominees. I questioned Pam Bondi, his pick for Attorney General, and Kash Patel, his nominee for FBI Director, about their undying loyalty to Trump and their willingness (or lack thereof) to defend the rule of law. Their responses were...disappointing and extreme to say the least. A threat to our democracy and the rule of law would be more apt.
And yes, I was there to watch the surreal moment when Trump was sworn in inside the Capitol — **where insurrectionists stormed the building just a few years prior.** Seated near him? None other than some of the richest men in the world: Including Elon Musk, and, bizarrely, the CEO of TikTok — sending a message about the priority he places on his propaganda machine, and who this administration is really working for. Now we understand why there was such a lack of talking about working families and lowering costs in his speech.
**We have a lot in store for this year.**
**And I know how overwhelming and exhausting this moment can feel — every day brings another crisis brought on by another illegal or unconscionable act of the Trump Administration. But what they want is for us to be distracted by the chaos. They would love nothing more than for us to chase every crazy squirrel (Greenland, Panama Canal, Gulf of America), instead of picking the most consequential fights and being proactive.**
But look at what happened with the federal funding freeze this week? When we came together and immediately fought back, and fought back hard, we delivered the Trump admin their first major blow. Now, their letter rescinding the order was... rescinded. But not for long and not without confusion and alarm. Nevertheless, we proved that even without a majority in the House or Senate, we’re not going to let this Administration divert the federal resources Americans depend on to fund tax cuts for wealthy people and large corporations.
This is the work I promise to show up and do — _Every. Damn. Day._
Thank you for your support and for reading about my time in the Senate so far.
Adam

clean_body: | Derek — It’s been less than two months since I was sworn in, and the reality of this job — its urgency, its responsibility — sets in more each day. In Southern California, wildfires have devastated entire communities. I’ve spent much of my time there, meeting with the families who lost everything, the first responders and firefighters risking their lives, FEMA and the Small Business Administration, and the local leaders doing everything they can to help people piece their lives back together. I launched a one-stop site with resources for those affected, and I am conducting oversight, even as I push for every federal dollar possible to rebuild–because the recovery can’t wait. Back in Washington, I took my seat on the Senate Judiciary Committee and started reviewing Trump’s nominees. I questioned Pam Bondi, his pick for Attorney General, and Kash Patel, his nominee for FBI Director, about their undying loyalty to Trump and their willingness (or lack thereof) to defend the rule of law. Their responses were...disappointing and extreme to say the least. A threat to our democracy and the rule of law would be more apt. And yes, I was there to watch the surreal moment when Trump was sworn in inside the Capitol — where insurrectionists stormed the building just a few years prior. Seated near him? None other than some of the richest men in the world: Including Elon Musk, and, bizarrely, the CEO of TikTok — sending a message about the priority he places on his propaganda machine, and who this administration is really working for. Now we understand why there was such a lack of talking about working families and lowering costs in his speech. We have a lot in store for this year. And I know how overwhelming and exhausting this moment can feel — every day brings another crisis brought on by another illegal or unconscionable act of the Trump Administration. But what they want is for us to be distracted by the chaos. They would love nothing more than for us to chase every crazy squirrel (Greenland, Panama Canal, Gulf of America), instead of picking the most consequential fights and being proactive. But look at what happened with the federal funding freeze this week? When we came together and immediately fought back, and fought back hard, we delivered the Trump admin their first major blow. Now, their letter rescinding the order was... rescinded. But not for long and not without confusion and alarm. Nevertheless, we proved that even without a majority in the House or Senate, we’re not going to let this Administration divert the federal resources Americans depend on to fund tax cuts for wealthy people and large corporations. This is the work I promise to show up and do — Every. Damn. Day. Thank you for your support and for reading about my time in the Senate so far. Adam | | 135 E. Olive Ave., #750 Burbank CA, 91502 | mailto:contact@adamschiff.com | PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE Sign up to receive or . Text JOIN to 724433. body:
GOP lays groundwork for a MAGA dictatorship

|
---
Peter,

**A few days ago we reached out about us about being $5,209 short House Special Elections goal but you didn’t respond.**

name: Lacy Lunsford
subject: We’re running out of time
body:
Our nightmare started the day my husband responded to a shoplifting call.| | | my husband had no choice -- it was the suspect’s life or his partner’s.
---
| |
---
Dear Patriot,My husband saved the life of his fellow officer and now, on February 3rd, a Soros-funded prosecutor is going to try and lock him up for _11 years_.
Here is one of my favorite pictures of our two boys.
---
[](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=261ea81cffcf4cf8ac7c776bd9d6905b&_e=bvN4dUZlZQdAV8m3rzKZweXnvioMegAFjYoENw78neMHSnGyRSKZKCkiX1hMd0rkkfiJkqGHGUS5oUCiC1VnUkwShWCeXvIO3PjQTXwsuEObhfVIGcPKuHwC-QCaRkpB-Rdak0nNCmhV2FyOTVzY7znGiDdgKvEVOTf1bG6cwBKaAVkpb2Y7Z330vMlBYZNMVMi_qnKcHNSPFIeXgdWKMzkB-XOLco-oVEJ3GCibuL4Oyrbj0xOh6NsqmA3Db9yGaZmEptVMVwvKlqlaH3FQlBHKvb5cauFPrnbK4nKMg3xdSCzm1mhMA_fM3ULpqQIa2AQuv3curmmwXcKyh42GwKQEru2MeTqneX_TAWM17TFl8IQyZEWe-hDucmzf_rsx)
---
[](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=261ea81cffcf4cf8ac7c776bd9d6905b&_e=bvN4dUZlZQdAV8m3rzKZweXnvioMegAFjYoENw78neMHSnGyRSKZKCkiX1hMd0rkkfiJkqGHGUS5oUCiC1VnUkwShWCeXvIO3PjQTXwsuEObhfVIGcPKuHwC-QCaRkpB-Rdak0nNCmhV2FyOTVzY7znGiDdgKvEVOTf1bG6cwBKaAVkpb2Y7Z330vMlBYZNMVMi_qnKcHNSPFIeXgdWKMzkB-XOLco-oVEJ3GCibuL6mVcRInrKaop5vpk--GBvnX9G2rOuQqTZjvZFS8MUCkeqRkxSlUn2CTBl86dqst3IN21gYmwK5pWc0CGIMpp3ee7FjbAOMdNIkolKhg-ERy2x01s8uW-ynxCmHkcczV-LjRy80RWQVlw6CTx7Yxyix)
---
Now it makes me cry. As you can probably tell from my sons' costumes, my husband Brad is a proud U.S. Army veteran. He served two tours of duty in Iraq as a Cavalry Scout. And today he is also a decorated, 9-year veteran of the Las Cruces, New Mexico, police department. I'm used to my husband being in danger. But never in my wildest dreams did I think the biggest threat to Brad wouldn't come from a radical terrorist or a violent gangster... ...but from a _Soros-funded_ , _anti-police_ _prosecutor_. **[**That's why I'm writing you today as a last resort to ask if you'll help me fight for my husband.**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=261ea81cffcf4cf8ac7c776bd9d6905b&_e=bvN4dUZlZQdAV8m3rzKZweXnvioMegAFjYoENw78neMHSnGyRSKZKCkiX1hMd0rkkfiJkqGHGUS5oUCiC1VnUkwShWCeXvIO3PjQTXwsuEObhfVIGcPKuHwC-QCaRkpB-Rdak0nNCmhV2FyOTVzY7znGiDdgKvEVOTf1bG6cwBKaAVkpb2Y7Z330vMlBYZNMVMi_qnKcHNSPFIeXgdWKMzkB-XOLco-oVEJ3GCibuL4LHkVoEEZoxXlHOwmCkVGBypfV4--BxpPWZ5oR83ldLJLZHeytBVC9TT5iXl-IwmrVIjk9Un1IsILhQFU3ujGzAw575Kyc1NkcfAfQpCU3l8KtI6w0Ihw2Q_28TJmEz8u0DJXKrHWdXW8WrhHDNw87)** Our nightmare started the day my husband responded to a shoplifting call. When Brad arrived on the scene, right away he sensed something was off. And when he and his partner, Officer Keegan Arbogast, asked the suspect to identify himself, the suspect refused. So when Officer Arbogast saw a knife sitting on the suspect's lap, hidden under a water bottle, the officers moved to detain him. Instead of complying, the suspect got violent. Everything that happened next happened in an instant. As the officers tried to subdue him, the suspect went for Officer Arbogast's gun, trying to pull it from the holster. Then he lunged for Officer Arbogast's taser, yanked it free, and pointed it directly at him. In that moment, my husband had no choice -- it was the suspect's life or his partner's. He drew his pistol and fired, killing the suspect and saving Officer Arbogast's life. When one of Brad's coworkers called me to tell me there had been a shooting, I burst into tears. I didn't stop crying until Brad came home. I was so thankful he was safe. I knew he did what he had to do to protect his partner so they could both make it home to their families. And when an Internal Investigation _and_ the local District Attorney cleared my husband of any wrongdoing, I thought this awful episode was behind us. I couldn't have been more wrong. Because more than a year after the incident, the Attorney General of New Mexico charged my husband with Voluntary Manslaughter! When I heard about the charges, I was shocked. Then we did some digging -- and it all made sense. The New Mexico Attorney General is a rabid far-Left activist who _hates_ the police. He was funded by George Soros. And because my husband is white, and the suspect was black... ...this radical prosecutor is determined to make a name for himself by destroying my husband and dragging his name through the mud. He even held a press conference and turned the microphone over to the suspect's family so they could spread hateful lies about my husband, smearing him as a "racist" and a "cold-blooded killer." **Make no mistake -- these charges are a slap in the face to every brave man and woman who has ever put on the badge.** Now you can see why I'm so heartbroken and furious. My husband is an honorable man who wanted nothing more than to serve his country and his community. That's why he served for 3 years in the Army as a cavalry scout. And it's why he served for 10 years as a police officer. But more than that, he's a wonderful husband and an incredible father to our 9- and 6-year-old boys. We've tried to explain to our boys as best we can about what's going on. But they're too young to fully understand. And I can't bear to think of what it will do to them if one day, Daddy is taken away and they're forced to grow up with their father behind bars. But unless people like you speak up to defend my husband against these disgusting Soros-funded political attacks... ...Brad will miss 11 years of birthdays, wedding anniversaries, and Little League games. As I mentioned earlier, Brad's trial starts in just days and the legal bills have become overwhelming for our family. Thank God, we got a call from Jason Johnson. Jason is a retired police officer -- and he's the President of the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund (LELDF). If you've ever heard of LELDF, you know they're a national group fighting on behalf of wrongly-accused police officers like Brad. LELDF has helped dozens of innocent officers -- and their families -- when it seemed like there was no hope left. And with the thought of losing my husband and trying to suddenly raise my two boys on my own -- I was certainly hopeless. Not only did LELDF decide to help my husband get the legal defense he deserves, they're also raising money to pay for the best lawyers and expert witnesses available. But it’s only because of the support of brave patriots like yourself. Jason and LELDF were an answer to prayer for our family. That's because Brad and I aren't wealthy people. I run our family farm and Brad is a veteran turned cop. So I must ask you one of the toughest questions I've ever asked anyone. **[**Will you donate $35 or any amount to LELDF to help me save my husband?**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=261ea81cffcf4cf8ac7c776bd9d6905b&_e=bvN4dUZlZQdAV8m3rzKZweXnvioMegAFjYoENw78neMHSnGyRSKZKCkiX1hMd0rkkfiJkqGHGUS5oUCiC1VnUkwShWCeXvIO3PjQTXwsuEObhfVIGcPKuHwC-QCaRkpB-Rdak0nNCmhV2FyOTVzY7znGiDdgKvEVOTf1bG6cwBKaAVkpb2Y7Z330vMlBYZNMVMi_qnKcHNSPFIeXgdWKMzkB-XOLco-oVEJ3GCibuL6cSlUNt7TOnv96VPqIn0FONSrB8oyJW2UYhjafihGVgC88DlzAGBep2SVjwYypWXMNeZhEu6gm_mYivtsx2E6A6iPiRGz_26smpSct-Bw11QCyIiuACo7DYPYN6glUVco7EqGY_zuinoPh7IIISxlQ)** If I had anywhere else to turn, I wouldn't be so bold as to ask for your help. But I'm so scared for Brad and I will do whatever I can for him -- and for our sons. **[So I pray you'll find it in your heart today to make a tax-deductible gift of $35, $50, $100 or more to the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=261ea81cffcf4cf8ac7c776bd9d6905b&_e=bvN4dUZlZQdAV8m3rzKZweXnvioMegAFjYoENw78neMHSnGyRSKZKCkiX1hMd0rkkfiJkqGHGUS5oUCiC1VnUkwShWCeXvIO3PjQTXwsuEObhfVIGcPKuHwC-QCaRkpB-Rdak0nNCmhV2FyOTVzY7znGiDdgKvEVOTf1bG6cwBKaAVkpb2Y7Z330vMlBYZNMVMi_qnKcHNSPFIeXgdWKMzkB-XOLco-oVEJ3GCibuL5F6zvHRVRe6wdBrmxRhSHRBKxapX8NZliDKB6d2--3M0D7McZjU5uuN3_38i1JevtQc0EqZOY6BSp0mVOrVD8AM_8ASQJEcmontVntNJcd_-_U4NsI92VJVXves8hzuh_pMVMH_qjvyDhqKIOkPJ7w) ** Brad and I -- and our two sons -- are counting on the good nature and generosity of kind neighbors like you to help keep Brad home where he belongs. No matter what you're able to give today, please pray for us. Thank you in advance for your support.
---
Sincerely,
---
Lacy Lunsford
---
| | P.S. I already spent a year apart from my husband when he was in the Army. It's the hardest thing I've ever done. He almost died during that deployment when the Humvee he was driving hit an IED. I can't imagine having to spend 11 long, lonely years, trying to raise the boys by myself -- and worrying every day about my husband, locked up with hundreds of violent criminals. Please don't let my two boys grow up without their father -- [**please follow this link right now to make a tax-deductible donation of $35 or any amount to the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund today.**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=261ea81cffcf4cf8ac7c776bd9d6905b&_e=bvN4dUZlZQdAV8m3rzKZweXnvioMegAFjYoENw78neMHSnGyRSKZKCkiX1hMd0rkkfiJkqGHGUS5oUCiC1VnUkwShWCeXvIO3PjQTXwsuEObhfVIGcPKuHwC-QCaRkpB-Rdak0nNCmhV2FyOTVzY7znGiDdgKvEVOTf1bG6cwBKaAVkpb2Y7Z330vMlBYZNMVMi_qnKcHNSPFIeXgdWKMzkB-XOLco-oVEJ3GCibuL5mR7rnSBNNuzVQHr2_FYfJrFrvpgu7-DGZn5dWFUE-5zMq3teMip6ht5OZK-3B1EY003aHN55cuSzRFkzXmspfMlQBLotv8mvZre-utnPo2oIVMOo9NI9RJzoAc0h7c-0vFKqpJ4kwQecBgp-wtSPb) P.P.S. Brad's trial starts on February 3rd, so we're quickly running out time. Thank you for helping my family fight back against this Soros-funded prosecutor!
---
|
---
| | _More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we're defending, please visit. And remember –Blue Lives Matter!_
---

And with the thought of losing my husband and trying to suddenly raise my two boys on my own -- I was certainly hopeless. Not only did LELDF decide to help my husband get the legal defense he deserves, they're also raising money to pay for the best lawyers and expert witnesses available. But it’s only because of the support of brave patriots like yourself. Jason and LELDF were an answer to prayer for our family. That's because Brad and I aren't wealthy people. I run our family farm and Brad is a veteran turned cop. So I must ask you one of the toughest questions I've ever asked anyone. If I had anywhere else to turn, I wouldn't be so bold as to ask for your help. But I'm so scared for Brad and I will do whatever I can for him -- and for our sons. Brad and I -- and our two sons -- are counting on the good nature and generosity of kind neighbors like you to help keep Brad home where he belongs. No matter what you're able to give today, please pray for us. Thank you in advance for your support. Sincerely, Lacy Lunsford | | P.S. I already spent a year apart from my husband when he was in the Army. It's the hardest thing I've ever done. He almost died during that deployment when the Humvee he was driving hit an IED. I can't imagine having to spend 11 long, lonely years, trying to raise the boys by myself -- and worrying every day about my husband, locked up with hundreds of violent criminals. Please don't let my two boys grow up without their father -- P.P.S. Brad's trial starts on February 3rd, so we're quickly running out time. Thank you for helping my family fight back against this Soros-funded prosecutor! | | | More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we're defending, please visit. And remember –Blue Lives Matter! © Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | 2560 Huntington Ave. Suite 203, Alexandria, VA, 22303

subject: explaining the last few days
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MAXWELL FROST FOR CONGRESS
body:
| [ ](http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/fDXWOd-1K164tWnOpYSIKQ~~/AAPPABA~/asmy6zIBOG3DFTtHMis-OGlHRuUkhEvgITynY1Jnli-FBEUugEeMOIVTFtBtTn8TyJWL6Ys6OFh3JhTZhoaciiUcPxJlZwG4t965pGOOxoJDxrJyf5qq2vKImKpA_HxcwfnEuAxiZOmiKQPJRtQOSxx9ZRj2xZn7KAlt6GsSiR6zWCaAqvMnDQTkRMgUi4QtkkzqwGNJh_54Z74JSraGxx4FlaZxc7HWp6tBQ7FIse0eST5MLBMTQknXlSVnBg7c7Mn4T7ae0jB8c4DD8GJdUkYEVAxku7lDqZwKqG3QKsCzZaE4PqsSEq78ujqy8QYGmEm1h32e_neloFoWWsUYsNUaLEJVXELBXJBtmK2Aio0~)

| Peter, we won this battle, but the war against Project 2025 is still on. Here’s what happened this past week: **First** , the Trump Administration announced a complete freeze on federal loans and grants, which halted funding for housing assistance, food stamps, and healthcare. **Then** , Trump shut down the Medicaid portal for states across the country, including Florida, where 3.8 million people rely on Medicaid coverage.

**And now, we’ve won, but it won’t last forever. Our public pressure and outrage forced the White House to rescind this illegal attack on poor and working class Americans. But they’ll try it again, and we’ll make sure they fail.**

As long as I’m in Congress, I’ll do everything in my power to fight back against Trump’s attacks on working Americans. But we also need to be organizing on the ground every single day, and I can’t keep my field program funded without your help.

[**_So I have to ask: Can you donate just $1 to continue defending our people and stop Trump from playing political games with our livelihoods? >>_**](http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/QqppBPZ2xvCvyDgn7-gk4A~~/AAPPABA~/gIgJSD8TmrxwTFLCF_XVWei-jc5RyfacrYdXV1_Wb-kBXiyzEOs4hFw5orcODb5FLkYDILEeBJR34aVJS5uxM_YxreHsZiI7zLHWNonvkgMc2n3FkI1Lze-5vNz9T14lKGeWIxLUPFBcYbmQlEknWmSfeYIgk3qqxFzfmO1LtesKd99vbG9u-nfA9Hq3D-kumEQuPAVUeMp0w9z7xrGzau1A0HLKi4cPpCEpVYeUNk8wqXK_O_9xdNmW3MXXcjgDtBzKvvfd2rOCQSBg7fSl0-P3rPtKCIkJIz3BaLnHWBXrJPpUPrOs3x7HOiJ3d4Wp_ETEIwB771nM0CLrTpdUmni681QYsqrtjUKjjF5RTBo~) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [DONATE $1 ➔](http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/hWXkBCKvNPk5f6dmj4D75g~~/AAPPABA~/7Wy4wdQx4pgfv1axM-aG6Wt_3q4JA_ODq5LoKuBto-erywGJeBmaBka4xjTfVpR5nQok0_GNkK7aLcuVu81dCLuOdvj6XIYkbbmCFJBH8l0CjK1Fitv-vW-FR8WyWt1n1uRgIWOgYjDulkCn1ZPVYK4riLbfyicLBVicRsStv51pXQTwTAQwIVUx1yTBe1VT6i2K0hWtYADrbhjTaVtV8_abtalJI14j-Oc9hPHNEw3jX8ogZjI2t18rrvQdqVlm0iPlQSz3blA6Yjsmkd_aBDhqprdxBxJgCA705yB0TU3mLQZYcREudcnJ4-rpLdZyyVZdB9H2pfW63eK4aSk7UqIUYab4irQNdnfMLwU-gl2RvFDzkqrDt4KnnY0Vxyh0)

Here’s what happened this past week: First , the Trump Administration announced a complete freeze on federal loans and grants, which halted funding for housing assistance, food stamps, and healthcare. Then , Trump shut down the Medicaid portal for states across the country, including Florida, where 3.8 million people rely on Medicaid coverage. And now, we’ve won, but it won’t last forever. Our public pressure and outrage forced the White House to rescind this illegal attack on poor and working class Americans. But they’ll try it again, and we’ll make sure they fail. As long as I’m in Congress, I’ll do everything in my power to fight back against Trump’s attacks on working Americans. name: Mikie Sherrill
subject: I’m getting ready to step on the debate stage
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Heartland Patriots (LucasKunce
body:
We can shape New Jersey’s future — together.
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/85650?refcode=em20250202-8744&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=8744%2E614464%2EhrgEF7)
Hi Peter, it’s Mikie.
In just a few hours, I’ll be stepping onto the debate stage for the very first time in this campaign.
I’m running for governor to shake up the status quo and do big things for New Jersey, and I’m looking forward to laying out my vision for our state’s future tonight. But I can’t do this alone.
**[Before I step on stage, will you chip in $10 or more to Heartland Patriots and my campaign for governor and help us keep up our momentum? We all have a place and a say in New Jersey’s future, and I want you to be a part of it all.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/85650?refcode=em20250202-8744&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=8744%2E614464%2EhrgEF7)**
**[DONATE](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/85650?refcode=em20250202-8744&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=8744%2E614464%2EhrgEF7)**
In the past few weeks and months, I’ve met so many people who believe as deeply as I do in the promise of our state. I also know we have to confront the real challenges New Jerseyans are facing.
Here are just a few things I’m ready to get done — yes, really get done —as governor:
* Building more housing so families can stay in New Jersey and put down roots here.
* Repairing our public transit system so that New Jerseyans can get to work on time and make it home to take their kids to doctor’s appointments.
* Lowering the costs of groceries and everyday essentials.
* Protecting our rights and freedoms from the extreme agenda coming out of Washington.

At the heart of it all, I believe we all have a place and a say in New Jersey’s future. Let’s build something we all can be proud of.
**[Every dollar we raise right now will help hire more organizers, get our message out to voters across the state, and win this race. Can you pitch in now to help us hit our pre-debate goal?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/85650?refcode=em20250202-8744&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=8744%2E614464%2EhrgEF7)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/85651?refcode=em20250202-8744&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=5&akid=8744%2E614464%2EhrgEF7) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/85651?refcode=em20250202-8744&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=6&akid=8744%2E614464%2EhrgEF7) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/85651?refcode=em20250202-8744&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=7&akid=8744%2E614464%2EhrgEF7) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/85651?refcode=em20250202-8744&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=8&akid=8744%2E614464%2EhrgEF7) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/85651?refcode=em20250202-8744&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=9&akid=8744%2E614464%2EhrgEF7) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/85651?refcode=em20250202-8744&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=10&akid=8744%2E614464%2EhrgEF7) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/85650?refcode=em20250202-8744&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=11&akid=8744%2E614464%2EhrgEF7)

— Mikie

body:
The Power of Forgiveness

| |
---|---|---
| | | Forwarded this email? [Subscribe here](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9sdWNhc2t1bmNlLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.Qagq0JKoF3JAsu9INj0jp2NXbtllVhGCJIxf8oNCdJE?) for more
