# [America's Masculinity Crisis](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1867741&post_id=156313819&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTU2MzEzODE5LCJpYXQiOjE3Mzg1MjIwNTksImV4cCI6MTc0MTExNDA1OSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTE4Njc3NDEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.DkYKFSS-QWFB6FDFESn8LgNCU_YbyFW8jWOBlOlz0Qg)
### The Power of Forgiveness
| | [Lucas Kunce](https://substack.com/@lucastyree)
---
| Feb 2
---
| [](https://substack.com/@lucastyree)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1867741&post_id=156313819&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTU2MzEzODE5LCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTczODUyMjA1OSwiZXhwIjoxNzQxMTE0MDU5LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMTg2Nzc0MSIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.74Rk7MbmRqLZblyMmkfmNbm-I6N7YlJGwpqfg8oDzBY&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1867741&post_id=156313819&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTU2MzEzODE5LCJpYXQiOjE3Mzg1MjIwNTksImV4cCI6MTc0MTExNDA1OSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTE4Njc3NDEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.DkYKFSS-QWFB6FDFESn8LgNCU_YbyFW8jWOBlOlz0Qg&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1867741&post_id=156313819&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTU2MzEzODE5LCJpYXQiOjE3Mzg1MjIwNTksImV4cCI6MTc0MTExNDA1OSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTE4Njc3NDEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.DkYKFSS-QWFB6FDFESn8LgNCU_YbyFW8jWOBlOlz0Qg)
---
| | [](https://substack..2GnGWyVr9jrDHePf9wbNotKpQYFg2C49lo1v2ynmqq4?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/lucaskunce/p/americas-masculinity-crisis?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

In the 1950's, America faced a crisis of courage.
Our politics were fueled by hate. Government employees were under siege, including by a government run Loyalty Review Board. The "Red Scare" was at its zenith. Wisconsin Senator Joseph McCarthy--a man whose [unimpressive early Senate career included](https://substack.com/redirect/733229ec-9b11-421c-9923-db14c91c856d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) defending Nazi war criminals, allying with holocaust denier and KKK member Pastor Wesley Swift, calling America's military brass "mental midgets," and railing against corruption while engaging in more than his own share of it--catapulted himself to fame by launching witch-hunts against political rivals and government employees by denouncing them as communist or homosexual.
Lucas's Substack is a reader-supported publication. To receive new posts and support my work, consider becoming a free or paid subscriber.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9sdWNhc2t1bmNlLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.HzCz-ewTPfelhco4xuTe3uB_rC_QPWE4TrZR8M-muHM?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=156313819)
In the midst of this crisis of courage, Senator John F. Kennedy published _Profiles in Courage,_ eight historical examples of US Senators showing what he believed to be courage in the face of adversity.*
Today, in similarly divisive times, we often hear about another American crisis. A crisis of masculinity.
There are real issues there, and I addressed the [political ramifications of some of them of ](https://substack.com/redirect/e3b26133-c3ce-4f53-9b06-3a00da0596a3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) during my campaign. However, there is so much more beyond the political side of this crisis. For example, the men that our society has chosen to elevate, both in social media and in the mainstream media, and the things that they label "masculine."
So, today, I'm going to begin a new series of profiles. Rather than focusing on famous and powerful men, like Kennedy did, I'm going to amplify just a few of the thousands of acts of common strength and resolve that play out across the fabric of Missouri and our country every day-- quietly holding us together while our leaders seek to rip us apart. Examples that could dig us out of this masculinity crisis if only they got the attention or recognition that has instead been lavished on others.
Since I highlighted my wife's immigration story last week, I can think of no better place to begin than another immigration story. The story of my best friend's dad.
**The Power of Forgiveness**
Growing up, my mom had to get creative looking for cheap or free ways to keep us kids entertained during the summers. The standard strategy was swimming lessons at the public pool, long hours at the public library, and attending every single vacation bible school in town. And when I say every single one, I mean Every. Single. One. Catholic, Lutheran, Episcopalian, Disciples of Christ, Southern Baptist, you name it...
You'd think this diversity of faiths and locations would have kept things interesting. However, the truth is that you did basically the same thing at every single one of them. The same coloring sheets. The same songs. The same parachute games. The same ten stories.
Once a summer, however, we got to do something special. Lincoln University, right down the street from our house, hosted a program called Learning Unlimited, where you got to do all sorts of cool stuff. Write plays, make pottery, cook exotic food, play red rover, learn integers...
Well, ok, maybe it wasn't ALL cool, but it sure beat coloring in a cutout of Daniel in the Lion's Den and pasting it onto a popsicle stick for the tenth time.
It was at Learning Unlimited that I met my friend for life and future best man, Benyam (whose Washington Post op-ed about running black in America I [featured in a previous substack](https://substack.com/redirect/a2572493-1831-44c0-8b4f-78796201acbd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)). His parents, refugees of the Eritrean war of Independence against Ethiopia, were drawn to mid-Missouri because they had family here and because Lincoln University, as an HBCU, was a welcoming environment for them. Benyam's mom graduated from Lincoln and his parents worked there until their retirement.
In all the years growing up learning how to eat injera and dance like a habesha at his house, Benyam's dad was quietly in the background, always supportive and entirely encouraging, sometimes funny, but never standing out in any way. Certainly not as your macho-masculine tough guy.
Shoot, Benyam's mom, Turu, seemed like the badass of the house. She smashed spiders with her bare feet and ate ground beef raw out of the package! The hardest thing we ever saw Benyam's old man do was gargle rubbing alcohol, which is admittedly pretty fierce, but not exactly worth any street cred with the other kids. And the most interesting thing about him was probably that his toes were kind of crooked.
Well, that or maybe his weird name: Tesfai (which is pronounced tess-fi, with the fi like the fi in wifi).
Benyam and I are still friends, and a few years ago, when I was stationed at the Pentagon, Benyam called me upset. One of his uncles had gotten agitated at a family gathering and told Benyam that the man who had tortured his dad in the home country during the war was now a cab driver here in the US.
Tortured?! I asked, incredulous.
Yeah, man, it's nuts. I had no idea. Absolutely crazy. Apparently Pops was thrown in a black hole and nearly tortured to death for who knows how long back in the dat.And now we know that the guy who did it is here, just living the good life, like it's nothing. I can't just sit here. I gotta go after this guy. Expose him. He's a damn war criminal. I've at least gotta confront him. How can I be a man knowing that this guy is out there just living free in America after what he's done?
Benyam locked in on the idea of confronting the man who had tortured his father. He dug into whatever details he could find. He interrogated relatives in pursuit of more details on what had happened. He talked to just about everyone he could except, of course, for his dad.
Time went by. Benyam and I mulled over ways to approach the man who had tortured Tesfai. Get into his cab. Ambush him on a podcast. Report him as a war criminal. But first we needed to know more.
Then, in 2021, we were at Benyam's parents' house in Jefferson City for the Fourth of July. Sitting in their living room, with Benyam's two little girls and his parents, someone asked Benyam's parents to tell us how they came to America.
They talked about growing up in then-Ethiopia in the 50's and 60's. Benyam's mom showed us a picture of her being honored by the Emperor of Ethiopia at her high school graduation and one of Tesfai with a lion. She talked about how her family and Tesfai, who she was only dating at the time, had encouraged her to escape the war and seek a better life. How a relative of Tesfai's in Missouri had eventually gotten her to Jefferson City where she attended Lincoln and worked at the Hotel DeVille's restaurant to make ends meet. At the time Tesfai worked for Ethiopian Airlines, work that brought him to Kansas City, and so they could still occasionally see each other.
Ultimately, Tesfai decided to give up his job to stay in America to be with Turu. He needed to take one last trip back to Eritrea to get everything in order. It was a classic love story intertwined with the American Dream. From the way they spoke, you could feel the light that America held for the rest of the world during those years.
On his trip home, however, the story took a dark turn. Before Tesfai could depart, he was taken for questioning by local police. If not for a family member seeing it happen, he would have simply disappeared.
As Tesfai spoke, Benyam was riveted to his seat. This is what he had been wanting to hear for years but never knew how to ask for. He wanted all the details. We quietly bribed his little girls to go to the other room with their tablets while Tesfai continued.
It was a common story in Eritrean Ethiopian at the time. He was just in the wrong place at the wrong time.
He was taken into captivity and accused of political crimes he didn't even know had happened and wasn't in the country to commit. They accused him of being a revolutionary. They locked him away, hidden from the world, and without communication. They tortured him to get a confession. He described some of the terrible things they did. One relentless man in particular. We learned how he had gotten his crooked toes. We heard what it was like to break, to get to the point where you would say anything or do anything to make the pain stop.
Turu talked about how her dreams disappeared when he did. About what it was like, being in America, such a safe place, surrounded by prosperity, while Tesfai was locked away. She didn't know what he was going through, she wouldn't have even known why he hadn't come and why he wasn't writing her if that relative hadn't been lucky enough to see him taken and let everyone know. She talked about how overwhelming it was not knowing if he was alive or dead, or if she would ever know.
One day, Tesfai said, nearly a year later, he was simply set free. With no explanation, no direction, no nothing. He made his way back to family and tried to put his life back together.
Everywhere he went he was terrified, looking over his shoulder, waiting to be taken again. Travel out of the country was restricted, yet his old boss at the airline secured him a flight to America, an incredibly risky thing for him to do. He couldn't leave, however, unless someone was willing to sign an attestation and vouch for him. He couldn't ask someone to do that, because he knew what would happen to them when he didn't return.
An older gentleman, barely an acquaintance, a friend of a friend, heard his story when they were all at a bar commiserating. He approached Tesfai and told him he would vouch for him. Tesfai, in shock, refused. He couldn't put this man at risk. But this man, who was ready to risk his life for a stranger and a love story, insisted. Tesfai asked him to sleep on it. The next day the man signed the papers.
Tesfai was too afraid to call Turu and tell her, in case someone was listening. His anxiety grew as the day of his flight came closer. Tesfai had second thoughts. Perhaps it was a set-up. But he wouldn't have another chance and, as he had learned, danger lurked around every corner.
When the day arrived, he made his way to the airport. He was sure he wouldn't make it onto the plane and expected that tap on his shoulder at any moment. Every sound was the sound of armed guards pushing through the crowd to carry him off. Every shift in the sky was the plane turning back to take him back in. The delay during his connection was for security to grab him.
But, then, finally, he landed in America. And he was free.
The rest, as they say, is history. His grandchildren were called back into the room. Benyam's parents told us about re-uniting, marrying, and having their two boys. How they raised them as Missourians, and worked full productive careers in America before finally retiring a few years ago.
Benyam was speechless. This was his moment to dig, but he was frozen. I stepped in and told Tesfai what we had heard. That the man who tortured him was living in America. That he would likely never answer for what he had done. I asked him what he thought about that.
Tesfai looked at us like we were two schoolchildren.
"Let him have peace," he said calmly and without hesitation. "I made peace with it a long time ago. If I had chosen hate, or resentment, or dwelled on what he had done, it would have ruined this beautiful life we made here in America. I would have lost even more than he had taken. Jesus showed us the power to forgive. I follow his example."
He took Turu's hand and they smiled at us, the sound of their grandchildren playing in the background, gearing up to watch the fireworks over the Missouri River that night and celebrate 245 years of American freedom with their grandpa, an American hero.

Lucas

The Power of Forgiveness | | | Feb 2 | | | | | | | | | | | | In the 1950's, America faced a crisis of courage. Our politics were fueled by hate. Government employees were under siege, including by a government run Loyalty Review Board. The "Red Scare" was at its zenith. Wisconsin Senator Joseph McCarthy--a man whose defending Nazi war criminals, allying with holocaust denier and KKK member Pastor Wesley Swift, calling America's military brass "mental midgets," and railing against corruption while engaging in more than his own share of it--catapulted himself to fame by launching witch-hunts against political rivals and government employees by denouncing them as communist or homosexual. Lucas's Substack is a reader-supported publication. To receive new posts and support my work, consider becoming a free or paid subscriber. In the midst of this crisis of courage, Senator John F. Kennedy published Profiles in Courage, eight historical examples of US Senators showing what he believed to be courage in the face of adversity. Today, in similarly divisive times, we often hear about another American crisis. A crisis of masculinity. There are real issues there, and I addressed the during my campaign. However, there is so much more beyond the political side of this crisis. For example, the men that our society has chosen to elevate, both in social media and in the mainstream media, and the things that they label "masculine." So, today, I'm going to begin a new series of profiles. Rather than focusing on famous and powerful men, like Kennedy did, I'm going to amplify just a few of the thousands of acts of common strength and resolve that play out across the fabric of Missouri and our country every day-- quietly holding us together while our leaders seek to rip us apart. Examples that could dig us out of this masculinity crisis if only they got the attention or recognition that has instead been lavished on others. Since I highlighted my wife's immigration story last week, I can think of no better place to begin than another immigration story. The story of my best friend's dad. The Power of Forgiveness Growing up, my mom had to get creative looking for cheap or free ways to keep us kids entertained during the summers. The standard strategy was swimming lessons at the public pool, long hours at the public library, and attending every single vacation bible school in town. And when I say every single one, I mean Every. Single. One. Catholic, Lutheran, Episcopalian, Disciples of Christ, Southern Baptist, you name it... You'd think this diversity of faiths and locations would have kept things interesting. However, the truth is that you did basically the same thing at every single one of them. The same coloring sheets. The same songs. The same parachute games. The same ten stories. Once a summer, however, we got to do something special. Lincoln University, right down the street from our house, hosted a program called Learning Unlimited, where you got to do all sorts of cool stuff. Write plays, make pottery, cook exotic food, play red rover, learn integers... Well, ok, maybe it wasn't ALL cool, but it sure beat coloring in a cutout of Daniel in the Lion's Den and pasting it onto a popsicle stick for the tenth time. It was at Learning Unlimited that I met my friend for life and future best man, Benyam (whose Washington Post op-ed about running black in America I ). His parents, refugees of the Eritrean war of Independence against Ethiopia, were drawn to mid-Missouri because they had family here and because Lincoln University, as an HBCU, was a welcoming environment for them. Benyam's mom graduated from Lincoln and his parents worked there until their retirement. In all the years growing up learning how to eat injera and dance like a habesha at his house, Benyam's dad was quietly in the background, always supportive and entirely encouraging, sometimes funny, but never standing out in any way. Certainly not as your macho-masculine tough guy. Shoot, Benyam's mom, Turu, seemed like the badass of the house. She smashed spiders with her bare feet and ate ground beef raw out of the package! The hardest thing we ever saw Benyam's old man do was gargle rubbing alcohol, which is admittedly pretty fierce, but not exactly worth any street cred with the other kids. And the most interesting thing about him was probably that his toes were kind of crooked. Well, that or maybe his weird name: Tesfai (which is pronounced tess-fi, with the fi like the fi in wifi). Benyam and I are still friends, and a few years ago, when I was stationed at the Pentagon, Benyam called me upset. One of his uncles had gotten agitated at a family gathering and told Benyam that the man who had tortured his dad in the home country during the war was now a cab driver here in the US. Tortured?! I asked, incredulous. Yeah, man, it's nuts. I had no idea. Absolutely crazy. Apparently Pops was thrown in a black hole and nearly tortured to death for who knows how long back in the dat.And now we know that the guy who did it is here, just living the good life, like it's nothing. I can't just sit here. I gotta go after this guy. Expose him. He's a damn war criminal. I've at least gotta confront him. How can I be a man knowing that this guy is out there just living free in America after what he's done? Benyam locked in on the idea of confronting the man who had tortured his father. He dug into whatever details he could find. He interrogated relatives in pursuit of more details on what had happened. He talked to just about everyone he could except, of course, for his dad. Time went by. Benyam and I mulled over ways to approach the man who had tortured Tesfai. Get into his cab. Ambush him on a podcast. Report him as a war criminal. But first we needed to know more. Then, in 2021, we were at Benyam's parents' house in Jefferson City for the Fourth of July. Sitting in their living room, with Benyam's two little girls and his parents, someone asked Benyam's parents to tell us how they came to America. They talked about growing up in then-Ethiopia in the 50's and 60's. Benyam's mom showed us a picture of her being honored by the Emperor of Ethiopia at her high school graduation and one of Tesfai with a lion. She talked about how her family and Tesfai, who she was only dating at the time, had encouraged her to escape the war and seek a better life. How a relative of Tesfai's in Missouri had eventually gotten her to Jefferson City where she attended Lincoln and worked at the Hotel DeVille's restaurant to make ends meet. At the time Tesfai worked for Ethiopian Airlines, work that brought him to Kansas City, and so they could still occasionally see each other. Ultimately, Tesfai decided to give up his job to stay in America to be with Turu. He needed to take one last trip back to Eritrea to get everything in order. **My opponent, Jimmy Patronis, is the epitome of a career politician who prioritizes partisan loyalty and corporate interests over the well-being of everyday Floridians.** This is Gay Valimont, the Democrat running for FL-1 that is going to make sure **you** are at the heart of our government’s interest. **Can I count on you to make a difference within our government before special elections roll out April 1st?**
---
---
As Florida’s Chief Financial Officer, my opponent Jimmy Patronis has had every opportunity to use his position to _advocate for financial transparency, consumer protections, and responsible stewardship of taxpayer dollars._ Instead, he’s spent his tenure **weaponizing his office** to push extremist political agendas, shielding corruption, and rewarding political allies while hardworking Floridians are left behind. **Patronis talks about protecting Floridians, but his record tells a different story.** Whether it’s his role in undermining oversight on insurance companies while homeowners face skyrocketing rates, his allegiance to big-money donors over small businesses, or his participation in culture war distractions that do nothing to improve the lives of working families, he’s proven time and again that his real priorities lie with the powerful—not the people.

clean_body: | | | My opponent, Jimmy Patronis, is the epitome of a career politician who prioritizes partisan loyalty and corporate interests over the well-being of everyday Floridians. This is Gay Valimont, the Democrat running for FL-1 that is going to make sure you are at the heart of our government’s interest. Can I count on you to make a difference within our government before special elections roll out April 1st? As Florida’s Chief Financial Officer, my opponent Jimmy Patronis has had every opportunity to use his position to advocate for financial transparency, consumer protections, and responsible stewardship of taxpayer dollars. Instead, he’s spent his tenure weaponizing his office to push extremist political agendas, shielding corruption, and rewarding political allies while hardworking Floridians are left behind. Patronis talks about protecting Floridians, but his record tells a different story. Whether it’s his role in undermining oversight on insurance companies while homeowners face skyrocketing rates, his allegiance to big-money donors over small businesses, or his participation in culture war distractions that do nothing to improve the lives of working families, he’s proven time and again that his real priorities lie with the powerful—not the people. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = Florida deserves leaders who are accountable to the people, not just the political machine. I am running to restore integrity to public office, fight for economic policies that lift everyone up, and ensure that Florida’s financial future is built on fairness, not favoritism. Thank you for your help, Gay ValimontDemocratic Candidate for Florida’s 1st Congressional District | | | | | Paid For By Gay Valimont Gay Valimont For Congress PO Box 1258 Gulf Breeze, FL 32562 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

subject: we know you support expanding Social Security!
disclaimer_text: paid for and provided in kind by End Citizens United Nonfederal, P
body:
you must have missed our original message | [_unsubscribe_](https://act.fightforreform.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-2022?t=1&akid=22830%2E4449941%2EJgH7qG) Hello,

Last week, we sent you an urgent poll asking if you support expanding Social Security benefits after President Biden signed a major Social Security bill into law before he left office!

But our records indicate that you still haven’t responded. With Trump now in office, it's critically important that you respond. **You’re one of the last [21] Democrats from your state that we need to complete our data!**

**[_Social Security provides support for millions of senior citizens, we can’t understate how important this is. Please complete now »_](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/protect-social-security-loc?source=LOC_EM_POLL_2025.02.02_Expand-SS-M_B2_F1_S1_C1_main_RS&t=2&akid=22830%2E4449941%2EJgH7qG)** | [ADD MY NAME NOW »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/protect-social-security-loc?source=LOC_EM_POLL_2025.02.02_Expand-SS-M_B2_F1_S1_C1_main_RS&t=3&akid=22830%2E4449941%2EJgH7qG)
---
We’ve attached the original message below for your records. Thanks,

Fight for Reform

— FORWARDED MESSAGE —
Subject: re: Expanded Social Security benefits in your state
From: Review by 11:59PM [FFR]
**ACTION REQUIRED: YOU MUST SUBMIT RESPONSE BY 11:59 PM**
[](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/protect-social-security-loc?source=LOC_EM_POLL_2025.02.02_Expand-SS-M_B2_F1_S1_C1_main_RS&t=4&akid=22830%2E4449941%2EJgH7qG) **[_Do you agree we need to expand Social Security and save it from Republican cuts and save our seniors?_](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/protect-social-security-loc?source=LOC_EM_POLL_2025.02.02_Expand-SS-M_B2_F1_S1_C1_main_RS&t=5&akid=22830%2E4449941%2EJgH7qG)** | **[Yes, I agree! »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/protect-social-security-loc?source=LOC_EM_POLL_2025.02.02_Expand-SS-M_B2_F1_S1_C1_main_RS&t=6&akid=22830%2E4449941%2EJgH7qG)**
---
**[No, I don’t agree »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/protect-social-security-loc?source=LOC_EM_POLL_2025.02.02_Expand-SS-M_B2_F1_S1_C1_main_RS&t=7&akid=22830%2E4449941%2EJgH7qG)**
**[I’m not sure »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/protect-social-security-loc?source=LOC_EM_POLL_2025.02.02_Expand-SS-M_B2_F1_S1_C1_main_RS&t=8&akid=22830%2E4449941%2EJgH7qG)**
**_WE NEED 150 LOCAL RESPONSES BY 02/02/2025, 11:59 PM ET_ **
Look, President Biden and Democrats know this is a critical program for millions of Americans.

To make matters worse, now that Trump is in office, making CUTS to Social Security is one of his TOP priorities. _NO!!!_

**We have absolutely NO DATA on how top Democrats feel about this, so that’s why we’re reaching out to you.**
**[_Do you agree we need to expand Social Security and save it from Republican cuts and save our seniors?_](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/protect-social-security-loc?source=LOC_EM_POLL_2025.02.02_Expand-SS-M_B2_F1_S1_C1_main_RS&t=9&akid=22830%2E4449941%2EJgH7qG)** | **[Yes, I agree! »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/protect-social-security-loc?source=LOC_EM_POLL_2025.02.02_Expand-SS-M_B2_F1_S1_C1_main_RS&t=10&akid=22830%2E4449941%2EJgH7qG)**
---
**[No, I don’t agree »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/protect-social-security-loc?source=LOC_EM_POLL_2025.02.02_Expand-SS-M_B2_F1_S1_C1_main_RS&t=11&akid=22830%2E4449941%2EJgH7qG)**
**[I’m not sure »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/protect-social-security-loc?source=LOC_EM_POLL_2025.02.02_Expand-SS-M_B2_F1_S1_C1_main_RS&t=12&akid=22830%2E4449941%2EJgH7qG)**
**_WE NEED 150 LOCAL RESPONSES BY 02/02/2025, 11:59 PM ET_ **
We can’t let MAGA Republicans demolish our earned benefits.

We really need you to speak up, team.

Fight For Reform

subject: They want to make an example of Kari Lake
disclaimer_text: Paid for by American Media Council
body:
It is such an incredible injustice that the Left is using courts packed with Liberal judges to prosecute Kari Lake simply for speaking up.| | | I am humbly asking for your help today to defend Kari Lake from Leftist Lawfare that is plaguing her and her family.
---
| |
---
| |
---
Dear Fellow American,I’m reaching out to you with a very important message. **[I am humbly asking for your help today to defend Kari Lake from Leftist Lawfare that is plaguing her and her family.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=0ebf90999c914e69ac881b2759c78547&_e=ZEZNRxG29OrFPXbXvdjKgBXozNBM8hJnZFsWLnZXn49nED6mncylg9p_V7iH32TViwOpFP8V06BJi02o7rscj8s2g-qjYvVasvHlKmjKR1eBuK93XXcIryeTDJ0tjcJHZB0E8iJqTCjudN4T5F_D9dMX7fNM-W7jHMDDzn1B8_73zxHJxYWL6ednUmtiQn8Xo0oP9vLO0QpYQjbLgji3-fg1JW-BlEkhE3xNrU6WmO1kyrfYfN8JjpxTEXzeicXVhBrJQuElpUYeNLXQWnAOECNdxMT3v2RQbeGr5--zmtB7EQ2Ln3VRLvvMTDd_t2WEKrmwklvKTNlhaMMJMb4NcuqlyPYpByBUaQ6vmGI4xSVQBe-ck9WnB6HUemcCItD1p7d3GsAX8BkAK8BiBaTPJQb0na1yV8-dhoxeXvqzB9Q%3D)** The Left is **_still_** trying to make an example of Kari Lake by using unethical Lawfare to financially ruin her. All because she dared to speak the truth about election integrity.
---
...When the Arizona election system continues to be a national embarrassment...When Democrats are constantly fighting to remove voter ID requirements...When an Arizona Election Official promised to “Make life hell” for her
---
That’s why it is such an incredible injustice that the Left is using courts packed with Liberal judges to prosecute Kari Lake simply for speaking up.The establishment Left is trying to send a message.If you speak out against us - we will ruin you.Your reputation...Your prosperity...Your **_family_** ...In order for us to preserve the America we love; we need to send a message in return. We will not watch the legal systems meant to protect us be weaponized by the Left and we will rally to the defense of those who are fighting for the American people. That’s why I am so grateful for the brave patriots at American Media Council who are stepping up.American Media Council established its Emergency First Amendment Fund to help Kari Lake fight this battle. For speaking the truth about election interference Kari is facing enormous legal fines, media hit pieces, and the constant threat of massive financial burden on her and her family. Your contribution to this First Amendment Fund will help defend Kari Lake and others like her threatened by Leftist Lawfare just for exercising their freedom of speech.That’s why I’m asking you today – **[will you help me to protect Kari Lake from retaliatory Leftist Lawfare?](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=0ebf90999c914e69ac881b2759c78547&_e=ZEZNRxG29OrFPXbXvdjKgBXozNBM8hJnZFsWLnZXn49nED6mncylg9p_V7iH32TViwOpFP8V06BJi02o7rscj8s2g-qjYvVasvHlKmjKR1eBuK93XXcIryeTDJ0tjcJHZB0E8iJqTCjudN4T5F_D9dMX7fNM-W7jHMDDzn1B8_73zxHJxYWL6ednUmtiQn8Xo0oP9vLO0QpYQjbLgji3-fg1JW-BlEkhE3xNrU6WmO1kyrfYfN8JjpxTEXzeicXVdzswBUwBWxnbNd4-BYHYEm9VCbwOTBZtSMdyqE7zFpAGVA_OxXfqjJrSSEMzLkJFEdNusDsaynlP-nsG2YOyd6NPwUtVc6gQ_SbfuMSWLFgu8gnSBUvs6Hex2lI2VlnGHxShfILUhz8fbWmenurtT-IvhzeOSaAyBcgZtZGJFng%3D)** The Left is never going to stop using underhanded tactics to go after their political enemies and they are going to attack Kari Lake harder than ever. They’re desperate to derail President Trump’s second term and tear down his allies. **[That’s why I am desperately asking for your help to send the message that we will not let this Leftist Lawfare go unchecked.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=0ebf90999c914e69ac881b2759c78547&_e=ZEZNRxG29OrFPXbXvdjKgBXozNBM8hJnZFsWLnZXn49nED6mncylg9p_V7iH32TViwOpFP8V06BJi02o7rscj8s2g-qjYvVasvHlKmjKR1eBuK93XXcIryeTDJ0tjcJHZB0E8iJqTCjudN4T5F_D9dMX7fNM-W7jHMDDzn1B8_73zxHJxYWL6ednUmtiQn8Xo0oP9vLO0QpYQjbLgji3-fg1JW-BlEkhE3xNrU6WmO1kyrfYfN8JjpxTEXzeicXVSaK7BR1zTwppE1NNc6tGXWHxWPLbJNmhfSc-KUDWXKNtzKp35-jwygw1fMmJE7j9HBCHkOo2APzOH27udDW5BySsgiZvfiUVBSBoeggml2rpRy6NvrjhnxAeUenAFci0udsenbaEGK6M22FBq65aGBsciCtWqUvBJ2sh48JR3Gg%3D)**

**_MEMO FROM RUDY W. GIULIANI_**

ATTN: Fellow Patriot,

Some have wondered if a Presidential Pardon could save me in the Arizona witch hunt where Democrats are trying to put me in prison for the rest of my life.

_**Unfortunately, because the charges are at the _state_ level, President Trump cannot grant a federal pardon to save me.**_

After a brutal loss last November, Democrats are seeking revenge, and they’ve turned me into their political punching bag.

Thanks to your support, I was able to SAVE my home! Thanks to your support, Fani Willis has been REMOVED from the witch hunt against me and President Trump in Georgia.

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: First, we countered drag queens in libraries. Now our next battle needs you!
body:
Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. | | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.
---
| |
---
| | Dear Friend in Faith, Please -- for the sake of all our families -- take it from me as someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life...You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.You may remember shows with wholesome messages like Father Knows Best, Marcus Welby, M.D., and even Dennis the Menace. But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue's Clues_...
---
[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=942edfbedf6841fd97e0ea70bb7b93a2&_e=-QusM5cwMw2lwE_akJBw64pY1hJQ_nJdz2UQlA-g2VkhIP-mzlUM1ttj9EovAhWVbVre4r5NFyVxd5ax-AHK04m1kIcNoBdBNkXvSdxmAFhaJiTqucIVWeKK0IVvBnuFp_I7u0nANGDOzKBtqAqvcRm1Fv8q2hZtIrs9WXTp4-_8OaWRCGdbPHnJ-HMdKeUF2Yy4AwQ-EponbiaRR-K0X2wQBaQtV-xbVWqPdRFUDmIEcTNd0sojuHpi-GP_SAqiNNkk30ClRrGEPB-yjYpd0XrQwCuwHV9oP84IyBoPOwDuqgLhuihhvfjmpjrcTIOWvtRvaW8QVf5wsTRRdpvdJCadcE5JB-z_iMAPikXjeTw1x1_k6iv13YEFPalL_3y9)
---
| | Or Sesame Street using YOUR tax-dollars to normalize same-sex parents and men in dresses.And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to "educate" YOU about your "old-fashioned" and "mean" ideas.Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. [**Today, I'm inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first children’s television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great**.](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=942edfbedf6841fd97e0ea70bb7b93a2&_e=-QusM5cwMw2lwE_akJBw64pY1hJQ_nJdz2UQlA-g2VkhIP-mzlUM1ttj9EovAhWVbVre4r5NFyVxd5ax-AHK04m1kIcNoBdBNkXvSdxmAFhaJiTqucIVWeKK0IVvBnuFp_I7u0nANGDOzKBtqAqvcRm1Fv8q2hZtIrs9WXTp4-_8OaWRCGdbPHnJ-HMdKeUF2Yy4AwQ-EponbiaRR-K0X2wQBaQtV-xbVWqPdRFUDmIuPoiSsRg1QXb6Y96q6MMNOBvmnPzWMJfDyc2swU8FdDv8mrYYMDL_yvOHLXgaOXNhcYqBUrOAKSpFthyJIlAXxw7AYTba9Akr2qFl1jzLSx9JVWR9Q2pN59FHCdHUUqO-7Ph3s6EDlUmhhUGd50O8)Introducing: _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.I'm making this ground-breaking live-action television show with the great folks at **Brave Books**.If you've seen me and **Brave Books** on _Fox News_ , you know we've already countered those awful "Drag Queen Story Hours" the Left has been pushing on children in our taxpayer funded libraries. Thanks to support from parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens just like you, we started hosting Godly and patriotic "Story Hours" of our own.And now, THOUSANDS of children and parents can gather to pledge allegiance to our flag, read wholesome books, and pray together in their libraries.It's encouraging to see we can win when we fight back! Now we're working to have that same impact in television.
---
>>Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth.Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. >> Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart.>> Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. Because we can’t beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a **Founding Supporter**.
---
The great news is that we've already completed the first ten character-building episodes of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_!We premiered it recently to a small group of children and parents and I wish you could have seen the smiles on those innocent little faces.And I wish you could have experienced _the parents_ watching their children absorb the beautiful Gospel messages.It was quite a moment for everyone -- including folks just like you -- who worked so hard to get us that far.But now **Brave Books** has an urgent two-fold problem that I hope you can help with.
---
_**#1. Brave Books needs to launch a massive advertising blitz to get around the groomers on the Left.**_
---
You see, we're making the first 5 episodes of Season 1 of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ available absolutely FREE to everyone on YouTube. That's the best way we can reach MILLIONS of families with our Gospel-inspired messaging.But no one will see it if we can't get the word out. And the left will try to bury _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ at every turn. The price tag for an advertising blitz of this magnitude is $250,000 -- and we need to raise the funds in this first quarter of 2025.

---

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Saving the Easter Bunny
body:
First... Brave Books knows that families need an easy and impactful way to counter the Left's secularization of Easter and instead, captivate children with its true meaning. | | | Brave Books is spearheading a massive "Prepare the Way" revival campaign to shift the focus of Easter from bunnies and chocolate...
---
| |
---
| | Dear Fellow Believer, It may seem a little early to be talking about Easter, but it's really only about 12 weeks away.And in that short amount of time, my friends at Brave Books are spearheading a massive "Prepare the Way" campaign to shift the focus of Easter from bunnies and chocolate......to Jesus.And this revival mission needs you! My friend, if you've seen me talking about Brave Books on Fox News, you know their mission is to counter the ungodly lies being pushed by the Left in schools, libraries, and Hollywood......by creating high-quality, wholesome, and Godly books and entertainment that instill conservative values and Gospel lessons in our children. And their "Prepare the Way" revival campaign is their biggest effort yet to point parents and children to the empty tomb and God’s redeeming love.Here’s exactly what their strategy is...First... Brave Books knows that families need an easy and impactful way to counter the Left's secularization of Easter and instead, captivate children with its true meaning. So, they created _Saving the Easter Bunny_ , a brand-new children's book that's destined to be a classic.In it, Ronnie the Rabbit learns the hard way what sin is and that our Lord Jesus Christ loves us so much that he took the punishment for that sin.Jesus is represented by a powerful lion named Lord Joshua and the book beautifully portrays his resurrection and God's never-ending redeeming love for us. It's incredible.And let me tell you, parents are hungry for content like this because everywhere they turn godlessness is being pushed by schools, left-wing publishers like Scholastic, and Hollywood. When Brave Books first introduced a God-centered Christmas game called "_Mouse in the House_ ," to counter the secular elf game that has become so popular -- it sold out in THREE HOURS!That's why step one of Brave Books' 12-week "Prepare the Way" revival, is ramping up the printing and distribution of _Saving the Easter Bunny_ big-time. **[And today I'm hoping you'll help them kick it into high gear before orders start pouring in by rushing back your best "Prepare the Way" gift.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=981ba8f0076a462ea175ba9f5addd179&_e=UnIJAZ2UPVt48ds6TBKjCb5Y5e7PfxP1dZKj0zWsZH10FCy0jLUv1OfkyQcvv8pAQfUDXOcolPhszNq5PcXNADHk92p2h6Lo8qjxm275kNORBqhuw3YNK2pzuiOHBJOcejiCpX_RYXfx_tWE-JL-8Tslhbh696bqWiersPs3mXtb_wVuDG3yDSNWGld__A5rvXuj8T7TC_NVslSclxofww1MJzGhxY0zzV8plon5sjfDJm0yxAgEXuRJiuQRnq-3jHHIBB8CbqW6BkJS7afIMs2cOLUph3BD1IvR1ba42d31WvvgtoLHRUCeLOgur7Szq_NhXDYPe6YRlDq9HSZIfKvJ8liafk98jayZH7KnScAC2-IxgMzYxNJ3yZJ1IqhHuHTUrHGP4fAhyzhxappLfA%3D%3D)** No family should go without this wonderful book because of overwhelming demand. Second... Recognizing that families who want to raise their children with wholesome Christian values often feel alone in their mission...Brave Books is launching a 17-city traveling church tour that starts in Ponta Vedra Beach, Florida and ends in Laurel, Mississippi. I'll be leading the tour in every city as we prepare our hearts and our families for Easter through prayer, worship, music, and just some good old-fashioned conversation about raising Godly children in our godless culture.Our church tour aims to ignite a spirit of revival in thousands of families this Easter season and I can't wait to see what God makes of that! But getting our worship teams, musicians, and all the rest to 17 different cities for thousands of families to enjoy won't be easy and it won't be inexpensive.But I know we can do it.Brave Books is a small Christian company founded by a doctor named Trent Talbot. After having his first child, he saw how the Left was using books and entertainment to turn the hearts and minds of America's children away from God. And so he decided to take action and with the help of believers just like you, look at what they've already done:
---
>>> They've countered the Left's radical and ungodly "Drag Queen Story Hours" and filled children's hearts with goodness, gratitude, and God with their highly-publicized "See You at the Library" campaign. Armed with Brave Books' "See You at the Library" kits, thousands of parents, grandparents, children, and concerned citizens have gathered at over 360 libraries in 49 states to take back our libraries.>>> Created an historic TV show called "Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk" to fight the ungodly lessons coming out of Hollywood. It's our modern day "Mr. Rogers' Neighborhood" funded by everyday Americans who want to return American culture to God. "Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk" uses humor and storytelling to reinforce the traditional biblical values that have made America great.>>> And now you are crucial to the success and failure of our "Prepare the Way" revival campaign which features the printing and distribution of _Saving the Easter Bunny_ and a 17-city church tour.
---
Just look at what parents have already said about S _aving the Easter Bunny_ :
---
"It's not easy to explain the true meaning of Easter to adults never mind to children, but Brave Books does it beautifully."
---
— Lisa A.
---
"My kids love the amazing illustrations and so do I!"
---
– Bob A.
---
"My three granddaughters barely sit still but when I'm reading this book and Lord Joshua dies, you can hear a pin drop. That's quickly replaced by squeals of joy after the resurrection. Thank you for bringing the joy of Easter to their little hearts."
---
– Laurin
---
And listen to this...**[**Your "Prepare the Way" gift of $35, $50, $100 or more, not only helps fund this revival campaign that makes Jesus the reason for the Easter season once more...**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=981ba8f0076a462ea175ba9f5addd179&_e=UnIJAZ2UPVt48ds6TBKjCb5Y5e7PfxP1dZKj0zWsZH10FCy0jLUv1OfkyQcvv8pAQfUDXOcolPhszNq5PcXNADHk92p2h6Lo8qjxm275kNORBqhuw3YNK2pzuiOHBJOcejiCpX_RYXfx_tWE-JL-8Tslhbh696bqWiersPs3mXtb_wVuDG3yDSNWGld__A5rvXuj8T7TC_NVslSclxofww1MJzGhxY0zzV8plon5sjeogOycmx3Zu9-74Ja7floVWN47iAaPv2cvDnQ_gHCMXAHQuyRCffdF_Os2Ahyw6F7dl0BJTlm7Kw3R4Fyv8CTzqtebYx2ojoukkaY_BZr1IehZi6AhOn5im3bkq2QP6o3WE4f8yRhu5_qxuFtuOgO7oUT7rD_hddTDH0jNXcAoUg%3D%3D)** Your gift helps Brave Books complete a groundbreaking comprehensive homeschool curriculum that gives parents an alternative to woke government schools.AND your gift helps Brave Books begin work on an historic Gospel book series that will bring the Bible to life for a generation of children and parents in desperate need of God's truth. But nothing Brave Books accomplishes is possible without you. And if you need one more reason to help, when you **[contribute $100 or more to the "Prepare the Way" revival](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=981ba8f0076a462ea175ba9f5addd179&_e=UnIJAZ2UPVt48ds6TBKjCb5Y5e7PfxP1dZKj0zWsZH10FCy0jLUv1OfkyQcvv8pAQfUDXOcolPhszNq5PcXNADHk92p2h6Lo8qjxm275kNORBqhuw3YNK2pzuiOHBJOcejiCpX_RYXfx_tWE-JL-8Tslhbh696bqWiersPs3mXtb_wVuDG3yDSNWGld__A5rvXuj8T7TC_NVslSclxofww1MJzGhxY0zzV8plon5sjfk0SJes4qk7Jox_bi8ohCQ0n5J6h533jxH2gXQbjfMBCAiKzttdejXrrLG0cSjfYv7o_ECBZ4eGw9XsgJV1Xw6Cf5BZFZWe1-6o0-7T2r9PUoVPbCVw5Zw7USPyLFgVf1IJ8EjA6TvLGZwiDD0DGQNf73kagQweV5Ik3d1dJQrmw%3D%3D)** , Brave Books will send you _Saving the Easter Bunny_ absolutely free as a thank you. You can keep _Saving the Easter Bunny_ for your family, gift it to someone you love, or you can donate it to your favorite charity in the hopes of reaching a family who doesn't have a Christian role model in their life. **[**What's most important is that you rush back your best "Prepare the Way" gift of $35, $50, $100, or more right away.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=981ba8f0076a462ea175ba9f5addd179&_e=UnIJAZ2UPVt48ds6TBKjCb5Y5e7PfxP1dZKj0zWsZH10FCy0jLUv1OfkyQcvv8pAQfUDXOcolPhszNq5PcXNADHk92p2h6Lo8qjxm275kNORBqhuw3YNK2pzuiOHBJOcejiCpX_RYXfx_tWE-JL-8Tslhbh696bqWiersPs3mXtb_wVuDG3yDSNWGld__A5rvXuj8T7TC_NVslSclxofww1MJzGhxY0zzV8plon5sjeRVw3iA9m9UsHZt_MV8ikSiuQw7LnrbwKdHN5dpPtqkcXGIWId3fzI2Owm8yPrSlMtYUQfcR2jAV8kaVynS338g5IGTM10yu9dmTz5Rm9Qlo602NRkUu5YqDbpBlKzrT9S54XSJhz5Zok9Ae8ovDlWD-fFA-qonwIAqC3cr4Vf4A%3D%3D)** Thank you for bringing the true meaning of Easter to families all across America.
---
May God bless you this coming Easter season,
---

My friend, if you've seen me talking about Brave Books on Fox News, you know their mission is to counter the ungodly lies being pushed by the Left in schools, libraries, and Hollywood......by creating high-quality, wholesome, and Godly books and entertainment that instill conservative values and Gospel lessons in our children. And their "Prepare the Way" revival campaign is their biggest effort yet to point parents and children to the empty tomb and God’s redeeming love.Here’s exactly what their strategy is...First... Brave Books knows that families need an easy and impactful way to counter the Left's secularization of Easter and instead, captivate children with its true meaning. So, they created Saving the Easter Bunny , a brand-new children's book that's destined to be a classic.In it, Ronnie the Rabbit learns the hard way what sin is and that our Lord Jesus Christ loves us so much that he took the punishment for that sin.Jesus is represented by a powerful lion named Lord Joshua and the book beautifully portrays his resurrection and God's never-ending redeeming love for us. It's incredible.And let me tell you, parents are hungry for content like this because everywhere they turn godlessness is being pushed by schools, left-wing publishers like Scholastic, and Hollywood. When Brave Books first introduced a God-centered Christmas game called "Mouse in the House ," to counter the secular elf game that has become so popular -- it sold out in THREE HOURS!That's why step one of Brave Books' 12-week "Prepare the Way" revival, is ramping up the printing and distribution of Saving the Easter Bunny big-time. No family should go without this wonderful book because of overwhelming demand. Second... Recognizing that families who want to raise their children with wholesome Christian values often feel alone in their mission...Brave Books is launching a 17-city traveling church tour that starts in Ponta Vedra Beach, Florida and ends in Laurel, Mississippi. I'll be leading the tour in every city as we prepare our hearts and our families for Easter through prayer, worship, music, and just some good old-fashioned conversation about raising Godly children in our godless culture.Our church tour aims to ignite a spirit of revival in thousands of families this Easter season and I can't wait to see what God makes of that! But getting our worship teams, musicians, and all the rest to 17 different cities for thousands of families to enjoy won't be easy and it won't be inexpensive.But I know we can do it.Brave Books is a small Christian company founded by a doctor named Trent Talbot. It's our modern day "Mr. Rogers' Neighborhood" funded by everyday Americans who want to return American culture to God. That's quickly replaced by squeals of joy after the resurrection. Thank you for bringing the joy of Easter to their little hearts." – Laurin And listen to this... name: Senator Vincent Hughes
subject: Tell Federal Lawmakers: Don't Cut My Coverage, Don't Cut My Healthcare
body:
If you are having trouble viewing this message or would like to share it on a social network, you can [view the message online](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?gpiv=2100169418.172376.18&gen=1).
| Share On | [](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=share&piv=2100169418.172376.18&snid=2)
---|---
[](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100169418.172376.18&gen=1&mailing_linkid=13564)
# **Tell Federal Lawmakers: Don 't Cut My Coverage, Don't Cut My Healthcare**
This week Senator Vincent Hughes was joined by Democratic colleagues from the Senate and House to [announce 4 bills that would protect the Affordable Care Act (ACA) in Pennsylvania from attacks in Washington DC](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100169418.172376.18&gen=1&mailing_linkid=13565). The package of bills would keep healthcare accessible and affordable for all Pennsylvanians and protect against any ACA rollbacks that could come at the federal level. Senator Hughes wants to:
* Require coverage for pre-existing conditions
* Allow children to stay on parent's insurance until 26
* Prohibit lifetime limits on coverage
* Require coverage of essential health benefits like emergency room care, blood tests, maternity care, and mental health treatment

* * *
[](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100169418.172376.18&gen=1&mailing_linkid=13566) While these bills can protect Pennsylvanians, it's important to let federal lawmakers know we don't want them messing with our healthcare. The message is clear: **Don 't Cut My Coverage, Don't Cut My Healthcare** You can contact Congress by calling the numbers below.
* * *
**A Recap of Our Affordable Care Act Telephone Town Hall** Senator Hughes spoke with constituents this week on a telephone townhall to hear their questions about healthcare and discuss the legislation he introduced to protect the Affordable Care Act. He heard from several residents who had questions about their specific healthcare plans and concerns about the future of coverage for everyone. Experts from the [Pennsylvania Health Access Network](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100169418.172376.18&gen=1&mailing_linkid=13567) and [Pennie](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100169418.172376.18&gen=1&mailing_linkid=13568) reassured callers that we can all work together to protect healthcare coverage. If we stand together, share personal stories, and contact our federal lawmakers, we can push back. Senator Hughes is in this fight with you. He's ready to do everything he can at a state level to protect Pennsylvanians and fight back against right-wing attempts to take coverage, funding, and money away from hardworking people. **Click below to listen to the full conversation on our website.** [**Senator Hughes discussed the future of healthcare and the Affordable Care Act with experts from the Pennsylvania Health Access Network and Pennie**](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100169418.172376.18&gen=1&mailing_linkid=13569)

name: Mark Pukita, GFI Ohio
subject: 🚨Ohio's Leading Grassroots Brand Arrives!
body:
Don't miss out on Ohio's top grassroots communications brand. | | | [ ](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=1438cfaf6d&e=5c740fa3e2)
---
|
**PLEASE READ THIS AND CONSIDER ACTING! IT WILL ONLY TAKE MINUTES BUT IS EXTREMELY IMPORTANT!**

Thank you for subscribing & staying subscribed!

**BE SURE TO HAVE YOUR FAMILY & FRIENDS "JOIN US":**

---
| [Join Us!](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=9a4b87d353&e=5c740fa3e2 "Join Us!")
---
| | | ** **
**BIG NEWS: OHIO'S #1 GRASSROOTS
COMMUNICATION BRAND IS COMING!**

---
|
Greetings from **Grassroots Freedom Initiative (GFI)** —your home for truth, transparency, and real action in Ohio!

We’ve been hard at work behind the scenes, and we’re thrilled to **give you a first look** at our next big move: the launch of a **powerful social media and digital information network** under the GFI brand. 🚀

This isn't just an update—it’s a **revolution** in how Ohioans get the real story and take meaningful action!

### **🔹****What’s Coming?**
We’re building a **massive digital presence** , including a revamped website, expanded email & SMS (text) alerts, and non-stop, hard-hitting content across social media.

GFI will **deliver the truth** in four powerful ways:

🔹 **"Need to Know"** – Civic education through emails, texts, posts & videos.
🔹 **"Lies, Big Lies, Bigger Lies"** – Videos & post exposing corruption & rigging at all levels of Ohio government.
🔹 **"Ready, Aim, Fire"** – Simple, direct actions YOU can take to make a real impact.
🔹 **"Truth Bombs"** – Taking on media & establishment dishonesty **head-on**.

[](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=e8da6c703a&e=5c740fa3e2)

📢 **We've already started rolling out content!** If you haven’t seen our videos yet, check them out on our growing social platforms below.

[](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=53ae83cda4&e=5c740fa3e2)

### **💥****Why This Matters**
We all know the **mainstream media is corrupt**. We know **both major political parties in Ohio mislead, lie, and withhold information** to maintain power.

**That ends now.**

Information is power, and **we’re taking it back.** The establishment thrives when voters stay in the dark—so we’re turning on the lights and putting YOU in control.

### **📲****Follow & Subscribe NOW!**
We’ve **revamped and rebranded** all of our platforms to make GFI Ohio’s **#1 grassroots communications hub**. Make sure to follow and share!

👉 **Instagram** : [@gfiohio](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=ef40feaff2&e=5c740fa3e2)
👉 **Rumble** : [GFI Ohio](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=2739b50b09&e=5c740fa3e2)
👉 **TikTok** : [@gfiohio](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=2c163190be&e=5c740fa3e2)
👉 **X (Twitter)** : [@gfiohio](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=bc4a9a5a50&e=5c740fa3e2)
👉 **YouTube** : [GFI Ohio](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=83e43bd346&e=5c740fa3e2)

**We’re also keeping these personal accounts active because of their large audiences:**

👉 **Facebook (Mark Pukita)** : [Follow Here](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=bf70172d72&e=5c740fa3e2)
👉 **X (Mark Pukita)** : [Follow Here](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=2784281124&e=5c740fa3e2)

### **🔹****The Mission: 280,000 Ohioans Strong**
Why 280,000? Because **research shows** that just **3.5% of a population can create massive, peaceful change.** Ohio has **8 million registered voters** , and 3.5% of that is **280,000 voters**.

Our goal? **Regularly communicating with 280,000 Ohioans at the push of a button.**

But we need YOUR help. The faster we grow, the faster we **take back control of Ohio**.

### **👊****Join the Movement**
We’re not here to tell Ohioans **what** to think. We’re here to **empower them with the truth** —because we believe **informed voters make the best decisions** for their families, communities, and our great state.

✅ **Follow our platforms.**
✅ **Share this email.**
✅ **Help us reach 280,000 Ohioans!**

The **fight for truth in Ohio starts NOW.** Let’s do this—together.
**Thank you for being part of the movement!**

**– Grassroots Freedom Initiative (GFI)**

| Thank you for being a GFI **person** as part of the GFI **network**. We're always interested in how we can do a better job of connecting patriots across Ohio. If you want to communicate, we're here!

Best regards,

**Mark Pukita
A GFI Person
mark@gfiohio.com
614-499-0599 (c)
[GFIOhio.com](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=3b748bf51c&e=5c740fa3e2)**
---

**Our mailing address is:**
The Grassroots Freedom Initiative4240 Hobbs Landing Dr WDublin, OH 43017-6025
[Add us to your address book](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/vcard?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=9877b1cc31)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/profile?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=9877b1cc31&e=5c740fa3e2&c=96be7a72f9) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=9877b1cc31&t=b&e=5c740fa3e2&c=96be7a72f9).

name: Mikie Sherrill
subject: Before I step on the stage
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Governor
body:
We can shape New Jersey’s future — together.

| Hi Peter, it’s Mikie.

In just a few hours, I’ll be stepping onto the debate stage for the very first time in this campaign.

I’m running for governor to shake up the status quo and do big things for New Jersey, and I’m looking forward to laying out my vision for our state’s future tonight. But I can’t do this alone.

[_**Before I step on stage, will you chip in $10 or more to Abigail Spanberger and my campaign for governor and help us keep up our momentum? We all have a place and a say in New Jersey’s future, and I want you to be a part of it all.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101438441/525954140/18178104?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2025-02-02_1&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZmU4ZTY0OWMtYTFlMS1lZjExLTg4ZjgtMDAyMjQ4MmE5N2U5IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=qrpHfYmETtHNhS0xfjJvOPQzNFBn-Wu47V6mJt2L-HA=)
---
| [DONATE ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101438442/525954141/18178104?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2025-02-02_1&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZmU4ZTY0OWMtYTFlMS1lZjExLTg4ZjgtMDAyMjQ4MmE5N2U5IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=qrpHfYmETtHNhS0xfjJvOPQzNFBn-Wu47V6mJt2L-HA=)
---
In the past few weeks and months, I’ve met so many people who believe as deeply as I do in the promise of our state. I also know we have to confront the real challenges New Jerseyans are facing.

Here are just a few things I’m ready to get done — yes, really get done —as governor:
* Building more housing so families can stay in New Jersey and put down roots here
* Repairing our public transit system so that New Jerseyans can get to work on time and make it home to take their kids to doctor’s appointments
* Lowering the costs of groceries and everyday essentials
* Protecting our rights and freedoms from the extreme agenda coming out of Washington

At the heart of it all, I believe we all have a place and a say in New Jersey’s future. Let’s build something we all can be proud of.

[_**Every dollar we raise right now will help hire more organizers, get our message out to voters across the state, and win this race. Can you pitch in now to help us hit our pre-debate goal?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101438443/525954142/18178104?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2025-02-02_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZmU4ZTY0OWMtYTFlMS1lZjExLTg4ZjgtMDAyMjQ4MmE5N2U5IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=qrpHfYmETtHNhS0xfjJvOPQzNFBn-Wu47V6mJt2L-HA=)
| [DONATE ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101438444/525954143/18178104?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2025-02-02_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZmU4ZTY0OWMtYTFlMS1lZjExLTg4ZjgtMDAyMjQ4MmE5N2U5IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=qrpHfYmETtHNhS0xfjJvOPQzNFBn-Wu47V6mJt2L-HA=)
---
Thank you for being part of this team. Talk soon.

— Mikie

name: Trump's Oligarchy via Our Revolution
subject: A government run by billionaires
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/21151?t=1011?refcode=email-02022025_v&akid=7625%2E5885482%2EzbXtwA ]Our Revolution logo

Peter Willis,

For the past 13 days, Trump has unleashed a firestorm, moving at breakneck
speed — surrounded by Elon Musk and the rest of his billionaire buddies.

He’s flooding the zone: mass government purges, nonstop Executive Orders,
and blatant attempts to subvert The Constitution and slash critical
spending – all with an eye towards massive new tax breaks for the
ultra-wealthy on the backs of working people.

We’re witnessing the dismantling of our democracy, plain and simple. And
in its place, Trump and Musk are methodically installing an oligarchy – a
government run by billionaires for the billionaires. A system rigged in
favor of the wealthiest and most powerful men on earth at the expense of
everyone else.

Our Revolution has been shouting it from the rooftops every single chance
we get, so it’s likely none of this is news to you. But after watching one
attack after the next unfold this week, the Democratic party – and the
rest of the country – is starting to wake up to what is happening before
our very eyes.

And it's about time because one thing is clear: Trump, Musk, Big Tech, and
Big Oil’s corporate takeover is well underway. And it’s going to take ALL
of us, standing up and working together, to stop them.

The good news is that Our Revolution has been preparing and mobilizing to
lead the way. We’re building a massive Citizen Action Team ready to work
with allies to raise absolute hell when Trump and Musk go too far –
organizing nationwide protests, unleashing powerful lobbying pushes aimed
at members of Congress, and getting our message directly in front of the
media to sound the alarm.

It’s working. Thanks to outcry from all of us, Trump and Musk already had
to rescind this week’s spending freeze. It’s a sign that we can fight back
and win, but NOW is the time to double down.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/21151?t=1057?express_lane=true&amount=22&refcode=email-02022025nd&akid=7625%2E5885482%2EzbXtwA ]We’re ready. But we can’t do it without your support. Will you donate now
to stop Trump’s Oligarchy?

If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your

He’s flooding the zone: mass government purges, nonstop Executive Orders, and blatant attempts to subvert The Constitution and slash critical spending – all with an eye towards massive new tax breaks for the ultra-wealthy on the backs of working people. We’re witnessing the dismantling of our democracy, plain and simple. And in its place, Trump and Musk are methodically installing an oligarchy – a government run by billionaires for the billionaires. A system rigged in favor of the wealthiest and most powerful men on earth at the expense of everyone else. Our Revolution has been shouting it from the rooftops every single chance we get, so it’s likely none of this is news to you. But after watching one attack after the next unfold this week, the Democratic party – and the rest of the country – is starting to wake up to what is happening before our very eyes. And it's about time because one thing is clear: Trump, Musk, Big Tech, and Big Oil’s corporate takeover is well underway. I just wanted to take a moment to say _thank you_ , Peter.

Because of this team – because of you – we not only met our crucial end-of-month fundraising goal for January. . .we surpassed it!

Every grassroots donation, every dollar pitched in, helps my team and me continue to fight back against the deep-pocketed extremists on Capitol Hill who are dead-set on trying to take us backward by enacting their dangerous Project 2025 agenda.

Now, as we look ahead to February and prepare to dive head-first into what will undoubtedly be a year filled with challenges, your support is more important than ever. So thank you for standing with me. Thank you for believing in this grassroots movement – **and thank you for helping us build the kind of future we all want for Washington and our country.**

Onward,

Kim Rep. Kim Schrier is a doctor, scientist, and mom, fighting for Washington's 8th District in Congress. This is one of the most competitive districts in the country, so we need your help to keep Kim in Congress. # AMANDA CHASE
---
|
# VIRGINIA'S HONEY BADGER
---
| Dear Hello Only 48 hours until crossover. Crossover takes place at midnight this Tuesday night, February 4. All Senate bill must be voted on or dealt with before this Constitutional deadline. Tuesday is usually a very long day.
Most bills are now out of committee and getting ready to be heard on the full Senate floor. I've highlighted the bills that I think are most important to watch below by committee. There are still a few bills before the Courts of Justice Committee and the Commerce and Labor Committee. I've highlighted the ones you want to monitor.
Remember that you can tune in to these committees and watch these sponsoring Senators present their bills before the committee. You can use "Zoom" during the public comment period of the presentation, and express in real time support or opposition for a bill. You don't even have to be there. You can tune in from the comfort of your living room and participate in the process. Please take advantage of this opportunity.
All of the bills I've highlighted in the Courts of Justice Committee below are Senate Republicans with the exception of Senator Surovell.
Republican Senator Bill DeSteph is sponsoring and presenting a bill tomorrow that seems to add a weapon for self defense that uses compressed air to the list of concealed weapons the public is not allowed to carry. While I've always known Senator DeSteph to be pro-2A, I am perplexed by this bill and hope you will join me in watching this presentation to learn more. Law abiding Virginians should be able to conceal carry any self defense necessary to protect themselves against an attacker.
## Virginia Constitution, Article I. Bill of Rights, Section 13. Militia; standing armies; military subordinate to civil power states,
"That a well regulated militia, composed of the body of the people, trained to arms, is the proper, natural, and safe defense of a free state, therefore, the right of the people to keep and bear arms shall not be infringed; that standing armies, in time of peace, should be avoided as dangerous to liberty; and that in all cases the military should be under strict subordination to, and governed by, the civil power." Virginians should have access to self defense weapons including those that use compressed air.
A ranked choice voting bill and a gender reaffirming care bill both come before the full senate tomorrow. Both should be opposed.
---
| |
---
Now for some good news. As of Friday, Democrat Senator Pekarsky's [SB1031](https://byh4wqwab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001sfrDZxN2he6slCAoForjmbJO8zfelaJZzftP6E1gcCngDuJPxsQ8DGMB7D0zbC70C8pKkdJeV625dHcoXeUHArHJZhqgHjWqE9NxVQ891Hvpi-CbJ1GqxLuNYNHHhJ4kDCFT2fBkomnLEvmZbEVZsM7bofoqQWjwu5QcdwhFZC--hhvrZAcY3pXVxscsMlpB&c=dT3ZBLwl4uqngNpwkGpeiln1t58KIX4wQ81KRVpj_bNuP6IuVQafTQ==&ch=9AcD_jd9ng-Q8cz8jlgFeyAikp3i6VJooeJltyDP6r-ba66eNHDoRQ==) has now failed. This was an assault on homeschool families who homeschool under religious exemption. The bill thankfully died on a 13 to 2 vote, with even some Democrats voting against the bill. Democrat Senators Ebbin and Surovell were the 2 "no" votes. I would encourage folks to reach out to Senators Ebbin and Surovell, as I'm sure Senator Pekarsky will try this again next year.
In addition to going after homeschoolers, according to several sources to include the Daily Wire, Democrat Senator Pekarsky also has a history of going after a conservative teacher, who was her Republican opponent for Senate. The article is [here.](https://byh4wqwab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001sfrDZxN2he6slCAoForjmbJO8zfelaJZzftP6E1gcCngDuJPxsQ8DOG30vtNURBvhFh-YIxLeiKHP4DYzrSpV92r0QKh2rdGEHYrPGkcJENO_Q5j-d_z9J8vt3ZznCenyJRMh0C1aQ9KVcBNj570F14W1LPbYFocOHQM5oX-a067jZU4k1glZ1J1Ic6_Xv5rSrhuZ9eXv7ZMGNFNzp67pjCH1fpii-JCGUnP3Rt6RZAFkP98Dlym_w1yBor-fCkdpOJIiKMGuhTYnLT28bYLfex0a7cYFw3b--QV87e-7ChqbfsiAkdzPYq9xQkDX4D5SXUsE_xSFA8=&c=dT3ZBLwl4uqngNpwkGpeiln1t58KIX4wQ81KRVpj_bNuP6IuVQafTQ==&ch=9AcD_jd9ng-Q8cz8jlgFeyAikp3i6VJooeJltyDP6r-ba66eNHDoRQ==)
I've also received information from homeschool moms who tried to post opposition to SB1031 on Senator Stella Pekarsky's Facebook page. I'm told she deleted posts and then stopped allowing people to post on her Facebook page.
I'm also told she filed a police report against someone calling to protest the bill.
What's most disturbing is her ties to [CRHE Coalition for Responsible Home Education](https://byh4wqwab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001sfrDZxN2he6slCAoForjmbJO8zfelaJZzftP6E1gcCngDuJPxsQ8DOG30vtNURBvaZgNp7pNwBaBZgC7-ztyEqej40zfN_-V47xomh4rLiAboUoN9o6KAzqf63u06OGypXhVJVvwNBFmxi9O3Ega24ztqZf55HK7ucvGpBRroOU=&c=dT3ZBLwl4uqngNpwkGpeiln1t58KIX4wQ81KRVpj_bNuP6IuVQafTQ==&ch=9AcD_jd9ng-Q8cz8jlgFeyAikp3i6VJooeJltyDP6r-ba66eNHDoRQ==), which is a national organization whose goal is is strip all homeschooling rights, championing the "Make Homeschool Safe Act."
We must remain vigilant in watching bills coming before the General Assembly daily. Thanks to those of you who are able to participate in the process.
You do make a difference.

clean_body: The 2025 General Assembly Session | | | | 2025 THE HONEY BADGER REPORT | | | | | | | 2025 SESSION Monday What can you expect? | ATTEND IN PERSON OR CALL IN TO THE MEETING LIVE | | | Monday Senate Committee Meetings | BILLS COMING UP MONDAY BY COMMITTEE CLICK THE LINKS BELOW FOR FULL LISTING OF ALL BILLS COMING UP TOMORROW | == | == No Local Government docket posted as of 6pm Sunday evening | == No Education and Health Subcommittee on Higher Education docket posted as of 6pm Sunday evening | == | == | AMANDA CHASE | VIRGINIA'S HONEY BADGER | Dear Hello Only 48 hours until crossover. Crossover takes place at midnight this Tuesday night, February 4. All Senate bill must be voted on or dealt with before this Constitutional deadline. Tuesday is usually a very long day. Most bills are now out of committee and getting ready to be heard on the full Senate floor. I've highlighted the bills that I think are most important to watch below by committee. There are still a few bills before the Courts of Justice Committee and the Commerce and Labor Committee. I've highlighted the ones you want to monitor. Remember that you can tune in to these committees and watch these sponsoring Senators present their bills before the committee. You can use "Zoom" during the public comment period of the presentation, and express in real time support or opposition for a bill. You don't even have to be there. You can tune in from the comfort of your living room and participate in the process. Please take advantage of this opportunity. All of the bills I've highlighted in the Courts of Justice Committee below are Senate Republicans with the exception of Senator Surovell. Republican Senator Bill DeSteph is sponsoring and presenting a bill tomorrow that seems to add a weapon for self defense that uses compressed air to the list of concealed weapons the public is not allowed to carry. While I've always known Senator DeSteph to be pro-2A, I am perplexed by this bill and hope you will join me in watching this presentation to learn more. Law abiding Virginians should be able to conceal carry any self defense necessary to protect themselves against an attacker. Virginia Constitution, Article I. Bill of Rights, Section 13. Militia; standing armies; military subordinate to civil power states, "That a well regulated militia, composed of the body of the people, trained to arms, is the proper, natural, and safe defense of a free state, therefore, the right of the people to keep and bear arms shall not be infringed; that standing armies, in time of peace, should be avoided as dangerous to liberty; and that in all cases the military should be under strict subordination to, and governed by, the civil power." Virginians should have access to self defense weapons including those that use compressed air. A ranked choice voting bill and a gender reaffirming care bill both come before the full senate tomorrow. Both should be opposed. | | Now for some good news. As of Friday, Democrat Senator Pekarsky's == has now failed. This was an assault on homeschool families who homeschool under religious exemption. The bill thankfully died on a 13 to 2 vote, with even some Democrats voting against the bill. Democrat Senators Ebbin and Surovell were the 2 "no" votes. I would encourage folks to reach out to Senators Ebbin and Surovell, as I'm sure Senator Pekarsky will try this again next year. In addition to going after homeschoolers, according to several sources to include the Daily Wire, Democrat Senator Pekarsky also has a history of going after a conservative teacher, who was her Republican opponent for Senate. What's most disturbing is her ties to ==, which is a national organization whose goal is is strip all homeschooling rights, championing the "Make Homeschool Safe Act." **Congress MUST PASS my Protection of Women and Girls in Sports Act! I 'm utterly shocked and disappointed that we need Congressional action to protect women and girls in sports, but here's how we got here.**

**[THEN-](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=f88145f3f18948caa8fee9116296cba8&_e=-oz2Vhqe-ul2bq8Sot-9jxDZdI4vtpKDM1fluJ97XQNPv9AXvbnc11SeBevpVZ5gm_PzAPfTkbrZ6pRx4rbnEN4MBvjLpBgmFJv21ynsn9a58FaBJA934rl3UHbC_F3BpUULeWCbMfkAX1HgadphUD_ZugBiCrIxyigZHTMTXIiwkfyAXGbCkKYcbOmbNGuWbJsCDNCs273LkPayysUUBQvO1529SW2rOUi7T0pCYbPe0SvXyLM4aGF1TA8Pwxy8wuLtkByN7hMdUKaGIwB6btrmN3dSdubq9ABHMkOe7u26Fg5aq-QAaTQg-8Gpq6VqjfiGlhtwzgMTycHiFVuZGw%3D%3D)** The Radical Left began demanding that biological men who identify as transgender women could compete in women's sports, threatening to withhold Title IX federal financial assistance for schools that would not comply. This led to biological men all over the country infiltrating women's sports and instantly becoming the top athletes, regardless of age or sport. Notably, female athletes like Riley Gaines were ROBBED of trophies and championships after training their whole lives.

**[NOW-](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=f88145f3f18948caa8fee9116296cba8&_e=-oz2Vhqe-ul2bq8Sot-9jxDZdI4vtpKDM1fluJ97XQNPv9AXvbnc11SeBevpVZ5gm_PzAPfTkbrZ6pRx4rbnEN4MBvjLpBgmFJv21ynsn9a58FaBJA934rl3UHbC_F3BpUULeWCbMfkAX1HgadphUD_ZugBiCrIxyigZHTMTXIj_Oww-XyD_WZMhKypOjk7rxJyLTkHF6YyizCWBDtgu1lxCc0-T4IYQ2tPJwdtxLdsa6hy5fNx4ciymNhtOK9zftuxqp5GPN1-Qf5BWawryJoEsUp5sRDydDKf8nphdqc4FWTDUEb5i_ZTCzF5GJ-9T5i9LrmdF39H10D3bgHGUlw%3D%3D)** I'm putting my foot down. I introduced the Protection of Women and Girls in Sports Act to clarify that including male athletes in women's sports IS a Title IX violation and clearly defines males and females as the biological sex assigned at birth. I need your help to make sure that our Senate Majority passes this bill._

**I need 50 Patriots to join my team before midnight so we can show Congress that this bill has grassroots support.[**Can you chip in just $10 to support me?**](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=f88145f3f18948caa8fee9116296cba8&_e=-oz2Vhqe-ul2bq8Sot-9jxDZdI4vtpKDM1fluJ97XQNPv9AXvbnc11SeBevpVZ5gm_PzAPfTkbrZ6pRx4rbnEN4MBvjLpBgmFJv21ynsn9a58FaBJA934rl3UHbC_F3B4QvRViiCyMwqir9TojkMBaYAR61M7rm7rq33T6OIGXR2WVIuv9v2EqLQgUeqdcGtbaMqDgj86zKn339eJCh9lhtyquQOexcBcEuPyvuBjZHtIohF2-37ukxl_f7iY7tMdPQrjhiNdrfGmJIAWltfo6Bh-kw8vLFPRAbkiIwdAdmmi0lfohp1bvfABiqcWu-TPV-ruUDedonRqiWyGg6Fww%3D%3D)**
