Meet Coach Tuberville:

**Coach Tuberville was born in Camden, Arkansas, the third of three children of Olive and Charles Tuberville. College Football 's 2004 Coach of the Year and two-time SEC Coach of the Year, Tommy Tuberville is most often recognized for his success on the field. But it is the legacy of his father, a highly decorated WWII veteran and Purple Heart recipient, that motivates Coach Tuberville to give back to the brave men and women of the United States Armed Forces.

In 1989 Coach Tuberville met his future wife, Suzanne Fette, at the Sugar Bowl in New Orleans. They were married in 1991 and have two boys, Tucker and Troy, who continue to make their dad proud.

In his career as a College Football Coach, Tommy started a long and successful career at the University of Miami, starting as a graduate assistant and rising to the Hurricanes' defensive coordinator. He led the Canes to three AP national championships and coached future Hall of Famers Ray Lewis and Warren Sapp, as well as Dwayne "The Rock" Johnson.

In 1998, Coach Tuberville was announced as the next head coach for the Auburn Tigers. Tuberville's time at Auburn was a success by any measure, as the Tigers captured eight consecutive bowl appearances, including five New Year's Day bowl appearances, five SEC Western Division titles, one SEC Championship, and a 13-0 season in 2004, after which Coach Tuberville was once again named the AP's SEC Coach of the Year. For his efforts during the perfect 2004 season, Tuberville would be named Paul "Bear" Bryant Coach of the Year, Associated Press Coach of the Year, Walter Camp Coach of the Year, Sporting News Coach of the Year, and AFCA Coach of the Year, among others.

_In 2020, Coach Tuberville became Senator Tuberville, winning his election to represent all Alabamians in the United States Senate with the full support of President Trump. Since then, he's supported President Trump's America-First policies while fighting off the Radical Left. In his first term as Senator, Tommy was one of eight Republicans to vote against certifying the 2020 election, has been a strong pro-life advocate, and called out Democrats for being pro-crime.

Now, Coach Tuberville is running for re-election so he can continue representing Alabamians and Americans in the United States Senate. The Radical Left has him circled as a prime target to defeat in the 2026 Midterm Elections. Can he count on your support? _

** [**HELP COACH TUBERVILLE**](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=f88145f3f18948caa8fee9116296cba8&_e=-oz2Vhqe-ul2bq8Sot-9jxDZdI4vtpKDM1fluJ97XQNPv9AXvbnc11SeBevpVZ5gm_PzAPfTkbrZ6pRx4rbnEN4MBvjLpBgmFJv21ynsn9a58FaBJA934rl3UHbC_F3B4QvRViiCyMwqir9TojkMBaYAR61M7rm7rq33T6OIGXR2WVIuv9v2EqLQgUeqdcGtUr2jaholLv9za1WoBaFe_qgLtEFESqs0rMszwNMdUJ20H4eegcWfx6mOpS_Qfgy2G9c7sKnh8OyTyWgufPQwr1ivuuNHE8HtQvJdyB4cAyK16E7mQlUzJjjcoWrhShGCfV0LDv59RoV-uxO-fuJFvw%3D%3D)

| | Everett Kelly sits atop the American Federation of Government Employees – the largest government union with dues collected from 800,000 workers – who are fighting tooth and nail to defend the “crown jewel” of the radical left......the deep-state. And, before President Trump even takes office, Everett Kelly and the other proponents of “unionized government” are making the rounds in the media attacking President Trump, attacking Elon Musk, attacking Vivek Ramaswamy, and conspiring with the outgoing Biden administration to extend collective bargaining agreements (an attempt to tie President trump’s hands on this issue for the next two years). **[**That is why the results of this NATIONAL SURVEY ON ENDING GOVERNMENT UNIONS will be tabulated and delivered to the Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE).**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=a7a745dd96d04e5ba587bae534273e2a&_e=jySHQHSJpqOvaTA2986KZRUyxPSZBLsByTQlbdDZfttFe38GlVVZh8PFIRKsjJ-Z0d_8Bysp0bQGFYI_Fr4bu5oPPkAmJaVSY-zfAh0v7bCLAk5D6lbm9euluOMWVtyagTUAq3a2KI-r8-g-SDejznHEp6QQ54opDZBi0F2xWOiyWubTsKTzdvMJVX-t0GQlv-FVXkbu9H58ux8JTpoHkV4f1-afP3sPOATl1-BX-H8meTCMeNa8rvnp48N2sbIprvjYC9eD_hNobIX7c5_GpXAo55tsA5lkR1X7utFLCOvf7mRKYzQMS9e51Q7Y8xnSBQvQMbZg7CGHFwaEjTTB6YoO3l44Qliqy1XaaTUGS63THPq5UbTqyusPd0HiFqzBNqUCO25nAByK4n2KRBeQH5G0oVDks1V1hpI8yD9duDM%3D)** Your participation is of the utmost importance.
---
* _Do you believe it’s acceptable that only 6% of federal employees show up in person for a full work week. And if you remove security guards, janitors, facilities and maintenance personnel, the number drops to 1%._
* _Did you know that in addition to 15 cabinet departments, there are over 2,000 federal agencies?_
* _Were you aware that leasing and maintenance costs for federal office buildings costs $15.7 billion per year?_
* _Or that the occupancy of these buildings is 12% on average?_
* _What about the fact that it’s nearly impossible to fire a federal employee?_

---
These are the questions on part one of the **[**NATIONAL SURVEY ON ENDING GOVERNMENT UNIONS.**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=a7a745dd96d04e5ba587bae534273e2a&_e=jySHQHSJpqOvaTA2986KZRUyxPSZBLsByTQlbdDZfttFe38GlVVZh8PFIRKsjJ-Z0d_8Bysp0bQGFYI_Fr4bu5oPPkAmJaVSY-zfAh0v7bCLAk5D6lbm9euluOMWVtyagTUAq3a2KI-r8-g-SDejznHEp6QQ54opDZBi0F2xWOiyWubTsKTzdvMJVX-t0GQlv-FVXkbu9H58ux8JTpoHkV4f1-afP3sPOATl1-BX-H8meTCMeNa8rvnp48N2sbIprvjYC9eD_hNobIX7c5_Gpf4ty8yhO9ljTnfCd11G0KIYeWJssdTAA5ohbozjNy7LHNl5XcMuM6dtcp6OohOhjagS1A6i6SbrIwIADi4rHBRNVuyFYnGUBeT1wiqWAYE-D4wm_Xf6mRKXDyQnBRur03dLDC43yLdlwXDxBeKZUUQ%3D)** And if you think these questions are infuriating, just wait until you hear what makes up part two of the survey. You see, part two is concerned with the actions of those government employees who actually do show up for work, but who spend every hour of the day plotting to undermine the will of duly elected presidents and ignore duly passed legislation.In other words, the radical deep-state. These are the bureaucrats who’ve burrowed deep into the federal government (often they served as political appointees in a leftwing administration, but refuse to leave after that administration ends, becoming, instead, career “civil servant”).CIA. FBI. National Security Council. State Department. Pentagon. Hostile agents at the highest levels of these departments spent four years leaking, lying, and unleashing lawfare against the first Trump Administration.
---
* _Shouldn’t the people we elect to run the government actually run the government?_
* _Shouldn’t members of the executive branch work in good faith to advance the vision and policies of the head of the executive branch?_
* _Shouldn’t any bureaucrat who can’t respect the U.S. Constitution leave government service?_
* _Shouldn’t it be an enormous “red flag” that Kamala Harris won 93% of the vote in Washington DC and the fact that roughly 95% of campaign contributions by government bureaucrats go to Democrats?_

---
You and I both know that the Constitution of the United States grants no power to unelected federal bureaucrats. Yet these individuals have enormous power and zero accountability.It’s bad enough you and I are being ripped off financially (covered in part one of your survey).But what’s worse is the reality that our votes and our constitutional republic are being ripped off and wholly undermined by these unions (part two of you survey). In short, this is an attack on the very foundations of our country. It’s part of the Marxist playbook that is destroying America... one that I’m intimately familiar with... because I helped to write and execute it when I was a member of the radical Left movement in the 1960’s and 1970’s.I know from first-hand experience how Marxist radicals sought to infiltrate every facet of American life... _Schools. Churches. The military. Unions. Businesses. The media. Hollywood. _And, yes, the federal bureaucracy.Now, I’m working to expose the TRUTH about the radical Left to a new generation that is being fooled. At the Freedom Center we use the Left’s tactics against them – tactics like those outlined in Saul Alinsky’s “Rules for Radicals” ... in other words we fight fire with fire. We’ve had “woke” corporations and financial institutions conspire to “de-bank” and “de-platform” us before:
---
* They got MasterCard to shut off our online fundraising and credit card processing (we got it turned back on).
* We had to find a new bank after the local bank we’ve been at for years suddenly closed our accounts.
* The hotel we’ve held our annual fundraising conference at for the last 20 years abruptly declined to renew our contract.

---
You see, because of our effectiveness in fighting for conservative principles, they hate us. Like President Trump, we’ve faced countless lies, leaks, and lawfare attempts from the Left. But I refuse to back down.Especially against the wasteful, constitution-subverting unions that make up the federal deep-state. So please hurry. With your support today, I’m confident we can win this fight.

Sincerely,

HELP DEMS WIN TWO HOUSE SEATS IN FLORIDA >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-floridaspecials?refcode=111724_1]
Peter, we’ve just received breaking news out of Florida:
Governor Ron DeSantis has officially called on the Secretary of State to schedule TWO special elections on a RAPIDLY accelerated timeline.
To put it simply: Democrats now have a limited time to prepare to win TWO MORE HOUSE SEATS being vacated by Trump cabinet appointments
These special elections will determine the future of FL-01 , vacated by Matt Gaetz (reportedly stepping up as Trump’s pick for Attorney General), and FL-06 , soon to be left by Mike Waltz (rumored to become Trump’s National Security Advisor).
Flipping these suits blue IS possible - but only if we start preparing NOW. Will you help us build up a warchest of funding to rush to the Democrats who run for these seats? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-floridaspecials?refcode=111724_1]

We CANNOT let them get away with it!
Chip in NOW so we can have a stash of funds ready to go when Democrats put up a candidate for these seats >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-floridaspecials?refcode=111724_1]

subject: Join the Movement to Protect Women’s Rights
body:
Making Women Female Again
| Peter, The time to act is now! With Donald Trump in office, conservatives have a powerful ally in the mission to protect women’s rights. **_Maybe the movement’s most powerful ally, yet!_**
However, you and I cannot achieve our goals without a strong, united front.
President Trump is a tremendous help for finally giving a voice to the women who are under attack from leftist policies. But there’s only so much he can do, Peter. Enter my ambassadors. The Riley Gaines Center is committed to building a movement of advocates dedicated to standing up for women. **Your support will allow the Riley Gaines Center to organize events, produce educational materials, and advocate for policies that prioritize women’s rights.** This is the on-the-ground grunt work that has a real impact in the real world.
Together, we can create a ripple effect that impacts every corner of our country.
[Your gift of $50, $100, or even more can empower us to continue our vital mission.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=b67903fe281f4bef9eb7f2d578954a6c&_e=E1im3_MNMawGrdtW06E0lIrWDGNkXtlk85GRZ3nZclQ6O40AiwQlvhvptIwu7EtMAji70Ss5l9hhaaB0_ZBiaf8nzT593hyDBD0QJC7IndimJr_LMMwcV4lr2Y3CKYqL7a6M8LJR2FgnDnQX9yBO-I14FTpC7kdVHXn3mcO0CrPoUcWxnYGark_E0YRl2LoiPY7oF--Wy2vHzpurpqqznpJyvrYT9k5jvm2U-8Re6p3kaaFR8C52XBwXzv60j17acR-evm_2hBxtn_9dMM0k9fVGcpm-MnKnnXEmtt9fZq9Ns333a4o2hxzzy_RoC9RdcROI-GwC_ADK9XXPogZbgv6oDCc-TfBchz9zh60gXzcmiqIsrohT_N0ysdLGARCo546M7ePTJ7jUFB4Oj2koGg%3D%3D) Your support is essential in this fight. name: Mike Schmuhl
subject: Leadership
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Democratic Party, www
body:
|
---
Peter, This week has shown our country what leadership is — and what it isn’t. While families grieve and first responders do their jobs, Donald Trump once again points fingers and pulls Americans apart. We aren’t even two weeks into this second Trump term and he and his cronies are already dismantling America’s government, raising tariffs and costs for people, removing our country from important international alliances, and giving billionaires control of our economy. Americans deserve so much better. [**Yesterday, we elected Ken Martin of Minnesota the next Chair of the DNC. Ken is a good friend to state parties. Would you chip in to help our party grow with our own state party leadership elections just over a month away?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101440037/525958915/1764064610?refcode=250202leader&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOGEzYjQxMy1iMmUxLWVmMTEtODhmOC0wMDIyNDgyYTk3ZTkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aMXYoXg-APkPvNLc37WDgcE5IRFAf_Us72AkWeG4NWI=) This is a critical time for our nation and Indiana. We will be tested, and we must remain united to slow down and stop some of the most dangerous ideas being proposed – like slashing access to healthcare, gutting local police and fire departments, and criminalizing women and doctors. In Indiana, our supermajority Republican legislature is attempting to make medication abortion illegal, attacking no-fault divorce, and defunding our public schools so millionaires can send their children to private schools. [**That’s why unity is our biggest asset right now as Democrats. Stand with our legislators working in Indianapolis and our Members of Congress fighting in Washington.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101440038/525958916/1764064610?refcode=250202leader&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOGEzYjQxMy1iMmUxLWVmMTEtODhmOC0wMDIyNDgyYTk3ZTkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aMXYoXg-APkPvNLc37WDgcE5IRFAf_Us72AkWeG4NWI=) We stand for better wages, a fully-funded public school system, and protecting healthcare for all Hoosiers. Your support of our party helps us expand this message in the critical weeks and months ahead. Together, we can show Hoosiers and our fellow Americans what real leadership looks like. Thanks for your continued support,
Mike

name: Jen Kiggans, Navy Veteran
subject: My call sign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kiggans for Congress
body:
While for some it is all about power, for me it is all about service.| | | [](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=7c55a645e8a64bbdbdc2f8ffc0525aa7&_e=smrItiMyiQYyQZIyw3eDD7P50PGHMUiHr8sBQc49smru0rJVZ0G-MmHrG5hR6u_4m2V99VZWgzQuMnR7veXXUoH4wAMVLDnnPPN1J6NeezP2M8obn-qexhcLM27adMQirRyNsaD5jvyQIbDO5UB1KYegKBg2gS8X5vpGY3-6AXvpNjhTYHxcKc-IGgMZ_jMx_hMahn5tUyZYF6tTiaJSp_t9Hzgj6a537XKkqrtDba_9fr185Dykz05_rvUGIk_QT4emV47Xz4mC2dIxCY8YtyPP-TRizoe7sCtpwviH9FqGITIoPFfpVSIXnA9A2dmHDr22IILD-vu3-O33Wg7FzRPRoR1tayS_pFnJ2Uy5e-FsE68b_pO1pVrKEFU3BM_ON0Dh9Kbgn3h0WG-mmbHX5CEckmi27iTnKpYXT4xcpRg%3D)
---
| | That's a picture of me from when I flew H-46 and H-3 helicopters in the U.S. Navy. If you look to my left, you can see my call sign...**Blossom**.

_**[People often ask...how did I get that name?](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=7c55a645e8a64bbdbdc2f8ffc0525aa7&_e=smrItiMyiQYyQZIyw3eDD7P50PGHMUiHr8sBQc49smru0rJVZ0G-MmHrG5hR6u_4m2V99VZWgzQuMnR7veXXUoH4wAMVLDnnPPN1J6NeezP2M8obn-qexhcLM27adMQirRyNsaD5jvyQIbDO5UB1KYegKBg2gS8X5vpGY3-6AXvpNjhTYHxcKc-IGgMZ_jMx_hMahn5tUyZYF6tTiaJSp_t9Hzgj6a537XKkqrtDba_9fr185Dykz05_rvUGIk_QT4emV47Xz4mC2dIxCY8Yt0OiOnThiw29Rsz2vZxlP1mG5L81MwgAIn869p44l353aybRZ3tJshLMrzi1lLqJCNPrCrx185SW02PiKwvU63nnOA8Rr8dDmyt6tUogZy5PLdnYs_fNZ54EzgFkpm7vTgVuxgk368gb_YUJegFv-OQ%3D)**_

Well, my roommate in flight school and I went on a bit of a "girl power" kick one day and bought old bathtub non-skid flower stickers from the store, cut out that flower shape in reflective tape from our squadron, and stuck those reflective flowers on our helmets.

There is very little room for making a Navy flight suit more "feminine," but on cruise we were able to be a little more creative and came to love those girly flowers on our helmets.

Although the helicopter community doesn't use call signs as much as some of the fixed wing squadrons, the "Blossom" stuck and was painted on the side of a CH-46 for part of my first cruise. Made for a great photo and story!

_It was my experience in the Navy that helped instill in me**the importance of service. **_

Far too often, our elected officials today forget that their job is to **SERVE**. They think it is their job to tell everyone what to do and why everyone else is wrong....but that's not service.

As a Navy veteran and nurse practitioner, I got so frustrated and decided to run for Congress because I wanted to actually SERVE my country and my community.

**While for some it is all about power, for me it is all about _service_.**

_Sadly, this has made me some enemies in Washington. _

No one is going to buy me off or tell me what to do...I'm going to keep serving the people I represent, not serve some "master" in Washington, D.C.

If you are also tired of leaders who care more about power than service, [**I 'm asking you to send me some help today.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=7c55a645e8a64bbdbdc2f8ffc0525aa7&_e=smrItiMyiQYyQZIyw3eDD7P50PGHMUiHr8sBQc49smru0rJVZ0G-MmHrG5hR6u_4m2V99VZWgzQuMnR7veXXUoH4wAMVLDnnPPN1J6NeezP2M8obn-qexhcLM27adMQirRyNsaD5jvyQIbDO5UB1KYegKBg2gS8X5vpGY3-6AXvpNjhTYHxcKc-IGgMZ_jMx_hMahn5tUyZYF6tTiaJSp_t9Hzgj6a537XKkqrtDba_9fr185Dykz05_rvUGIk_QT4emV47Xz4mC2dIxCY8Yt5_bX67hh8eBeb6XwwMMSqbGR_a9rK8579BMU3Rxre0GNM9KzTugDDmEllFaPczzbfFi06nhXxG3szWpxilKxRSDyJuFiGMuPd_t_ZNaT_PPIXrW4ZdekE7LmOk1cPapX_4FC-HT5xWCj5pwrnSCT7k%3D)

Because I'm a veteran and not a career politician, I need all the help I can get to support my fight against the Democrats.
---
| | [ RUSH SUPPORT TO JEN](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=7c55a645e8a64bbdbdc2f8ffc0525aa7&_e=smrItiMyiQYyQZIyw3eDD7P50PGHMUiHr8sBQc49smru0rJVZ0G-MmHrG5hR6u_4m2V99VZWgzQuMnR7veXXUoH4wAMVLDnnPPN1J6NeezP2M8obn-qexhcLM27adMQirRyNsaD5jvyQIbDO5UB1KYegKBg2gS8X5vpGY3-6AXvpNjhTYHxcKc-IGgMZ_jMx_hMahn5tUyZYF6tTiaJSp_t9Hzgj6a537XKkqrtDba_9fr185Dykz05_rvUGIk_QT4emV47Xz4mC2dIxCY8Yt5l4ldw7hqjlKeUH3edEW1XFDEFsp6Tba0ijWEdyC3x3Lqv5mi_QLhIw3f-uFejUQPlwpLeEj5UEvenWDkUYCSeBBDPb_jzr9OHnXZXx6TGl3H0crj19YJ8gCY21VgNt53svYbOGbt9AdFTUQda1gR8%3D)
---
| | I know this was a longer message than you are probably used to getting, but I want you to know where I'm coming from and why I need your help. Whether it's $100 or just $10, anything you can contribute will help this Navy veteran keep fighting back business as usual in D.C.

It's time we support leaders who truly want to serve our country, and that's what I promise to always do...are you with me, Peter?

clean_body: While for some it is all about power, for me it is all about service.| | | | | That's a picture of me from when I flew H-46 and H-3 helicopters in the U.S. Navy. If you look to my left, you can see my call sign...Blossom. Well, my roommate in flight school and I went on a bit of a "girl power" kick one day and bought old bathtub non-skid flower stickers from the store, cut out that flower shape in reflective tape from our squadron, and stuck those reflective flowers on our helmets. There is very little room for making a Navy flight suit more "feminine," but on cruise we were able to be a little more creative and came to love those girly flowers on our helmets. Although the helicopter community doesn't use call signs as much as some of the fixed wing squadrons, the "Blossom" stuck and was painted on the side of a CH-46 for part of my first cruise. Made for a great photo and story! It was my experience in the Navy that helped instill in methe importance of service. Far too often, our elected officials today forget that their job is to SERVE. They think it is their job to tell everyone what to do and why everyone else is wrong....but that's not service. As a Navy veteran and nurse practitioner, I got so frustrated and decided to run for Congress because I wanted to actually SERVE my country and my community. While for some it is all about power, for me it is all about service. Sadly, this has made me some enemies in Washington. No one is going to buy me off or tell me what to do...I'm going to keep serving the people I represent, not serve some "master" in Washington, D.C. If you are also tired of leaders who care more about power than service, Because I'm a veteran and not a career politician, I need all the help I can get to support my fight against the Democrats. | | | | I know this was a longer message than you are probably used to getting, but I want you to know where I'm coming from and why I need your help. Whether it's $100 or just $10, anything you can contribute will help this Navy veteran keep fighting back business as usual in D.C. It's time we support leaders who truly want to serve our country, and that's what I promise to always do...are you with me, Peter? With the courage to fight, | | | | -Jen | | I would not be where I am today without the help of my incredible and faithful supporters like you. Because of your support, I can keep fighting to make our country stronger. Together we will get our country back on the right track and secure America's success! | | | Paid for by Kiggans for Congress USE OF MILITARY IMAGES OR RANK DOES NOT IMPLY ENDORSEMENT BY THE U.S. DEPT. OF DEFENSE OR THE U.S. NAVY P.O. Box 5042 Virginia Beach, VA 23471 |

name: Research Team [Voter Action Project]
subject: Post-election survey: Barriers to voting
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Voter Action Project Logo [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=020225_2&amount=25]
Newsweek: How Trans Voters Could Be Excluded From the Election [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/EA/EA007/1/89215/images/Newsweek_TransgenderVotingBarriers.png]
Nearly 210,000 transgender Americans who were eligible to vote in the 2024 general election faced barriers to voting because of stringent voter ID laws, according to new research.
The study shows that roughly 414,000 voting-eligible transgender Americans lived in the 31 states that primarily conduct their elections in person at the polls and have a voter ID law. Nearly half of transgender voters in those states do not have an ID that correctly reflects their name or gender.
We want to hear from voters with your thoughts. Will you take our quick one-question poll right away?
Should states take steps to improve access to voting for transgender individuals?
By clicking a response below your answer will be automatically recorded:
YES [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-pollresponse?refcode=020225_2&amount=15] NO [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-pollresponse?refcode=020225_2&amount=15]
http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=020225_2&amount=25 [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=020225_2&amount=25]
https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org [https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=020225_2&amount=25]

name: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez
subject: Having an unelected billionaire raiding US classified information is a grave threat to national security.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
This is a five alarm fire:
#
This is a five alarm fire:
The people elected Donald Trump to be President — not Elon Musk.
Having an unelected billionaire, with his own foreign debts and motives, raiding US classified information is a grave threat to national security.
This should not be a partisan issue.
In solidarity,
Alexandria
The Trump trifecta has taken hold, and so too have their billionaire, right-wing donors.
We need to show widespread support for Alexandria so she can continue doing what she was elected to do: **demand better.**
[Help us continue the fight with a grassroots contribution today. ](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20250202.EGuzsq&refcode=em20250202-8048-P_FND_RES_OPP&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=8048%2E2526796%2EhxgzVY)

name: Leader Scalise
subject: Liberal smear campaign against Karoline Leavitt
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
I respectfully ask you to stop what you’re doing and read this:

| |
---
| | | | [](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/O0HGBINlXj5DpYNsE-HqlaZVeKzPFKgIYpjPVWKLBzJR3BHgN83D1uDm1CupH0WilpDLhGTVqa4-IqVQUDW2c1qs-he3xv2sofMjrDxkX_KkFeQymY3SUfFpbm8-Xd9ininAuYixk_eM6kohh5__kbkjh_6YuoAnTN0OFCNsvEG1qdm78_J2v_X0J8HrMWUyTwAfo8GxfQXy7x6X8gsclSAu9phNITKNLMIUIrz-LWrw9bmWKmBhV9-4LcW1OaCsUzYyWr0wG76zHbNi_eOY7stKwcWiDXG34T2j2MuMlZbPcXfyrwNuFRp4cCj4hT7WfUL-HpNjzfA5RUq4KIGkpXya9rRRylVIHeveHoIamELYC-89IWvr9lssU4-tFlY57ZzEJL1h80-ykIsicfsMwg2N5050Qsn1UrzjWBFsedjwhFimzETbJQ9_gnxYbwx8KyOxB9TNEk39t7PMYGqJ4Doh5SFh71sK01yv-GAGD_enBjdF04W0Krv84k4OR5ze3HPELHBugn-qfYr5CKDNxWLPhD6ecER3Yi7G2xgocdcx/bXYkBfNEC_8YOstAyYcsH5XsxkxVDESs/5 "Majority Leader Steve Scalise")
---

I respectfully ask you to stop what you're doing and read this:

Karoline Leavitt - _President Trump 's excellent Press Secretary_ - is a devout Catholic and strong Conservative. She doesn't apologize for her beliefs. I admire her for that.

**Which is why it INFURIATES me that the Liberal Mob just launched a coordinated smear campaign against her.**
| | [HERE ARE THE DETAILS](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/Qoe_47g3kRHSXNs4biiXD_3I2Bmm98RaXisltcEqoiAAuP_nhyiQOY6gISVH-NZ5t9qjlqMdbPkUpZ-1kx8BSb3Olv1-LtGQc0Fp6k-GJUtGl9m60cnyOOmbSyq5sa77o4_16b6xX_oOauF1xu_gNLFVIa1AhloTrivqNlJuAicG6Y4BOJ7F7VyGHG0_FZz6cuBrVaFHSTHWxfUR6KT3Y6iGX9Vxo8wqbQhTTOifETp9QZWkch6lDFvMORpopUk02JIfqF-zCWA7lpqgXtVuu-waXBXWYmLlrEFrv8JrdcbepTuMKUHWTnohnLTgUndDEjYjX6ucI2-oFAPttSNqKRkOLlE8IX0iwqLV1GTkQS5ewBJVTs1PU3FeHASv3hySOK5YEvW48omV6OfW2QeJ8JBPrcT6jVwLpD8k3QMLr81MOafDJbAKSgIogkerkndB5rCPUamJeR6Z5h25GUGZ8kUYCgKKZxm_n0kfxYW7pwOiyvvpPKOI2U6qOqqkOJlyRbUNXaJqlCujs3rdTYY2flsYgq4KE9HgFcDtWaVsiwKy/Dt19-k7wxDQko5q2kHHCMh9SQ0iqrYuu/5 "HERE ARE THE DETAILS")
---
* Joy Behar went on national TV claiming Karoline was only hired for her appearance
* A freshman House Member took to social media slamming her as "a Fake Christian"
* Salon ran a 2,000-word hit piece demeaning her first-ever White House press briefing
* CNN gave her a disgusting nickname, coining her as a "spinmeister"
* The Guardian published an article entitled: "Trump's press chief shows she's more than capable of going full North Korea"

Look,

We knew the Liberal Mob would come out in FULL FORCE against members of the Trump Administration...

But no one was prepared for the disgusting smear campaign to tear apart her character and threaten her career. It's despicable. That's why I'm rushing to you with an urgent request:

**_[I'm respectfully asking every single American - Conservative or otherwise - to stand with me and Karoline Leavitt in this critical moment.](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/G1dLlMke2PT3O325i1D3Amwof4bNt5EXrJVRB9T6H4k4N4uuAJFo8E6n38IGXhPnwImYrzBYc0PYpOBYZuud5VoEl5X8qMkpezuXpUYu7K1bLNbJdzPJrpmiCfx6iIPdLJfK2V49Q9U3qyc0MvRNcbC9b8yuvG0OG8KYa7tFIf5Vg8-Ksso489BpUaNVeh-oK2NNH07Bgm9OKgzgespeCDx4CjGetGiffbnbx5hiw5cBkvGpeXGcy4EhWaxn-6QOftBuo1qw2Bd719b1J4xI-HVaUq2zo7KoM8fhRcKgR8LVv8hws9ipHYz57DuYbOiFw-ViQ1CdB8PjcbTgUBvTvTVdC3x2NXaIn0-NK5UAMsN4moQ5RMivySLLlwr_TlR4CdD6L_kktscwuPniJI5zgt8_0jCGIWTigCRHYjT2IOYVEKwA7AYDX9hkgPlMgIDdhnUV1E0XFk27nHNL0760MpH4Ybj4-KJ1Ne0g_heclPwrFqld24QV4rET1Bh4qNc0NCUGPXSEt62vKnv1Z35uUxvGrbpRAHq0Cv0ed61DnqkH/p62GQ4bkX9AhA0D6ZqE0xDhJVvu3-rZd/5 "I’m respectfully asking every single American – Conservative or otherwise – to stand with me and Karoline Leavitt in this critical moment. The Liberal Mob thinks they can get away with anything. They think no one will stand up to them.")_**

The Liberal Mob thinks it can get away with anything. Liberals think no one will stand up to them.

I personally guarantee you that I will. And I know Karoline will too.

_Will you stand with us?_

You know standing up for our principles isn't always easy. Especially when the Mainstream Media is running hit piece after hit piece against Conservatives and the Liberal Mob is attacking us...

_**[So if you have the courage to stand up to the Liberal Mob with us, I'm respectfully asking you to join us right here and right now:](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/YsxabRaZpJKAUkCEq3J_Lqgm2YNOWxXMf_9kVaMVJfykSAtFIpTbzzy0afy8W5i7x0XExwsIfemzy5eXQD55ECqtzeH785Ugg_GdjHZK3u5A54MEt0fVdVYv4Cf1odcK_02xcxHk3bRj2ojSSLm9Ncg3Kt52Ih2i8FsF-ioTjdESHhLWrmQu1pVfA6ZEPwklr7cCiam0lmLgphm3a3iDtmfCBJ7s3TBAqKbxO4lLNN2C_bexum2tWP52B3JHFYPpwWyJDbkJRafr_tvzjo-U9Fjjg7cH4ffnGnHn5aUYhXf2LCRqymr6Q-r9wQHafRz2_LPVOTMBvWTVkC4Z1H0hWBQV0lKWdKRN6SNFDBBusEQJflWEBs19H-xOj2nnb3M4rtezLoIyKZCFDxJ0DfmAhSQFQzZliVnwEVUgTB7VstaU7r-pgBwafZ-GihQylR-5us0kesTwQR77zN1NXinTV1tp2uy6Xz7aAy2iL_Ti8mGAZihKOvs7Rzfv5CN-PHmYyhos7oOxJDnU2n1s94eT7AevKdLZEk0Wclv2JUAcgWCO/L1mge2E_7CUq0zaFbpdsHOuagwkv9qGe/5 "So if you have the courage to stand up to the Liberal Mob with us, I’m respectfully asking you to join us right here and right now:")**_
| [STAND WITH ME + KAROLINE LEAVITT](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/cXFc9X1BtdYR000flG9eq-9C4aFurtSTRGnEjeYl4pyKHXRrrhA91s9yFLGOJbEsRf7L84mxXuVfkdxTf05YyCVS0esguclVUqtROg34EM-Ug3k3SJ2y12EuaCSqZbmYHJSPa8H0d5ESehLvlxYprWH4eLmQhbIqh00ryPb-tBBK_DqykG5_jSxp_oKVCRjxB4mMWwWdLOicBR4hQu5L9AGeIm7qwm6Tvpy2ONuWUVP_fmnUBddgEz5gPg5PFwix6fWPuqH7UQVns1y47_GKzXp0Ml0dhb9zCaB4FBTN6t8AiUxnMNmx1h8wxWlwQwwbngZwdp-4GRtETvDdgxYFTn_NHhU8nOcthmU9FRSuWPAn75WxcOBGLTQC5njKvWl56V6cTcTFCP41SxAY7hO2ObHdWqDzoXtA19JHUs_OYrgyhozo-zFDvLMMjvnCoGyJblounH-yiotHMut_BDGTOV2EHWoZlxfMSf7bdhHJ-mex9c02J1PZk8eL5pNSH0c7SEyEIPT-RGydvnhtMFU45OOHYJv3i1g3epl4prbAidwa/zm_mmjBwQgqTuoLCeGxqxtLT74GebkWN/5 "STAND WITH ME + KAROLINE LEAVITT")
---

Thank you for being the heart and soul of our movement.

God bless you,
_- Steve_

STEVE SCALISE
**House Majority Leader**

clean_body: I respectfully ask you to stop what you’re doing and read this: | | | | | | "Majority Leader Steve Scalise" I respectfully ask you to stop what you're doing and read this: Karoline Leavitt - President Trump 's excellent Press Secretary - is a devout Catholic and strong Conservative. She doesn't apologize for her beliefs. I admire her for that. Which is why it INFURIATES me that the Liberal Mob just launched a coordinated smear campaign against her. | | "HERE ARE THE DETAILS" Joy Behar went on national TV claiming Karoline was only hired for her appearance A freshman House Member took to social media slamming her as "a Fake Christian" Salon ran a 2,000-word hit piece demeaning her first-ever White House press briefing CNN gave her a disgusting nickname, coining her as a "spinmeister" The Guardian published an article entitled: "Trump's press chief shows she's more than capable of going full North Korea" Look, We knew the Liberal Mob would come out in FULL FORCE against members of the Trump Administration... But no one was prepared for the disgusting smear campaign to tear apart her character and threaten her career. It's despicable. That's why I'm rushing to you with an urgent request: "I’m respectfully asking every single American – Conservative or otherwise – to stand with me and Karoline Leavitt in this critical moment. The Liberal Mob thinks they can get away with anything. They think no one will stand up to them." The Liberal Mob thinks it can get away with anything. Liberals think no one will stand up to them. I personally guarantee you that I will. And I know Karoline will too. Will you stand with us? You know standing up for our principles isn't always easy. Especially when the Mainstream Media is running hit piece after hit piece against Conservatives and the Liberal Mob is attacking us... "So if you have the courage to stand up to the Liberal Mob with us, I’m respectfully asking you to join us right here and right now:" | "STAND WITH ME + KAROLINE LEAVITT" Thank you for being the heart and soul of our movement. clean_body: | | | **** The time for action is now! Felon 47’s MAGA agenda poses an unprecedented threat to Americans with disabilities, and we must fight back before it's too late. A devastating freeze in federal funding has already begun to wreak havoc, causing Medicaid portals to crash nationwide and jeopardizing critical services. This freeze threatens the very programs that millions of us depend on for survival—programs like Medicaid, special education, vocational rehabilitation, and housing assistance. It’s immoral, inhumane, and unconstitutional! The White House’s actions are not bureaucratic delays; they are a direct assault on our rights, opportunities, and our well-being! If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. Layoffs at disability organizations are imminent, and essential services are at risk of collapse. This is not just a funding issue;it’s a matter of dignity and survival for our community. Every single Republican owns this. Instead of making housing and groceries more affordable, they want to freeze Head Start, Meals on Wheels, care for people with disabilities, and services for the unhoused and domestic violence survivors, so they can cut taxes for the rich. That tracks. Able Dems is dedicated to electing Democrats with disabilities and our allies who will fiercely advocate for the essential programs we need.** Thanks for your support. -Able Dems | elects Democrats with disabilities. We fight to protect accessible voting, expand health care and Social Security, and equality for all. To donate by check, send to: Able Dems PAC c/o Left Ledger 1110 N Virgil Ave #375 Los Angeles, CA 90029 \- \- Paid for by Able Dems PAC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Contributions or gifts to Able Dems PAC are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. | | Sent via . name: Jeff Younger
subject: A California court ruled that my son can be chemically castrated...
body:
Just recently, an LA Court ruled that my ex-wife is free to proceed with castrating my son James.| | | I don’t even know what my son looks like now.
---
| |
---
| |

#
---
| | I’m reaching out to you today with a personal and urgent message. I’m writing to you because I’m fighting tooth and nail to keep school-appointed counselors, corrupt untouchable judges, and an unconstitutional court order from “transitioning” my twelve year old son James against my will.**[And I need your help to save my son from a court-ordered chemical castration.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=83828aae08ed4b90b6c617d07e63a695&_e=HsudxLa1PCg4ExFD9Q5ix8-RYtaSt2v3WERe3t7ZQz5g5OWsgvhhtMUExRpPAUFCttcTf0VIy3G8ObcABjdDa-mu7UKarcDgOopxSCD_tts3A4Nz2MdqnQhUfmihK8lD10bU_WGEIl4IBpIzrXu1Kx9AiNqtKMpePycpXK_sfk0mB3WKO7w2sRjnKknqatgMHMje-UZSQQlSi7G2l0JMw3ft2yKlyIaWD9t4t1eJMdAy5Q0mAORQBOlbiJzQpAcD5CmJnGgtqrFGAD5mT9VLL-U-np5z_P3vl30JASeKVIOVnjmh63k_r63HD4qoZ1S_Hi-7kAHv_Ww9L_htikF0ehwoE08EJMcDGQ3PgyEzwfxqPftSOhb4GXR7fU_0SBZ0)**

This is an old photo...I don’t even know what my son looks like now.I haven’t seen him in years.But I will never stop fighting.I need to save my son, _who was taken away from me by court order.__Who was forced to change into girls’ clothing by the school counselors after I dropped him off.__Without my knowledge._ My son is twelve years old. And despite residing in Texas, and Texas courts ruling that no gender reassignment may be permitted without consent, my son was whisked away to a California court infamous for transgender rulings against parents.And after a corrupt transgender judge ruled against me. My son is now just months away from being chemically castrated. **[Will you help me fight to save James?](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=83828aae08ed4b90b6c617d07e63a695&_e=HsudxLa1PCg4ExFD9Q5ix8-RYtaSt2v3WERe3t7ZQz5g5OWsgvhhtMUExRpPAUFCttcTf0VIy3G8ObcABjdDa-mu7UKarcDgOopxSCD_tts3A4Nz2MdqnQhUfmihK8lD10bU_WGEIl4IBpIzrXu1Kx9AiNqtKMpePycpXK_sfk0mB3WKO7w2sRjnKknqatgMHMje-UZSQQlSi7G2l0JMw3ft2yKlyIaWD9t4t1eJMdATDuOlrupkQSxcDINzNTX_dFmKe1ZGnJEvd5kx8Lma-1MXokImqYwsC6gvxhPgsOWcfWbaedDZaWc6nvYtleOXTzJqKV1bPQzQ7XLhSNH8Nz4FLC288GlkF4_trmWs6DRCtFQ62cxL3uwQxU0VzYTh)** I have partnered with the _Patriot’s Legal Defense Fund_ to fight against these family court sham rulings that are advancing a political agenda by hook or by crook. This _Patriot’s Legal Defense Fund_ will help me have the resources to fight this fight with the determination and vigor necessary to save my son – without having to worry about looming massive financial burdens.And it will help me pursue this battle to the end. Making sure these corrupt judges and politicians are held accountable – so that they cannot do this to hundreds of families across the country. These dark conspiracies to mutilate children are pure evil – and we have to stop this madness from ever happening to another child.Let alone my own son. **[That’s why I am humbly asking for you to make a generous contribution to this defense fund so that we can tirelessly fight this fight against evil.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=83828aae08ed4b90b6c617d07e63a695&_e=HsudxLa1PCg4ExFD9Q5ix8-RYtaSt2v3WERe3t7ZQz5g5OWsgvhhtMUExRpPAUFCttcTf0VIy3G8ObcABjdDa-mu7UKarcDgOopxSCD_tts3A4Nz2MdqnQhUfmihK8lD10bU_WGEIl4IBpIzrXu1Kx9AiNqtKMpePycpXK_sfk0mB3WKO7w2sRjnKknqatgMHMje-UZSQQlSi7G2l0JMw3ft2yKlyIaWD9t4t1eJMdBbucFYiZMAe_KTZHbIYirPJTs3sUFwOSl2RMXOGi2v9x_iUSuvxks3PoOR09IjjrYYreui0IhFWHvsx8rl1T2zki2YonyfiXMimr9StveeQZpgnSOixkSzCj_fSDk6wMh9AvRKjS8zwFnmrYD4GlMV)**

I’m writing to you because I’m fighting tooth and nail to keep school-appointed counselors, corrupt untouchable judges, and an unconstitutional court order from “transitioning” my twelve year old son James against my will. My son is twelve years old. And despite residing in Texas, and Texas courts ruling that no gender reassignment may be permitted without consent, my son was whisked away to a California court infamous for transgender rulings against parents.And after a corrupt transgender judge ruled against me. My son is now just months away from being chemically castrated. I have partnered with the Patriot’s Legal Defense Fund to fight against these family court sham rulings that are advancing a political agenda by hook or by crook. Making sure these corrupt judges and politicians are held accountable – so that they cannot do this to hundreds of families across the country. These dark conspiracies to mutilate children are pure evil – and we have to stop this madness from ever happening to another child.Let alone my own son. | | | | | - | | I’ve been fighting this for years. This all started when my son was only 5 years old. And it’s been a truly exhausting battle but now that a California court has ruled that my son can be chemically castrated I need to kick my efforts into overdrive.And I’m going to need all the help I can get.The patriot’s legal team will help me file to have judges removed and to open case details to the public. And they will be with me every step of the way making sure I have the resources to fight against the massive Leftist pro-trans movement and the Billions of dollars they can spend destroying families and mutilating kids to advance their political movement.I know that Donald Trump won because Conservatives like you and I are waking up every day to the evil that’s seeped into our country over the last decade. Thank you for standing with me against this evil. If you are not able to make a contribution please forward my message to your friends and family to spread awareness for my campaign to save my son.Sincerely,Jeff Younger. Patriot's Legal Defense Fund601 Baffie Avenue Winter Park, Florida 32789

name: Scott Fitzgerald for Congress
subject: Be The Difference Today
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scott Fitzgerald for Congress
body:
| | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/10dc625cde63/be-the-difference-today?e=561a28864e)

[](https://scottfitzgeraldforcongress.us22.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c59bc0db5e945d61b14749b2b&id=6469155b0d&e=561a28864e)

|
##
Hello ,
I’m reaching out because the fight for our country’s future has never been more urgent. Under President Trump’s leadership, we have already made tremendous strides—securing our borders, strengthening our economy, and putting America first. But the radical Left is already doing everything in its power to tear down these achievements and silence conservatives like you and me.
I refuse to back down. I will continue to stand with President Trump to defend our values, cut taxes, protect our Second Amendment rights, and put hardworking Americans first. But the attacks from the media, the Democrats, and liberal special interest groups are relentless. They are desperate to take back control of the House of Representatives and Wisconsin. **We just cannot let that happen.**
That’s why I need you in this fight with me.[ I ask for your early support of $20, $50,$100, $500](https://scottfitzgeraldforcongress.us22.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c59bc0db5e945d61b14749b2b&id=7b82d685e6&e=561a28864e) or whatever you can do. Your help will make all the difference as we push back against the Left’s agenda and continue to stand strong for our vision for America.
I’ve never been one to play political games, and I know you aren’t either. That’s why I’m counting on you now more than ever.
Let’s show the radical Left that we are strong, we are united, and we will NEVER let them take this country away from the American people. I hope I can count on your immediate support. Every dollar helps us fight and keep control of the House and Wisconsin.
Thank you for your dedication and your friendship. With your help, we will keep fighting, keep winning, and Keep America Great!
Sincerely,
Congressman Scott FitzgeraldWisconsin’s 5th Congressional District

P.S. The battle for our nation’s future is happening RIGHT NOW. The Left is raising millions to defeat us, but we can’t let them win. I ask that you stand with me by [making your contribution toad](https://scottfitzgeraldforcongress.us22.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c59bc0db5e945d61b14749b2b&id=a72eff3d0f&e=561a28864e)[y](https://scottfitzgeraldforcongress.us22.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c59bc0db5e945d61b14749b2b&id=cdc6a8b65c&e=561a28864e)!

subject: Be part of the change for Women’s rights
body:
My Ambassadors are out there right now, fighting for you and I
| Peter, Are you ready to take action against radical gender ideology? As you and I navigate this new political landscape, the importance of defending women’s rights has never been more critical.
With President Trump’s victory, you and I now have the chance to reclaim society from leftist values.
The Riley Gaines Center is rallying advocates and allies to join this movement in defense of women’s rights, and I want **_YOU_** to be part of it. Peter, with your support, I know that anything is possible. That includes setting things right and Making Women Female Again. As I travel the country and hear horror stories from concerned parents, one thing is clear. People want to know how they can help. Well, Peter, this is how: [Contribute now to our 2025 fundraising drive.](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=56a41e81e1774adaa2761f5d6096412a&_e=v2mXoPREtk654QwcSFGhkCmUPBs6pUC0-ff9SJl6D0APTwJbP9KpBVWhQ2xL436QH528tkmZ4FBT6gFhJ59OXftz7yj2ZwRczfd28JOp2S5M57j80DwyyXXBBCjjLPw-1OdEh7hPa-Zq6rHZsohIco0NQ-AfsLy6P9Ve4kaxBSCRoo-QYqOKNBIwVuF37BYgswnCoHohxnPKxjmhtMeQ6wym5oq049YrPLyhqKcIomuHX2PcgjHOGp8kM1qpBF4HPOa0TnTe3bPNm-EhnH6kwerPFnlqEBfemB7BS0JLIqoRIOBJ-w0WsX4cVLT9pTPg4HsN669OORrznnJkPU5Isiv7h-zJRn4HD75ZcCI2def2eme97BxhBoNoMlot_r95x9iLi4f1fwLlleZ4ss4gS5v5qx_zmBGQFJAOWfzNq2s%3D) Your critical support can empower the Riley Gaines Center’s Ambassadors to take decisive action and make a tangible difference in the lives of female athletes and students. My Ambassadors are out there right now, fighting for you and I. **Don’t worry, we’re young and hungry and ready to fight.**
Together, we can create a ripple effect that impacts every corner of our country.
[Every contribution matters. Whether it’s $25, $50, or more, your donation directly funds our programs and initiatives designed to protect and uplift women.](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=56a41e81e1774adaa2761f5d6096412a&_e=v2mXoPREtk654QwcSFGhkCmUPBs6pUC0-ff9SJl6D0APTwJbP9KpBVWhQ2xL436QH528tkmZ4FBT6gFhJ59OXftz7yj2ZwRczfd28JOp2S5M57j80DwyyXXBBCjjLPw-1OdEh7hPa-Zq6rHZsohIco0NQ-AfsLy6P9Ve4kaxBSCRoo-QYqOKNBIwVuF37BYgswnCoHohxnPKxjmhtMeQ6wym5oq049YrPLyhqKcIomuHX2PcgjHOGp8kM1qpBF4H8_cxn9ldCJp2o4uLxmfIZ6I41sNt6WopxBGfmGLQdt6Ejp_eGwx2ppKB9pmQgmjdWfdPxaMb-RuDNpfITgGwiHrZF6QuRRc9cYDbN7HaEgBvYH5KC3HYIPW41mrGK0Y4jteVB4H1cZYW-s9cvHLRxeff7UxTMOV0UsODkQ2UycU%3D) Together, you and I can make waves and advocate for policies that ensure fairness and equality. Let’s harness this momentum and continue the fight for women’s rights! Stand bravely with me, Riley Gaines Director of the Riley Gaines Center
at the Leadership Institute P.S. - Together, you and I can create a powerful front against the challenges posed by the left’s radical agenda. At the very least, your support will help make sure that the “Women” sign on the bathroom door means something again. [Please consider donating to support our efforts. ](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=56a41e81e1774adaa2761f5d6096412a&_e=v2mXoPREtk654QwcSFGhkCmUPBs6pUC0-ff9SJl6D0APTwJbP9KpBVWhQ2xL436QH528tkmZ4FBT6gFhJ59OXftz7yj2ZwRczfd28JOp2S5M57j80DwyyXXBBCjjLPw-1OdEh7hPa-Zq6rHZsohIco0NQ-AfsLy6P9Ve4kaxBSCRoo-QYqOKNBIwVuF37BYgswnCoHohxnPKxjmhtMeQ6wym5oq049YrPLyhqKcIomuHX2PcgjHOGp8kM1qpBF4HA07mzedUrm7oSDxG7yBWGp4lX9zE11olaQ-fM1nG0xNb4_cHB-Z9k_qFRZE5WM7N_6oN-nJtKS8eC99w2eyFnK9AHB6HXMyVmX-lIlZs6ToiYnjM-ixRVzUzLGD_sJR2Nu0Th9m-fCGtSnpPq6ppG2RQmhzOMOXGaEfqjR5Xjek%3D) Every contribution helps us amplify our message and reach more people.

name: Pat Herrity
subject: Herrity Headlines
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Friends of Pat Herrity
body:
|
---
| |
---
|
---
| | Peter,

It's been another productive week on the Herrity Campaign as my team and I work to earn the support of voters across the Commonwealth!

As you know, our first hurdle as a statewide campaign is to collect 10,000 signatures from registered voters in order for my name to be listed on the ballot.

Thanks to our hard-working volunteers across Virginia, we've made a great start on collecting those signatures - but we could still use your help!

If you're willing to help collect signatures and haven't had a chance to connect with my team or our regional director for your area, please reach out we would love to connect with you!

---
| [Connect with a regional director!](mailto:info@patforva.com?subject=Please%20Connect%20me%20with%20a%20Regional%20Director%20for%20Team%20Herrity!&body=Please%20introduce%20me%20to%20the%20regional%20director%20for%20my%20area!%20%0A%0AI%20live%20in%20the%20County%2FCity%20of%3A%20 "Connect with a regional director!")
---
|
As we've campaigned this week, I've been honored to continue gaining endorsements from leaders in our party, representing diverse constituencies across the Commonwealth.
---
| |
---

Delegate Ian Lovejoy is the only Republican representing Prince William County in the General Assembly. As a former City Council member, Delegate Lovejoy understands the local issues facing Prince William. I'm glad to have his support in Prince William and across the Commonwealth!
---
| |
---

Supervisor Duane Adams leads the Board of Supervisors in Louisa County, and his support of my campaign will be invaluable in central Virginia. I'm looking forward to working with him as I continue to get to know voters, small business owners, and others in Louisa and the surrounding area!
---
| |
---

Charlotte County Supervisor Noah Davis is also chairman of the Charlotte County Republican Committee, and a tremendous asset to our campaign in Southside. I'm grateful to have his support as I seek to address the unique issues relevant to every part of Virginia as our next Lieutenant Governor.
---
|
---
| Along the way, I was glad to be able to spend some time with long-time supporters in Northern Virginia and Richmond this week at a number of Republican gatherings.
---
| |
---

Early in the week, I had an opportunity to speak at the Loudoun County Republican Committee, where I spoke with dozens of conservatives who are eager to help keep Republicans in our statewide elected offices.
---
| |
---
I spent Thursday in Richmond meeting with Republican legislators in the General Assembly building and sharing my thoughts on some of the critical legislation in front of them. That evening I stopped by a reception for George Mason University and connected with a number of friends and legislators.
---
| |
---

I also joined the Fairfax County Patriot Pub this week and had a lively discussion on the issues facing our Commonwealth - and the local issues facing Fairfax County. Thanks for turning on the green lights for me!
---
|
---
| Keep your eyes open for us on the campaign trail - and [let me know if there's an event you'd like me or my campaign to attend!](https://patherrity.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=deffacbf7c4eb8be8b9889258&id=dea1806fb3&e=a1ea0f9c99)

This coming week I'm going back on the road, with stops planned on the Eastern Shore, in the Valley, Central Virginia, and the Peninsula before returning to Northern Virginia at the end of the week!
---
|
---
| As we campaign, I continue to stay focused on holding the Democrats accountable at home on the Fairfax County Board of Supervisors.

As the Board stares down a massive budget deficit, news broke this week that the [Fairfax County School Board's Equity Office carries a massive price tag of $6.4 million in salaries.](https://patherrity.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=deffacbf7c4eb8be8b9889258&id=5ceacbd58c&e=a1ea0f9c99) The salaries in the office are only a fraction of the amount being spent. These equity departments are clearly a better place to start balancing our budget than further cuts to our fire department as happened last year (over my objection) and are on the table again this year.

As I seek our party's nomination for the office of Lieutenant Governor, the possibility of Democrat control in Richmond next year weighs heavily.

If we learned anything from the liberal Democrat's Richmond trifecta (control of the House of Delegates, State Senate and Governor's mansion) in 2020-2021, it was just how extremely liberal the Democrats are willing to be when there's no balance in government. These are not your parents Democrat's - pushing the release of repeat violent offenders into our community, letting California decide what cars we drive, increasing taxes, etc.

If we don't stop them, our Commonwealth will see the same reckless spending, out of control tax increases, and the prioritization of political agendas over public safety, affordability, excellence in education and common sense in Richmond that I'm fighting against now in Fairfax County.

I've been honored by the support of so many across the Commonwealth in this fight, and I hope you know that I can't do it without your help.

If you're willing to consider a contribution to my campaign so that we can stop a Democrat trifecta and stop this progressive mindset from taking control in Richmond, I would deeply appreciate it.

---
| [Make a Contribution](https://patherrity.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=deffacbf7c4eb8be8b9889258&id=906f649c99&e=a1ea0f9c99 "Make a Contribution")
---
|
Thank you for your support, and your attentiveness to the future of our Commonwealth in 2025.

Every year in Virginia, we hear about how the stakes couldn't be higher. Our future, and the futures of our children are on the line. The reality is, to an extent, that's true every year. However, this year, one-party ultra-liberal Democrat control is on the line.

We've seen the consequences of unchecked Democrat control in Richmond. We can't let it happen again.

That's why I'm in this race, and it's why I'll work tirelessly to deliver for the Commonwealth and keep us on the commonsense, conservative path that Governor Youngkin has put us on.

Thank you,
---
| |
---
---
|
---
**Pat Herrity**
Springfield District Supervisor, Fairfax County
Candidate for Lieutenant Governor
---
|
If you received this email as a forward, I'd love for you sign up for Herrity Headlines to receive these updates every week, directly from my campaign:

clean_body: | | | | | | Peter, It's been another productive week on the Herrity Campaign as my team and I work to earn the support of voters across the Commonwealth! As you know, our first hurdle as a statewide campaign is to collect 10,000 signatures from registered voters in order for my name to be listed on the ballot. Thanks to our hard-working volunteers across Virginia, we've made a great start on collecting those signatures - but we could still use your help! If you're willing to help collect signatures and haven't had a chance to connect with my team or our regional director for your area, please reach out we would love to connect with you! | mailto:info@patforva.com?subject=Please%20Connect%20me%20with%20a%20Regional%20Director%20for%20Team%20Herrity!&body=Please%20introduce%20me%20to%20the%20regional%20director%20for%20my%20area!%20%0A%0AI%20live%20in%20the%20County%2FCity%20of%3A%20 "Connect with a regional director!" | As we've campaigned this week, I've been honored to continue gaining endorsements from leaders in our party, representing diverse constituencies across the Commonwealth. | | Delegate Ian Lovejoy is the only Republican representing Prince William County in the General Assembly. As a former City Council member, Delegate Lovejoy understands the local issues facing Prince William. I'm glad to have his support in Prince William and across the Commonwealth! | | Supervisor Duane Adams leads the Board of Supervisors in Louisa County, and his support of my campaign will be invaluable in central Virginia. I'm looking forward to working with him as I continue to get to know voters, small business owners, and others in Louisa and the surrounding area! | | Charlotte County Supervisor Noah Davis is also chairman of the Charlotte County Republican Committee, and a tremendous asset to our campaign in Southside. I'm grateful to have his support as I seek to address the unique issues relevant to every part of Virginia as our next Lieutenant Governor. | | Along the way, I was glad to be able to spend some time with long-time supporters in Northern Virginia and Richmond this week at a number of Republican gatherings. | | Early in the week, I had an opportunity to speak at the Loudoun County Republican Committee, where I spoke with dozens of conservatives who are eager to help keep Republicans in our statewide elected offices. | | I spent Thursday in Richmond meeting with Republican legislators in the General Assembly building and sharing my thoughts on some of the critical legislation in front of them. That evening I stopped by a reception for George Mason University and connected with a number of friends and legislators. | | I also joined the Fairfax County Patriot Pub this week and had a lively discussion on the issues facing our Commonwealth - and the local issues facing Fairfax County. Thanks for turning on the green lights for me! | | Keep your eyes open for us on the campaign trail - and This coming week I'm going back on the road, with stops planned on the Eastern Shore, in the Valley, Central Virginia, and the Peninsula before returning to Northern Virginia at the end of the week! | | As we campaign, I continue to stay focused on holding the Democrats accountable at home on the Fairfax County Board of Supervisors. name: Royce White
subject: Globalists are controlling our education system
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ROYCE WHITE FOR SENATE
body:
I need your help to take back our education system | [ ](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=7b5f8353941e4cd591b8a75c2f4c5aa6&_e=EVx97KFLC1tMhg9zUaLFGgaH95xSog9QooCc4cGMIdLn8ImoCvrwWDr0I33W0lQwu4m-Ut1tuP8SV5ID1S2t896O7SO7yzf0CK9U6mfGsDvR9et9kKzzDVSNH8nb7bhyzTZSPFZzx-Ei4V8PhTwTqcInSRkKb2NB53J1f7zs2uCtpKRNGKdxYvetGNWK-Vd4pTNqQUMa6xLTEtm3gLYbcblcEHGdpyf-HfQfcglfZNRloXmVOdfsZWeNG6TBUOSjlQ-O3lNCpAHB27r3iyObd5bti88MS4bKFu1YjtKXqEQr9_wdjOR3vX3hQ7Cb5_aIH-ThiylCF7pG_reyW4M8Pw%3D%3D)
---

Peter,

_I have teachers that I remember with deep appreciation. But to be honest, is to admit there are a lot of bad teachers and that there are also teachers that are bad._

This is not an accident, as the globalists have very intentionally devoted their resources to controlling our education system – because they know who teaches the children and what the children are taught can control the ideas of the future.

| [ **TAKE BACK OUR EDUCATION** ](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=7b5f8353941e4cd591b8a75c2f4c5aa6&_e=EVx97KFLC1tMhg9zUaLFGgaH95xSog9QooCc4cGMIdLn8ImoCvrwWDr0I33W0lQwu4m-Ut1tuP8SV5ID1S2t896O7SO7yzf0CK9U6mfGsDvR9et9kKzzDVSNH8nb7bhyzTZSPFZzx-Ei4V8PhTwTqcInSRkKb2NB53J1f7zs2uCtpKRNGKdxYvetGNWK-Vd4PgsL88GZzjWpH4hMtNdfM3zVzHDi9v7sylMM7e8INDTj8EBLFvhQqiDNC0vDxZauJovLF4Ebb2hTwuTKMg3RS7fIjkeVezlCRBYk1s4p3xBzrZWazBenSx94mQFWsl7l_n1X-JmWv_QY7d6n2XmNQA%3D%3D)
---

As your Senator, I will develop and introduce legislation that increases academic diversity and holds teachers accountable for their performance at every level of education.

I know the teachers’ unions will fight me, and when this happens, it will be because they know that I am not in on their scam, like so many other professional politicians that the unions hold in their pockets.

Much like the police, quality teachers need higher compensation and better training. The course curriculum that I sponsor will highlight the evidence of our American Exceptionalism, as well as taking ownership of the full weight of our shared history. And that history is made every day, so by ending our current submission to moral hazards of all kinds and restoring our national honor in all things, the education of our youth will be restored, just as good fruits come from healthy soil.

I can only accomplish this if I beat my Radical Leftist opponent, Tina Smith, who has been subservient to supporting things like Critical Race Theory, teaching children about sexual orientation, and revisionist history.

[**I need your help to defeat her. Can you chip in just $10 before my crucial midnight deadline?**](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=7b5f8353941e4cd591b8a75c2f4c5aa6&_e=EVx97KFLC1tMhg9zUaLFGgaH95xSog9QooCc4cGMIdLn8ImoCvrwWDr0I33W0lQwu4m-Ut1tuP8SV5ID1S2t896O7SO7yzf0CK9U6mfGsDvR9et9kKzzDVSNH8nb7bhyzTZSPFZzx-Ei4V8PhTwTqcInSRkKb2NB53J1f7zs2uCtpKRNGKdxYvetGNWK-Vd4Bk_TinhtQKSQxOxU11vmeWhh7N9irAWVU3GWhuh3lZ6KXc8uPZb_WVBdxjjOXE1Vq4B_pZ1ztWvj0YiG1zlVO9dwkNuKlrAIV57L0lnuBjiAiFBLaqwpM_yDc6_ijyLoKoLwa8iHDcb6Kc0Si1H4Ew%3D%3D)

The People Are Coming!
Royce White

[](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=7b5f8353941e4cd591b8a75c2f4c5aa6&_e=EVx97KFLC1tMhg9zUaLFGgaH95xSog9QooCc4cGMIdLn8ImoCvrwWDr0I33W0lQwu4m-Ut1tuP8SV5ID1S2t896O7SO7yzf0CK9U6mfGsDvR9et9kKzzDVSNH8nb7bhyzTZSPFZzx-Ei4V8PhTwTqcInSRkKb2NB53J1f7zs2uCtpKRNGKdxYvetGNWK-Vd43QkQ9l-lBRPoQW2DOeMex2Bd85bRpr-0VHO-w4czXvdPEdhNezyKRZUyThmDjRuNN4DHt38zU9nbfa3bDlvQEUW45NxmfXR5iQE4S4FiKo5f0gx86c5uSF2DHu0z-AL3ioiSVl-ZRWV3PV4G_J3BvQ%3D%3D)

Meet Royce White:

**Born and raised in the Twin Cities, Royce White was the son of a single mother and started playing sports at the age of 5 years old. Living in various neighborhoods growing up, much of his family remained in the Rondo community, where he spent much of his time and received schooling. White excelled at basketball and recieved a scholarship to play basketball at the University of Minnesota, and later transferred to Iowa State. He would go on to make Dean's List while receiving All Big-12 first-team honors and many other basketball awards.

_After being selected 16th overall by The Houston Rockets in the NBA draft, White began to voice concerns about the NBA’s collective bargaining agreement (CBA), specifically regarding mental health policy, which at the time did not exist. Eventually, his concerns became a public dispute between White and the NBA. This resulted in White demanding that the NBA, as a representative of the global corporate community, take up the responsibility of spearheading the mental health conversation – not just posturing through press statements, but through policy._

Royce then went on to win two championships in Canada before moving over to play Big 3 Basketball. White appeared at a game in a t-shirt that read “Free The Uyghurs.” After a game-winning basket, White did a post-game interview on CBS, where he called for 2 Million Uyghurs to be freed and released from concentration camps. As the season went on, White would touch on taboo topics such as Gain of Function Research, The Federal Reserve, Julian Assange, Edward Snowden, Larry Hoover, Jeff Fort, Muammar Gaddafi, The Great Reset, Ivermectin, Me Too, etc.

Now, Royce White is running for Senate in Minnesota to take down the Radical Left. Republicans have not seen recent success in Minnesota, but Royce's campaign is different: a grassroots movement that's sick of the Radical Agenda pushed by Far Left Democrats Tina Smith and Ilhan Omar. Royce needs your help to pull off a fourth quarter comeback victory and FLIP Minnesota Red for Republicans.

** [**PASS ROYCE AN ASSIST**](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=7b5f8353941e4cd591b8a75c2f4c5aa6&_e=EVx97KFLC1tMhg9zUaLFGgaH95xSog9QooCc4cGMIdLn8ImoCvrwWDr0I33W0lQwu4m-Ut1tuP8SV5ID1S2t896O7SO7yzf0CK9U6mfGsDvR9et9kKzzDVSNH8nb7bhyzTZSPFZzx-Ei4V8PhTwTqcInSRkKb2NB53J1f7zs2uCtpKRNGKdxYvetGNWK-Vd4y_I8ru_9KvFFPY-3UAU5-uXp9s8u3fTYQT9wNG214gYbDs23Jt4bvALlR2khYJ8bcv-FWIqLMANQLdRKhMhceFhx_HyBJ58w2ymS4pAT2rKi3-PARzR5QWDFhngvGzazFMgnBT7LagRFk_anjEJbag%3D%3D)

---

PAID FOR BY ROYCE WHITE FOR SENATE
P.O. Box 5473 Hopkins, MN 55343

---
Copyright (C) 2025 Royce White For Senate, All rights reserved.
You are receiving this email because you are interested in updates from Royce White, Senate Candidate in Minnesota.

This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Don't want to receive our emails anymore? [Unsubscribe](https://links.iterable.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_s=7b5f8353941e4cd591b8a75c2f4c5aa6&_t=eyAjOOkOnv96tBNlKttMxeW-7irTMtBZRuNSCr7PU71R8Kt7Ok53ixZQEw1bsKMRLgj1OXFf_kMmXEa1Ll2C9pNqmTW5K8Uns_C-O3SLSUSicQeSmFhy38FAdx04nOaf)

[ ](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=7b5f8353941e4cd591b8a75c2f4c5aa6&_e=EVx97KFLC1tMhg9zUaLFGvlqBeljyIjfxrrwvFwo4zAMHi9aoEGFcyyiYdk_thq6KUmpo0vVNicMMRKwWg1JorCyGn7E4q5DQDJJLheLeeWK0KAokzLPPHavuDBBiTgjl8KtFpyciezFmJh3J67DF62NCkyJ-gFQXfGlpAxhZrjam3PW6_ktyCA_AFXoscp5dOuPoMtq9Rs6rKJnvfLIRYpb0LxD0EoO6Qr8TUbvTe2-3DAUaJOhYgceJVWQ7uuj)

name: David Horowitz Freedom Center
subject: It’s bad enough you and I are being ripped off financially
body:
| | | ...the deep-state
---
| |
---
| | Dear Fellow Conservative, **[Today, I’m asking you to complete this NATIONAL SURVEY ON ENDING GOVERNMENT UNIONS.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=59cad91b0db046988ecc037de952ec85&_e=plucRyBTR_bTrSsMIzhkGP66A_fpjVM8g13RsbdSc6L4q7VokcM1FiKW-Rc0R1XtEXX5WqAcr7CK4Lrp08PCiP1DGQ-UccMhSBXUpsDSPy4GvjTEzrAVmfAEiF_mk0WMn2fxXtbutv0ovFR0FLYQ8sMLQMQWuyzrFEXCr0SPYy6K49ncpSybAgclp3kxRqgyh0p3MeM03zhe6flSPE19SvF4ScnhH5-Y9y5kPx_d4liwihtjRmBcfAKuBo69F5HbH2Ol_1NRSauhP3hlQ5PwhwQXx_-Gzjta4t5oK1mqqi1HhIpU8fmIz1kyMRfD9wc-q70_TEWVA9TQG4b9DtPDZxOK5wlfMqrWejplJaLRslqK2u6TB83r3M-Vn4KLlaYzcLf9QMohdclrAFAwoVkG0-qIfGKHr92b0uF4tXm9yNE%3D)**
---
| | I’d be willing to bet you’ve never heard of Everett Kelly before.He’s not a member of Congress. He’s not a governor.He doesn’t hold elected office of any kind.And that’s the problem.
---
| [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=59cad91b0db046988ecc037de952ec85&_e=plucRyBTR_bTrSsMIzhkGP66A_fpjVM8g13RsbdSc6L4q7VokcM1FiKW-Rc0R1XtEXX5WqAcr7CK4Lrp08PCiP1DGQ-UccMhSBXUpsDSPy4GvjTEzrAVmfAEiF_mk0WMn2fxXtbutv0ovFR0FLYQ8sMLQMQWuyzrFEXCr0SPYy6K49ncpSybAgclp3kxRqgyh0p3MeM03zhe6flSPE19SvF4ScnhH5-Y9y5kPx_d4liwihtjRmBcfAKuBo69F5HbH2Ol_1NRSauhP3hlQ5Pwh0lpiCH32xlOnE_0Ti5PjHHwUVyK3OdrDGFbYdkewgRQ4LbW8GWV1dlXdYRg0zsvrLMLBn3701FOfKdiTDcvBP6mXLTRAlhr_iiJaLVnKUs3M3kvV5gysEKQFHtmr57mvydru7cwO15I2JoD422qitA%3D)
---
| | Everett Kelly sits atop the American Federation of Government Employees – the largest government union with dues collected from 800,000 workers – who are fighting tooth and nail to defend the “crown jewel” of the radical left......the deep-state. And, before President Trump even takes office, Everett Kelly and the other proponents of “unionized government” are making the rounds in the media attacking President Trump, attacking Elon Musk, attacking Vivek Ramaswamy, and conspiring with the outgoing Biden administration to extend collective bargaining agreements (an attempt to tie President trump’s hands on this issue for the next two years). **[**That is why the results of this NATIONAL SURVEY ON ENDING GOVERNMENT UNIONS will be tabulated and delivered to the Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE).**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=59cad91b0db046988ecc037de952ec85&_e=plucRyBTR_bTrSsMIzhkGP66A_fpjVM8g13RsbdSc6L4q7VokcM1FiKW-Rc0R1XtEXX5WqAcr7CK4Lrp08PCiP1DGQ-UccMhSBXUpsDSPy4GvjTEzrAVmfAEiF_mk0WMn2fxXtbutv0ovFR0FLYQ8sMLQMQWuyzrFEXCr0SPYy6K49ncpSybAgclp3kxRqgyh0p3MeM03zhe6flSPE19SvF4ScnhH5-Y9y5kPx_d4liwihtjRmBcfAKuBo69F5HbH2Ol_1NRSauhP3hlQ5Pwh7jT4K39NPdGSlGEwdqAWo8I6wzr0w1dw1a3g2o_exMcJYt2tMhSo_RYvlgge4b5Xx-AJkyXTR5L9rmAy8KuLQu5ZVzpEXDIp4VU8SYsx8eaAd3uxXOf0P486qVH_0tkXuuPo8D_ycTXDPzgQLD43x8%3D)** Your participation is of the utmost importance.
---
* _Do you believe it’s acceptable that only 6% of federal employees show up in person for a full work week. And if you remove security guards, janitors, facilities and maintenance personnel, the number drops to 1%._
* _Did you know that in addition to 15 cabinet departments, there are over 2,000 federal agencies?_
* _Were you aware that leasing and maintenance costs for federal office buildings costs $15.7 billion per year?_
* _Or that the occupancy of these buildings is 12% on average?_
* _What about the fact that it’s nearly impossible to fire a federal employee?_

---
These are the questions on part one of the **[**NATIONAL SURVEY ON ENDING GOVERNMENT UNIONS.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=59cad91b0db046988ecc037de952ec85&_e=plucRyBTR_bTrSsMIzhkGP66A_fpjVM8g13RsbdSc6L4q7VokcM1FiKW-Rc0R1XtEXX5WqAcr7CK4Lrp08PCiP1DGQ-UccMhSBXUpsDSPy4GvjTEzrAVmfAEiF_mk0WMn2fxXtbutv0ovFR0FLYQ8sMLQMQWuyzrFEXCr0SPYy6K49ncpSybAgclp3kxRqgyh0p3MeM03zhe6flSPE19SvF4ScnhH5-Y9y5kPx_d4liwihtjRmBcfAKuBo69F5HbH2Ol_1NRSauhP3hlQ5Pwh5I3_Fggl-beyD8CDNCzDmWkhj5FlPlTAy4QFh9IoczWwlvucJxvEl8W7LthAMcU8ogIrfsWN4G35wMn7sYzF2jiTMvGnXwhzVwIjLXdpBcEB0FGfoCOpYMReHPA5s39qInjDCaOG_8aiIVphPzgETs%3D)** And if you think these questions are infuriating, just wait until you hear what makes up part two of the survey. You see, part two is concerned with the actions of those government employees who actually do show up for work, but who spend every hour of the day plotting to undermine the will of duly elected presidents and ignore duly passed legislation.In other words, the radical deep-state. These are the bureaucrats who’ve burrowed deep into the federal government (often they served as political appointees in a leftwing administration, but refuse to leave after that administration ends, becoming, instead, career “civil servant”).CIA. FBI. National Security Council. State Department. Pentagon. Hostile agents at the highest levels of these departments spent four years leaking, lying, and unleashing lawfare against the first Trump Administration.
---
* _Shouldn’t the people we elect to run the government actually run the government?_
* _Shouldn’t members of the executive branch work in good faith to advance the vision and policies of the head of the executive branch?_
* _Shouldn’t any bureaucrat who can’t respect the U.S. Constitution leave government service?_
* _Shouldn’t it be an enormous “red flag” that Kamala Harris won 93% of the vote in Washington DC and the fact that roughly 95% of campaign contributions by government bureaucrats go to Democrats?_

---
You and I both know that the Constitution of the United States grants no power to unelected federal bureaucrats. Yet these individuals have enormous power and zero accountability.It’s bad enough you and I are being ripped off financially (covered in part one of your survey).But what’s worse is the reality that our votes and our constitutional republic are being ripped off and wholly undermined by these unions (part two of you survey). In short, this is an attack on the very foundations of our country. It’s part of the Marxist playbook that is destroying America... one that I’m intimately familiar with... because I helped to write and execute it when I was a member of the radical Left movement in the 1960’s and 1970’s.I know from first-hand experience how Marxist radicals sought to infiltrate every facet of American life... _Schools. Churches. The military. Unions. Businesses. The media. Hollywood. _And, yes, the federal bureaucracy.Now, I’m working to expose the TRUTH about the radical Left to a new generation that is being fooled. At the Freedom Center we use the Left’s tactics against them – tactics like those outlined in Saul Alinsky’s “Rules for Radicals” ... in other words we fight fire with fire. Today, I’m asking you to join the Freedom Center in exposing the threat posed by government unions to the mandate delivered by American voters in the 2024 election. **[**Your NATIONAL SURVEY ON ENDING GOVERNMENT UNIONS is the key to reaffirming this mandate by demonstrating the consensus that exists to remove the obstructionist deep-state.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=59cad91b0db046988ecc037de952ec85&_e=plucRyBTR_bTrSsMIzhkGP66A_fpjVM8g13RsbdSc6L4q7VokcM1FiKW-Rc0R1XtEXX5WqAcr7CK4Lrp08PCiP1DGQ-UccMhSBXUpsDSPy4GvjTEzrAVmfAEiF_mk0WMn2fxXtbutv0ovFR0FLYQ8sMLQMQWuyzrFEXCr0SPYy6K49ncpSybAgclp3kxRqgyh0p3MeM03zhe6flSPE19SvF4ScnhH5-Y9y5kPx_d4liwihtjRmBcfAKuBo69F5HbH2Ol_1NRSauhP3hlQ5Pwh0m0DNhili99VCo8pU1AUZFaVUgdcJaUg05tnpeFWHMQghtnKgv6oY7z5kuecEFdgbGXyV4q6v0ckNGEqqFLLA7THGxFq5l_Q0oiH3nYhYYZOyYxHt3LO2GYD-KvDuCNWWwlxH5BsaD4aWfbP_TNstY%3D)** Please complete it as soon as possible. There’s no time to lose.The Freedom Center is spearheading this movement. It is vitally important that we circulate 1 million of these surveys, so there can be no doubt where our country stands on this issue.Because if the threat of government unions is not broken, banned, and outlawed over the next two years... then it _never_ will. As I mentioned, the results of this survey will be reported to Elon Musk, Vivek Ramaswamy, and the Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE) whose charter expires on July 4, 2026 – on our nation’s 250th birthday. You see, we’ve got a very tight deadline to accomplish this mission. **[That’s why I’m asking you to complete your NATIONAL SURVEY ON ENDING GOVERNMENT UNIONS without delay.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=59cad91b0db046988ecc037de952ec85&_e=plucRyBTR_bTrSsMIzhkGP66A_fpjVM8g13RsbdSc6L4q7VokcM1FiKW-Rc0R1XtEXX5WqAcr7CK4Lrp08PCiP1DGQ-UccMhSBXUpsDSPy4GvjTEzrAVmfAEiF_mk0WMn2fxXtbutv0ovFR0FLYQ8sMLQMQWuyzrFEXCr0SPYy6K49ncpSybAgclp3kxRqgyh0p3MeM03zhe6flSPE19SvF4ScnhH5-Y9y5kPx_d4liwihtjRmBcfAKuBo69F5HbH2Ol_1NRSauhP3hlQ5Pwh7YEX-LQmkQ31DRYWTr1iqddku1W_QdDKE1kRYgetfY32CV8yLfS78xxS8RKuQs4uSydQzDFxhkf97-rAm4vW8qW8KEcVo7AD8Fi-04ozPPs83TS9UYvH1xF_z5jLZxbO53VJjsbzaGKo2F0bNjllUU%3D)** And that’s why **I’m also asking you to make a one-time contribution of $35** when you do. It’s going to take an enormous grassroots effort to circulate, collect, and tabulate the results of these surveys to the Department of Government Efficiency.**That said, if you can send a larger contribution – $50, $75, $125, $250, $500, $1,000, or more – it will supercharge this campaign.** I want you to know that the Freedom Center will maximize every dollar you contribute. We’ve had “woke” corporations and financial institutions conspire to “de-bank” and “de-platform” us before:
---
* They got MasterCard to shut off our online fundraising and credit card processing (we got it turned back on).
* We had to find a new bank after the local bank we’ve been at for years suddenly closed our accounts.
* The hotel we’ve held our annual fundraising conference at for the last 20 years abruptly declined to renew our contract.

---
You see, because of our effectiveness in fighting for conservative principles, they hate us. Like President Trump, we’ve faced countless lies, leaks, and lawfare attempts from the Left. But I refuse to back down.Especially against the wasteful, constitution-subverting unions that make up the federal deep-state. So please hurry. With your support today, I’m confident we can win this fight.
---
Sincerely,
---
[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=59cad91b0db046988ecc037de952ec85&_e=plucRyBTR_bTrSsMIzhkGP66A_fpjVM8g13RsbdSc6L4q7VokcM1FiKW-Rc0R1XtEXX5WqAcr7CK4Lrp08PCiP1DGQ-UccMhSBXUpsDSPy4GvjTEzrAVmfAEiF_mk0WMn2fxXtbutv0ovFR0FLYQ8sMLQMQWuyzrFEXCr0SPYy6K49ncpSybAgclp3kxRqgyh0p3MeM03zhe6flSPE19SvF4ScnhH5-Y9y5kPx_d4liwihtjRmBcfAKuBo69F5HbH2Ol_1NRSauhP3hlQ5Pwh-6GshMTRw2YnWsU2AwBcPYmYK3eoqWfW_j6cDDjVQjFdSUBRfQ8_RXz7xncXhHFe3f4G-dW6MsMA1H-ScOnKA9X6g0V4G6EaSWsTAxL4tDsW1ZGZ8lde9rBPwWnL95XNp2s9c_73nGHnjo6OpWjE5U%3D)
---
| | **David Horowitz**
---
P.S. At the start of my email, I mentioned Everett Kelly and the 800,000 members of the American Federation of Government Employees union. According to their website: “** _On average, AFGE members pay between $18 - $22 per pay period for union dues_**.” **[**Your survey and your financial support are of the utmost importance in this fight to overcome the illegal, ill-gotten influence of these government unions.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=59cad91b0db046988ecc037de952ec85&_e=plucRyBTR_bTrSsMIzhkGP66A_fpjVM8g13RsbdSc6L4q7VokcM1FiKW-Rc0R1XtEXX5WqAcr7CK4Lrp08PCiP1DGQ-UccMhSBXUpsDSPy4GvjTEzrAVmfAEiF_mk0WMn2fxXtbutv0ovFR0FLYQ8sMLQMQWuyzrFEXCr0SPYy6K49ncpSybAgclp3kxRqgyh0p3MeM03zhe6flSPE19SvF4ScnhH5-Y9y5kPx_d4liwihtjRmBcfAKuBo69F5HbH2Ol_1NRSauhP3hlQ5Pwh_VO7wgRqA54XceQugTil1xIM1vd8gefMwZzeV180XPo_MQ-DbCBcPgtJaoF3wi9FOA74Gqko92RNqMQI74EHhPxoi02lf0redYafQlv9oFj7ZGhseADilhm7QIgKQsLbU0qyJnIhHfiSi-AzgP9Sqw%3D)**
---
