clean_body: | | | ...the deep-state | | | | Dear Fellow Conservative, | | I’d be willing to bet you’ve never heard of Everett Kelly before.He’s not a member of Congress. He’s not a governor.He doesn’t hold elected office of any kind.And that’s the problem. | | | Everett Kelly sits atop the American Federation of Government Employees – the largest government union with dues collected from 800,000 workers – who are fighting tooth and nail to defend the “crown jewel” of the radical left......the deep-state. And, before President Trump even takes office, Everett Kelly and the other proponents of “unionized government” are making the rounds in the media attacking President Trump, attacking Elon Musk, attacking Vivek Ramaswamy, and conspiring with the outgoing Biden administration to extend collective bargaining agreements (an attempt to tie President trump’s hands on this issue for the next two years). Your participation is of the utmost importance. Do you believe it’s acceptable that only 6% of federal employees show up in person for a full work week. And if you remove security guards, janitors, facilities and maintenance personnel, the number drops to 1%. Did you know that in addition to 15 cabinet departments, there are over 2,000 federal agencies? Were you aware that leasing and maintenance costs for federal office buildings costs $15.7 billion per year? Or that the occupancy of these buildings is 12% on average? What about the fact that it’s nearly impossible to fire a federal employee? These are the questions on part one of the And if you think these questions are infuriating, just wait until you hear what makes up part two of the survey. You see, part two is concerned with the actions of those government employees who actually do show up for work, but who spend every hour of the day plotting to undermine the will of duly elected presidents and ignore duly passed legislation.In other words, the radical deep-state. These are the bureaucrats who’ve burrowed deep into the federal government (often they served as political appointees in a leftwing administration, but refuse to leave after that administration ends, becoming, instead, career “civil servant”).CIA. FBI. National Security Council. State Department. Pentagon. Hostile agents at the highest levels of these departments spent four years leaking, lying, and unleashing lawfare against the first Trump Administration. Shouldn’t the people we elect to run the government actually run the government? Shouldn’t members of the executive branch work in good faith to advance the vision and policies of the head of the executive branch? Shouldn’t any bureaucrat who can’t respect the U.S. Constitution leave government service? Shouldn’t it be an enormous “red flag” that Kamala Harris won 93% of the vote in Washington DC and the fact that roughly 95% of campaign contributions by government bureaucrats go to Democrats? You and I both know that the Constitution of the United States grants no power to unelected federal bureaucrats. Yet these individuals have enormous power and zero accountability.It’s bad enough you and I are being ripped off financially (covered in part one of your survey).But what’s worse is the reality that our votes and our constitutional republic are being ripped off and wholly undermined by these unions (part two of you survey). In short, this is an attack on the very foundations of our country. It’s part of the Marxist playbook that is destroying America... one that I’m intimately familiar with... because I helped to write and execute it when I was a member of the radical Left movement in the 1960’s and 1970’s.I know from first-hand experience how Marxist radicals sought to infiltrate every facet of American life... Schools. Churches. The military. Unions. Businesses. The media. Hollywood. And, yes, the federal bureaucracy.Now, I’m working to expose the TRUTH about the radical Left to a new generation that is being fooled. At the Freedom Center we use the Left’s tactics against them – tactics like those outlined in Saul Alinsky’s “Rules for Radicals” ... in other words we fight fire with fire. Today, I’m asking you to join the Freedom Center in exposing the threat posed by government unions to the mandate delivered by American voters in the 2024 election. Please complete it as soon as possible. There’s no time to lose.The Freedom Center is spearheading this movement. It is vitally important that we circulate 1 million of these surveys, so there can be no doubt where our country stands on this issue.Because if the threat of government unions is not broken, banned, and outlawed over the next two years... then it never will. As I mentioned, the results of this survey will be reported to Elon Musk, Vivek Ramaswamy, and the Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE) whose charter expires on July 4, 2026 – on our nation’s 250th birthday. You see, we’ve got a very tight deadline to accomplish this mission. And that’s why I’m also asking you to make a one-time contribution of $35 when you do. It’s going to take an enormous grassroots effort to circulate, collect, and tabulate the results of these surveys to the Department of Government Efficiency.That said, if you can send a larger contribution – $50, $75, $125, $250, $500, $1,000, or more – it will supercharge this campaign. I want you to know that the Freedom Center will maximize every dollar you contribute. We’ve had “woke” corporations and financial institutions conspire to “de-bank” and “de-platform” us before: They got MasterCard to shut off our online fundraising and credit card processing (we got it turned back on). We had to find a new bank after the local bank we’ve been at for years suddenly closed our accounts. The hotel we’ve held our annual fundraising conference at for the last 20 years abruptly declined to renew our contract. You see, because of our effectiveness in fighting for conservative principles, they hate us. Like President Trump, we’ve faced countless lies, leaks, and lawfare attempts from the Left. But I refuse to back down.Especially against the wasteful, constitution-subverting unions that make up the federal deep-state. So please hurry. With your support today, I’m confident we can win this fight. Sincerely, | | David Horowitz P.S. At the start of my email, I mentioned Everett Kelly and the 800,000 members of the American Federation of Government Employees union. According to their website: “ On average, AFGE members pay between $18 - $22 per pay period for union dues.” | | The David Horowitz Freedom Center is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit organization.All donations are tax-deductible to the extent allowed by law. © David Horowitz Freedom Center | P.O. name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Drag queen pride parades on Blue’s Clues are unacceptable
body:
Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children. | | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.
---
| |
---
| | Dear Friend in Faith, Please -- for the sake of all our families -- take it from me as someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life...You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.You may remember shows with wholesome messages like Father Knows Best, Marcus Welby, M.D., and even Dennis the Menace. But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue's Clues_...
---
[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=d1728bab5181473791f016fa47fc1777&_e=CVUJa8jHmKxrXnXr2Asgrm-HaQO3DPfE8rKY0Q6LbSGvAVvN9Qa_I-_aIKG92N5h2Bu4LufsW5SX1g1tTCrkLLXZLaL08ll5Nnj99OIRm09G9mbWKFhYlfhNrlm1aI9fmjXNMbAR0tom6ItLrt9nKiPCvqmDjPKPe_LZ7B9krwDyIpT_mS80OlLqT1aIeDFY4pMnDqplGKJHm6vxrt7g0wkgeGjfw-CC4wf53l4XAjOgKofLouUh_sfJCgr3_wKq0jQuPL7dxyZrfooIpwoENdX3KsyACRo2snOD-X-ARLrriVaqYkagLJuT4-5Pw9UC62sXpFHewCEmHpEsr4v5557e_8hxPuOZigqnV6PmEkAyXTjA7zXiDor6EZONrSj-zDBHoprhGRRJ_1oildRn2Q%3D%3D)
---
| | Or Sesame Street using YOUR tax-dollars to normalize same-sex parents and men in dresses.And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to "educate" YOU about your "old-fashioned" and "mean" ideas.Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. [**Today, I'm inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first children’s television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great**.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=d1728bab5181473791f016fa47fc1777&_e=CVUJa8jHmKxrXnXr2Asgrm-HaQO3DPfE8rKY0Q6LbSGvAVvN9Qa_I-_aIKG92N5h2Bu4LufsW5SX1g1tTCrkLLXZLaL08ll5Nnj99OIRm09G9mbWKFhYlfhNrlm1aI9fmjXNMbAR0tom6ItLrt9nKiPCvqmDjPKPe_LZ7B9krwDyIpT_mS80OlLqT1aIeDFY4pMnDqplGKJHm6vxrt7g0wkgeGjfw-CC4wf53l4XAjMaxk7fMMqXIxj-RhJ0huIIJwTqNm2gNF5OE2KD9PVVFp4wifi7ivF47nIMs9VPE2AWdRJoE8p41ojyzPziLUt7S6K7mUCm4l0LaWiMnxClW4juUzaGYP98FQ5eP39Nd9XHfdQnOhYJ1dkDkqRqtYO7EpvkHPGv8HULJCbo3VibBw%3D%3D)Introducing: _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.I'm making this ground-breaking live-action television show with the great folks at **Brave Books**.If you've seen me and **Brave Books** on _Fox News_ , you know we've already countered those awful "Drag Queen Story Hours" the Left has been pushing on children in our taxpayer funded libraries. Thanks to support from parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens just like you, we started hosting Godly and patriotic "Story Hours" of our own.And now, THOUSANDS of children and parents can gather to pledge allegiance to our flag, read wholesome books, and pray together in their libraries.It's encouraging to see we can win when we fight back! Now we're working to have that same impact in television.
---
>>Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth.Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. >> Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart.>> Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. Because we can’t beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a **Founding Supporter**.
---
The great news is that we've already completed the first ten character-building episodes of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_!We premiered it recently to a small group of children and parents and I wish you could have seen the smiles on those innocent little faces.And I wish you could have experienced _the parents_ watching their children absorb the beautiful Gospel messages.It was quite a moment for everyone -- including folks just like you -- who worked so hard to get us that far.But now **Brave Books** has an urgent two-fold problem that I hope you can help with.
---
_**#1. Brave Books needs to launch a massive advertising blitz to get around the groomers on the Left.**_
---
You see, we're making the first 5 episodes of Season 1 of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ available absolutely FREE to everyone on YouTube. That's the best way we can reach MILLIONS of families with our Gospel-inspired messaging.But no one will see it if we can't get the word out. And the left will try to bury _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ at every turn. The price tag for an advertising blitz of this magnitude is $250,000 -- and we need to raise the funds in this first quarter of 2025.
---
_**#2. We must complete Season 2 to keep our momentum going and that cost is $125,000 per episode.**_
---
I know that's a lot of money but it's actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. clean_body: Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children. | | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children. | | | | Dear Friend in Faith, Please -- for the sake of all our families -- take it from me as someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life...You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.You may remember shows with wholesome messages like Father Knows Best, Marcus Welby, M.D., and even Dennis the Menace. But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on Blue's Clues... | | Or Sesame Street using YOUR tax-dollars to normalize same-sex parents and men in dresses.And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to "educate" YOU about your "old-fashioned" and "mean" ideas.Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. : Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk.I'm making this ground-breaking live-action television show with the great folks at Brave Books.If you've seen me and Brave Books on Fox News , you know we've already countered those awful "Drag Queen Story Hours" the Left has been pushing on children in our taxpayer funded libraries. Thanks to support from parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens just like you, we started hosting Godly and patriotic "Story Hours" of our own.And now, THOUSANDS of children and parents can gather to pledge allegiance to our flag, read wholesome books, and pray together in their libraries.It's encouraging to see we can win when we fight back! Now we're working to have that same impact in television. >Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth.Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. >> Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart.>> Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. Because we can’t beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a Founding Supporter. The great news is that we've already completed the first ten character-building episodes of Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk!We premiered it recently to a small group of children and parents and I wish you could have seen the smiles on those innocent little faces.And I wish you could have experienced the parents watching their children absorb the beautiful Gospel messages.It was quite a moment for everyone -- including folks just like you -- who worked so hard to get us that far.But now Brave Books has an urgent two-fold problem that I hope you can help with. #1. Brave Books needs to launch a massive advertising blitz to get around the groomers on the Left. You see, we're making the first 5 episodes of Season 1 of Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk available absolutely FREE to everyone on YouTube. That's the best way we can reach MILLIONS of families with our Gospel-inspired messaging.But no one will see it if we can't get the word out. And the left will try to bury Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk at every turn. The price tag for an advertising blitz of this magnitude is $250,000 -- and we need to raise the funds in this first quarter of 2025. #2. We must complete Season 2 to keep our momentum going and that cost is $125,000 per episode. I know that's a lot of money but it's actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously, we won't work through Hollywood.Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children.We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. It won't be available for sale anywhere. So with , you'll be part of a select group of people who own our wholesome TV show on DVD. You'll have it ready to watch with the children in your life. Or you can drop your DVD by your local school, church, mission, or even leave it in the waiting room at your doctor's office. So many children have no way of hearing God's message in their lives. Your random act of kindness may change a child's life. There's no time to waste. Hollywood groomers have destroyed America's Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes.And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family -- not filth.Thank you for being a part of history by becoming a Founding Supporter of Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk. name: Ken Martin (via Democrats.org)
subject: Build to Win, Build to Expand, Build to Last.
body:
I’m honored to be stepping into a new role as chair of the DNC.
---
Derek, it’s Ken Martin — and I’m honored to be stepping into a new role as chair of the DNC. I firmly believe that if we’re going to be a national party, we need to compete _everywhere_ , in every place, every election, and at every level of government. And I’m looking forward to building a Party that will do just that. [**If you’re ready to join me, I hope you’ll consider making your first contribution of 2025 to support the DNC today:**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-february-2025?amount=3&refcode=em_20250202_2695_fr&refcode2=2695_22930333_5O0F-A&akid=2695%2E22930333%2E5O0F-A) **[CONTRIBUTE $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-february-2025?refcode=em_20250202_2695_fr&amount=3&refcode2=2695_22930333_5O0F-A&akid=2695%2E22930333%2E5O0F-A)** I ran for DNC chair on a promise to implement a new framework: _Build to Win, Build to Expand, Build to Last._ Here’s what that looks like to me:
* We will **build to win** by expanding our vision and infrastructure. That means funding parties in all 57 states and territories, meaningfully investing in youth empowerment and mobilization, ensuring there is Democratic infrastructure in every ZIP code, and organizing year-round.
* We will **build to expand** by going on offense everywhere, contesting every race, and embracing our responsibility to support Democrats running at every level.
* We will **build to last** by planning, organizing, and implementing a 10-year strategy that aligns the infrastructure, partnerships, and the people we need to win. We must listen to voters and be willing to dig deep and recenter the Democratic agenda to reestablish who we are in the eyes of American voters.

This is the model we followed during my time as chairman of the Minnesota Democratic-Farmer-Labor Party — and it’s worked. Our party won every single statewide election (25-0), secured two trifectas, and was the only state in Democrats’ “Blue Wall” to vote against Trump in 2024. What’s worked here in Minnesota can work nationally, and together, we’re going to prove it. [**I hope you’re as ready as I am to get to work. You can make a $3 contribution here now to help fund the work ahead.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-february-2025?amount=3&refcode=em_20250202_2695_fr&refcode2=2695_22930333_5O0F-A&akid=2695%2E22930333%2E5O0F-A) Thank you, and more very soon. Ken Ken Martin
Chair
Democratic National Committee

_If you gave recently via check or mail, our system may not have yet processed your gift. We are appreciative and thank you greatly for your support._
